Text.en: Click to apply your display settings changes

The rendering engine will lower your resolution or remove non-essential particles to maintain this target framerate. It's advised that you set it to the lowest framerate you're comfortable with while playing. Setting it to a value that's too high will cause unnecessary resolution drop.
Text.zh: 渲染引擎会降低分辨率、移除非必要的粒子效果来维持帧数。建议将它设置为让您的游戏帧数最舒服，最能接受的最低帧数。把它设置太高只会让你白白损失分辨率。

Text.en: This setting allows the rendering engine to calculate shadows from light sources using image that's already on your screen.
Text.zh: 该设置可以让渲染引擎通过光源来计算当前画面的阴影。

Text.en: Global Illumination extends Point Light Shadows and allows the rendering engine to treat every bright pixel on your screen as an individual light source to produce advanced lighting effects such as ambient occlusion and indirect lighting. While it can significantly improve the look of the game, it can be demanding on GPU, especially on high screen resolutions.
Text.zh: 全局光照可以延伸点光源阴影，并让渲染引擎将你画面上的每一个光亮像素都视作一个独立光源，以此营造出高级的光影效果，如环境光遮蔽和间接照明。尤其是高屏幕分辨率下，它能通过要求GPU运算，来大幅改变游戏的视觉感受。

Text.zh: 物品可以被任何成员所拾取。

Text.en: Certain item drops are allocated to a random nearby party member for a short duration.

Text.en: You can report another user for inappropriate behaviour. Please select one of the abuse types below and optionally provide a short explanation. We can not contact you about the result of reported abuse. Misuse of this reporting system will result in access to it being disabled for you, or even loss of access to Path of Exile entirely. Thank you for helping us keep chat clean!
Text.zh: 你可以在此举报其他玩家不恰当的游戏行为, 请选择其违反的行为并附上简短的叙述。我们不会将结果告知举报者。请注意, 若是恶意使用举报系统经查证后, 将可能导致你的举报功能被关闭, 或甚至无法再行游玩流放之路。感谢你协助维护瓦尔克拉斯的和平。(该系统目前处于试运行阶段)

Text.en: A captured Soul. Give to Sin or Right-click to unlock a secondary Pantheon Power.

Text.en:
Highlights items within the current tab that match the keywords you specify. The Microtransactions of those items are also searched. 

Tips:
<default>{- Type multiple keywords by separating them with a space
- Combine space-separated text into a single keyword by enclosing it in quotation marks. e.g "two hand mace"
- Regular expressions are supported
- Search for item level by typing ilvl:X
- Search for waystone tier by typing tier:X
- You can press <b>{CTRL + F} as a shortcut}
Text.zh:
标亮显示通货页上和搜索关键字相匹配的物品。商城物品同样可以搜索。

技巧：
<default>{- 多个条件可以用空格隔开
- 可以把有空格的文字用引号括起来，当作一个单独的关键字。例如"two handed mace"
- 支持正则表达式
- 搜索物品等级需要输入 ilivl:X
- 搜索引路石阶级请输入 tier:X
- 可以按{CTRL + F}作为快捷键}

XBoxText2.en:
Tips:
<default>{- Separate keywords with a space. Only items with all keywords will be highlighted.
Searching for Fire Resistance will find items that include both "Fire" and "Resistance", including items that contain "added Fire Damage" and "Cold Resistance"

- Use quotation marks to search for a specific phrase: e.g "Fire Resistance"
This will only show items that contain the phrase "Fire Resistance" in its entirety.
You can search for multiple phrases by separating them with a space: e.g. "Lightning resistance" "Fire damage".

- You can search for specific item rarities and properties: Magic Rare Unique Corrupted

- Filter by item level with ilvl:X
Type "Level: 2" (including quotations) to find all items with level 2 and level 20-29.

- Use ~ to filter for items that have a price.

- Regular expressions are supported.}
XBoxText2.zh:
技巧：
<default>{- 使用空格隔开关键字，只有具有所有关键字的物品才会标亮。
搜索火焰抗性会找到同时包含“火焰”和“抗性”的物品，包括具有“附加火焰伤害”和“冰霜抗性”的物品

- 使用引号可以搜索特定的字段，例如搜索“火焰抗性”
这样只会显示包含完整的“火焰抗性”字段的物品。
你可以使用空格隔开多个字段，例如“闪电抗性” “火焰伤害”。

- 你可以搜索特定的物品稀有度和属性：魔法、稀有、传奇和已腐化

- 使用ilvl:X可以按照物品等级筛选
输入“等级：2”（包括括号）可以找到所有等级2，以及等级20到29的物品

- 使用 ~ 可以筛选具有价格的物品。

- 支持正则表达式。}

Tips:
<default>{- Separate keywords with a space. Only items with all keywords will be highlighted.
Searching for Fire Resistance will find items that include both "Fire" and "Resistance", including items that contain "added Fire Damage" and "Cold Resistance"

- Use quotation marks to search for a specific phrase: e.g "Fire Resistance"
This will only show items that contain the phrase "Fire Resistance" in its entirety.
You can search for multiple phrases by separating them with a space: e.g. "Lightning resistance" "Fire damage".

- You can search for specific item rarities and properties: Magic Rare Unique Corrupted

- Filter by item level with ilvl:X
Type "Level: 2" (including quotations) to find all items with level 2 and level 20-29.

- Use ~ to filter for items that have a price.

- Regular expressions are supported.}

Text.en:
<currencyitem>{Edit Mode Controls:}
To move an object, drag it or press the arrow keys.
To rotate an object, drag between the two circles or press R/Shift+R.
To flip an object, select it and press F.
To change the variation of a decoration, use the mousewheel or press Page Up/Page Down.
To reclaim an object, select it and press Delete.
<b>{When finished, click the Edit button}
Text.zh:
<currencyitem>{编辑模式操作:}
欲移动一个物品, 请拖曳它或是使用箭头键来操作。
欲旋转一个物品, 请点击外圈与内圈之间并拖曳选择旋转角度, 或是按下 R / Shift + R。
欲翻转一个物品, 请点击 F 。
欲改变一个物品呈现方式, 滚动滑滚轮或是按下 Page Up / Page Down。
欲移除一个物品, 请点击它并按下 Delete。
<b>{编辑结束时, 请点击【编辑】按钮}

Text.en:
You can now create PvP-only characters in this League. These characters can only be used in PvP.

To create one of these characters, go to the character selection screen, click "Create", then tick "PvP-Only" after you have specified a name and class.

你现在可以在该区创立 PvP 专用角色。这些角色只能被用来进行 PvP 对战以及完成里奥的每日 PvP 任务。

想要创立 PvP 专用角色, 前往角色创建画面, 选择创建角色, 并在输入角色名字和职业后勾选【PvP 专用】。

Text.zh: 放入天赋树上配置好的小型、中型、大型珠宝槽。增加的天赋跟珠宝范围无关。可以右键点击从插槽中移除。

XBoxText.en: Place into an allocated Small, Medium or Large Jewel Socket on the Passive Skill Tree. Added passives do not interact with jewel radiuses. <<xbox_button_a>> to remove from the Socket.
XBoxText.zh: 放入天赋树上配置好的小型、中型、大型珠宝槽。增加的天赋跟珠宝范围无关。按下 <<xbox_button_a>> 从插槽中移除。

Text.en: Place into an allocated Medium or Large Jewel Socket on the Passive Skill Tree. Added passives do not interact with jewel radiuses. Right click to remove from the Socket.
Text.zh: 放入天赋树上配置好的中型或大型珠宝槽。增加的天赋跟珠宝范围无关。可以右键点击从插槽中移除。

XBoxText.zh: 放入天赋树上配置好的中型或大型珠宝槽。增加的天赋跟珠宝范围无关。

Text.en: Place into an allocated Large Jewel Socket on the Passive Skill Tree. Added passives do not interact with jewel radiuses. Right click to remove from the Socket.
Text.zh: 放入天赋树上配置好的大型珠宝槽。增加的天赋跟珠宝范围无关。可以右键点击从插槽中移除。

XBoxText.en: Place into an allocated Large Jewel Socket on the Passive Skill Tree. Added passives do not interact with jewel radiuses.
XBoxText.zh: 放入天赋树上配置好的大型珠宝槽。增加的天赋跟珠宝范围无关。

Text.en: Can only be equipped to Heist members.
Text.zh: 只能给赏金猎人同伴装备。

Text.en: You cannot chat while DND mode is active.
Text.zh: 勿扰模式已激活，你在该模式下无法聊天.

Text.en: This player has DND mode enabled.
Text.zh: 此流放者正在勿扰模式中。

Text.en: Your Item Filter is out of date: {0}
Text.zh: 你的物品筛选器版本需要更新:{0}

Text.en: Select a Pack to purchase through Steam
The cost of this pack exceeds the Steam Wallet limit. To purchase it with a set of smaller transactions, please contact support@grindinggear.com
Text.zh: 该包的花费超出STEAM钱包上限。

Text.en: This character's name has expired. The next time you attempt to log in with this character, you will be asked to provide a new name. Names expire if an account is idle for a year or if other special circumstances apply.
Text.zh: 你的角色名称因为一年未登录或其他原因而失效。下次使用此角色登录时将会请你重新输入新的角色名称。

Text.en: The character name "{0}" has expired. Enter a new name for your character and then click Rename.
Text.zh: 你的角色名称已失效。请重新为你的角色命名。

XBoxText.en: The character name "{0}" has expired. Enter a new name for your character and then select Rename.
XBoxText.zh: 角色名“{0}”已过期。请输入新名称，然后点击“重命名”。

Text.en: Sacrifice a rare item at the Darkshrine
Text.zh: 在黑影祭坛奉献一个稀有物品

Text.en: The light of reason still shines
An unlikely guard for such valuable treasure
Power can be found in unexpected places
Text.zh: 力量可能从出奇不意的地方涌现

Text.en: Good things come to those who wait
Text.zh: 好事总会找到有耐心的人

Text.en: Rewards are seized only by those quick enough to find them
Text.zh: 眼捷手快才能夺得先机

Text.en: You become one with your offering
Fear will root even the mighty in place
A strange foe from a strange land
Surprise is a problem only for the unprepared
Beware those who lie in ambush
Prepared for trouble? How about double?
Never discard a weapon. It could be the blade that strikes you in the back
Text.zh: 你有想过被丢弃的武器的心情吗?没有, 因为你只想到你自己

Text.en: The riches you sought were all around you
The reward for a job well done is often another job
Text.zh: 工作的酬劳常常是下一份工作
没有什么比家更温暖的了
跟着阿兹里的力量一起流动

Text.en: Men and fish are alike. They both get into trouble when they open their mouths
Text.zh: 人跟鱼很像。遇到麻烦时都会张大嘴巴。

Text.en: The gods do not deduct from man's allotted span the hours spent in fishing
Text.zh: 上帝不会把钓鱼花的时间算在人们应有的生命里。

Text.en: Are fishermen all liars? Or do only liars fish?
Text.zh: 是所有的钓鱼客都是骗子?还是只有骗子才会钓鱼?

Text.en: Nothing makes a fish bigger than almost being caught
Text.zh: 差点上钩的鱼是我听说过的最大的鱼

Text.en: The fishing was good; it was the catching that was bad
Text.zh: 钓鱼本身很顺利，但是上钩后出了意外

Text.en: May the holes in your net be no larger than the fish in it
Text.zh: 希望你渔网上的洞比鱼来的小

Text.en: If you want a job done well, there is nobody better than yourself
Text.zh: 最能够帮助你的就是你自己。

Text.en: Even the wisest are given menial chores

Text.zh: 打用力点, 一次搞定

Text.en: Shroud your path in the fog of war
Text.zh: 用战争迷雾垄罩你的道路
勇气战胜一切 ─ 帕特里克。陈
尺寸大小通常还是有区别的

Text.en: Some challenges are best faced alone
Text.zh: 有些挑战还是自己来的好

Text.en: Your enemies have all the luck
Text.zh: 你的敌人们正好运当头

Text.en: You always were a fast learner
A situation is only dangerous if you can't run away from it
Text.zh: 如果你跑得不够快的话，当心了

Text.en: No adversary in nature is more deadly than the cold
Text.zh: 没有什么比大自然的酷寒更致命了

Text.en: No fury in nature is greater than that of lightning
Text.zh: 没有什么比大自然的闪电更突如其来了

Text.en: No force of nature holds more fear than fire
Text.zh: 没有什么比大自然的烈火更令人生畏了

Text.en: Feel the corruption in your veins
Text.zh: 感受淌流在血液中的腐化吧

Text.en: Kill one head and more will rise to take its place
Text.zh: 砍下一颗头，长出两颗头

Text.en: Nothing is more intimidating on the battlefield than a wall of arrows
Text.zh: 战场中没有什么比满天的箭雨更可怕的了

Text.en: You hear a voice on the wind
You catch a faint smell of corruption on the wind
Text.zh: 你在空气中嗅到一丝腐化的气息

Text.en: You catch a foul smell on the wind
Text.zh: 你在空气中嗅到一股恶臭

Text.en: A wind brings a whiff of ash

Text.zh: 空气中似乎带着点电流

Text.en: You feel a sudden cold breeze
You feel buffeted by a strong gust
Text.zh: 你的肌肉感受到一股能量

Text.en: An icy wind whips up around you
Text.zh: 一道凛冽的寒风划过脸庞

Text.en: A wind brings a scent of smoke
More than the paper it is printed on
Those who will not tempt fate lack the courage of manhood
Text.zh: 不敢面对命运的不是真男人

Text.en: The best tools are the ones you make yourself
Text.zh: 自己亲手做的工具才是最好用的

Text.en: An accurate map makes for a rewarding journey
Text.zh: 一个好的旅程得从一张精确的地图开始

Text.en: Magic isn't constant. It can be mutated into many forms
Text.zh: 魔法不会是一成不变的。它总能产生各式各样的型态。

Text.en: Success lies in having the right tools
Text.zh: 成功的关键在于使用正确的工具
真是有趣的东西… 有什么呢?

Text.en: Locations far and wide await you
Text.zh: 一个遥远，辽阔的地方等待着你

Text.en: The secrets of the ancestors await you
A trove of magic awaits you
Text.zh: 一个充满魔法的秘宝等待着你

Text.en: The garb of the warrior awaits you
The secrets of the forge await you

Text.zh: 最精湛的工艺等待着你

Text.en: A map of all the world awaits you
Text.zh: 一张完整的世界地图等待着你

Text.en: The secrets of chemistry await you

Text.zh: 一份奢华的财宝等待着你

Text.en: He loved to play with fire

Text.zh: 他曾在牺牲中得到了力量

Text.en: He was a stickler for the details
He stole that which he was entrusted with
He spoke the truths as he saw them
Text.zh: 他曾讲述了历史的真相

Text.en: He loved the dead. Too much
He loved the thrill of killing his enemies. From far away
Text.zh: 他曾热爱从千里之外击败敌人的快感

Text.en: He craved understanding, no matter the cost
Text.zh: 他曾热衷知识, 不计代价

Text.en: He was never bothered by the cold
No power but what you can make of them
The ultimate gamble, but only for those who are prepared
Text.zh: 空前的豪赌, 只给有准备的人

Text.en: The influence of the Vaal continues long after their civilisation has crumbled
Text.zh: 即使文明消失，瓦尔的影响仍然存在
等等… 那是什么声音?

Text.en: You win some and you lose some
Not every deal is worth the making
Vaal guardians survive long after their empire has fallen
A sacred place in the shadows
Elreon's Trial begins in 30 seconds. It ends if you run away. Be prepared to die
Text.zh: 艾尔雷恩的试炼将在 30 秒后开始。如果你逃跑了就会结束。准备好死去吧。

Text.en: Tora's Trial begins in 30 seconds. It ends if you run away. Be prepared to die
Text.zh: 托拉的试炼将在 30 秒后开始。如果你逃跑了就会结束。准备好死去吧。

Text.en: Haku's Trial begins in 30 seconds. It ends if you run away. Be prepared to die
Text.zh: 哈库的试炼将在 30 秒后开始。如果你逃跑了就会结束。准备好死去吧。

Text.en: Catarina's Trial begins in 30 seconds. It ends if you run away. Be prepared to die
Text.zh: 卡塔莉娜的试炼将在 30 秒后开始。如果你逃跑了就会结束。准备好死去吧。

Text.en: Leo's Trial begins in 30 seconds. It ends if you run away. Be prepared to die
Text.zh: 里奥的试炼将在 30 秒后开始。如果你逃跑了就会结束。准备好死去吧。

Text.en: Vagan's Trial begins in 30 seconds. It ends if you run away. Be prepared to die
Text.zh: 瓦甘的试炼将在 30 秒后开始。如果你逃跑了就会结束。准备好死去吧。

Text.en: The Mutewind Trial begins in 30 seconds. It ends if you run away. Be prepared to die
Text.zh: 哑风的试炼将在 30 秒后开始。如果你逃跑了就会结束。准备好死去吧。

Text.en: The Redblade Trial begins in 30 seconds. It ends if you run away. Be prepared to die
Text.zh: 红刃的试炼将在 30 秒后开始。如果你逃跑了就会结束。准备好死去吧。

Text.en: The Brinerot Trial begins in 30 seconds. It ends if you run away. Be prepared to die
Text.zh: 布琳洛特的试炼将在 30 秒后开始。如果你逃跑了就会结束。准备好死去吧。

Text.en: Conquer your fear of the elements
You need five talismans to operate this device.
Text.zh: 你需要 5 个魔符来启用这个装置

Text.en: All talismans placed in the device must have different base types.
Text.zh: 放置在装置中的魔符必须是不同的基础类型

Text.en: All of the items placed in this device must be talismans.
All of the talismans placed in the device must be of the same tier.
Text.zh: 装置中的魔符必须为相同阶级

Text.en: Portals are disabled in Boss fights.
Text.zh: 时空之门在首领战中无法使用。

Text.en: The Shaper's power prevents the use of portals.
Text.zh: 塑界者的力量限制了传送门的使用.

Text.en: The Elder's power prevents the use of portals.
Text.zh: 裂界者的力量阻隔了时空之门。

Text.en: The Maven's power prevents the use of portals.
Text.zh: 贤主的力量阻隔了时空之门。

Text.en: You must restart Path of Exile in order for your chosen language to take effect.
Text.zh: 你必须重新启动游戏才能变更语言设定。

Text.en: You will earn Knight of Aldur microtransactions as you complete challenges
Text.zh: 完成挑战后，你将获得奥杜尔骑士商城物品。

Text.en: The steam overlay must be enabled in your steam settings before you can purchase a pack in-game.
Text.zh: The steam overlay must be enabled in your steam settings before you can purchase a pack in-game。

Text.en: Set Negotiable Price On All Items
Text.zh: 将可议价套用至所有物品

Text.en: Set Exact Price On All Items
Text.zh: 将一口价套用至所有物品

Text.en: Warning, you are about to abandon this Labyrinth. Are you sure you want to do this?
Text.zh: 警告:你即将放弃此迷宫, 失去该迷宫所有已完成的记录, 你确定要离开吗?

Text.en: Warning, you have not used the Altar of Ascendancy. Are you sure you want to leave?
Text.zh: 你尚未使用过升华之殿!你确定要离开吗?

Text.en: This item is required to open a Golden Door located in the Labyrinth. This item will drop on the ground when leaving the Labyrinth.
Text.zh: 此物品是开启迷宫内黄金之门的必须品。离开迷宫时此物品会掉落在地上。

Text.en: This item is required to open a Silver Door located in the Labyrinth. This item will drop on the ground when leaving the Labyrinth.
Text.zh: 此物品是开启迷宫内白银之门的必须品。离开迷宫时此物品会掉落在地上。

Text.en: This item is required to open one of Izaro's Treasure Chests located in the Labyrinth. This item will drop on the ground when leaving the Labyrinth.
Text.zh: 此物品是开启迷宫内伊泽洛宝箱的必须品。离开迷宫时此物品会掉落在地上。

Text.en: Failed to save Grandmaster. Please log out of this character and contact customer support.
Text.zh: 无法保存该元帅殿堂角色, 请登出后联系客服人员。

Text.en: In order to log in with Tencent you must first create a Tencent Path of Exile account.

XBoxText.en: Press <<xbox_button_lt>> to instantly transfer items between your stash and inventory. Toggle <<xbox_button_rstick>> to see more information about items.
XBoxText.zh: 按下 <<xbox_button_lt>> 可以立即在仓库和背包之间转移物品。拨动 <<xbox_button_rstick>> 查看更多物品信息。

Text.en: You can right-click on a gem to remove it from your item.
Text.zh: 右键点击物品上的技能宝石可以将它取出。

XBoxText.en: You can press <<xbox_button_x>> on a socketed gem to remove it from your item.
XBoxText.zh: 你可以对镶嵌的宝石按住 <<xbox_button_x>>，将其移出物品。

Text.en: You can opt out of receiving the physical items in this pack and receive {0} points instead.
Text.zh: 你可以选择不接收实物道具而是会收到 {0} 点券代替

Text.en: Update your delivery details.  These delivery details are tied to your account and all physical items will be sent to this address.
Text.zh: 更新你的邮寄信息。该邮寄地址会和你的账号绑定, 所有实物道具将会寄送到该地址。

Text.en: You have opted out of receiving the physical items in this pack and will receive {0} points instead.
Text.zh: 你选择不接收该包中的实物道具，你将会受到 {0} 点券代替。

Text.en:
Drought-Maddened Rhoa enrages when disturbed
Click to disturb
Text.zh:
当被打扰时，旱地恐喙鸟会发狂
点击打扰

XBoxText.en:
Drought-Maddened Rhoa enrages when disturbed
<<xbox_button_a>> to disturb
XBoxText.zh:
旱地恐喙鸟被打扰时会发狂
按下 <<xbox_button_a>> 打扰

Text.en:
Skullbeak enrages when disturbed
Click to disturb
Text.zh:
当被打扰时，冥喙鸟会发狂
点击打扰

XBoxText.en:
Skullbeak enrages when disturbed
Press <<xbox_button_a>> to disturb
XBoxText.zh:
冥喙鸟被打扰时会发狂
按下 <<xbox_button_a>> 打扰

Text.en: Drops more and better items when enraged
Text.zh: 当被打扰时，掉落更多更稀有的物品

Text.en: The monster is imprisoned by powerful Essences.
Text.zh: 该怪物被强大的精华力量所禁锢

Text.en: Properties restricted to level {0} and below
Text.zh: 属性限制等级需求{0}与以下物品

Text.en: You have reached your maximum number of characters. To create more characters, you can either delete old characters or buy extra character slots from the shop on the website or in-game once logged into a character.
Text.zh: 你拥有的角色数已达到上限。你可以删除旧的, 不用的角色, 或在游戏商城内购买额外的角色位。

Text.en: Item cannot apply to monsters trapped by Essences.
Text.zh: 无法使用在受到精华力量禁锢的怪物上

Text.en: Target is not Normal or Rare.
Text.zh: 目标不是普通或稀有物品

Text.en: To earn a personal Hideout, complete the quest "Safe and Sound" in Act 2.
Text.zh: 完成第二章安身之地任务后，便可获得一个私人藏身处。

Text.en: The Guild Leader has not yet created a Guild Hideout.
Text.zh: 公会会长还没有创建公会藏身处。

Text.en: Talk to Helena to create a Guild Hideout.
Text.zh: 找赫莲娜问问如何创建公会藏身处。

Text.en: You must first unlock a personal Hideout before you can create a Guild Hideout.
Text.zh: 在创建公会藏身处前必须先解锁一个私人藏身处。

Text.en: Complete the six Trials of Ascendancy scattered throughout Wraeclast to earn access to the Lord's Labyrinth. Upon completing the Labyrinth and defeating Emperor Izaro, you can choose an Ascendancy class. Completing each Labyrinth for the first time rewards you with two Ascendancy points and the ability to imbue a piece of equipment with a special enchantment. The Labyrinth's layout and secrets change every day.
Text.zh: 在瓦尔克拉斯上存在许多致命的试炼。完成剧情前三章中的六个试炼, 即可开启第一个难度的帝王试炼迷宫的大门。在击败伊泽洛并完成帝王试炼迷宫, 你将能够选择一个升华职业。首次完成每个难度下的帝王试炼迷宫将奖励 2 点升华点数。同时每次完成帝王试炼后将获得一次装备附魔的机会。迷宫的布局会每天刷新。

Text.en: You can combine three Essences of the same type into an Essence of a higher power level, by selling them to the vendor.
Text.zh: 将三个相同种类的精华贩卖给NPC可以合成为一个更高等级的精华。

Text.en: Upgrades a Tier 1 map on the Atlas by five tiers
Text.zh: 将异界图鉴上的一个 1 阶地图提升 5 阶。

Text.en: Upgrades a Tier 2 map on the Atlas by five tiers
Text.zh: 将异界图鉴上的一个 2 阶地图提升 5 阶。

Text.en: Upgrades a Tier 3 map on the Atlas by five tiers
Text.zh: 将异界图鉴上的一个 3 阶地图提升 5 阶。

Text.en: Upgrades a Tier 4 map on the Atlas by five tiers
Text.zh: 将异界图鉴上的一个 4 阶地图提升 5 阶。

Text.en: Upgrades a Tier 5 map on the Atlas by five tiers
Text.zh: 将异界图鉴上的一个 5 阶地图提升 5 阶。

Text.en: Upgrades a Tier 6 map on the Atlas by five tiers
Text.zh: 将异界图鉴上的一个 6 阶地图提升 5 阶。

Text.en: Upgrades a Tier 7 map on the Atlas by five tiers
Text.zh: 将异界图鉴上的一个 7 阶地图提升 5 阶。

Text.en: Upgrades a Tier 8 map on the Atlas by five tiers
Text.zh: 将异界图鉴上的一个 8 阶地图提升 5 阶。

Text.en: Upgrades a Tier 9 map on the Atlas by five tiers
Text.zh: 将异界图鉴上的一个 9 阶地图提升 5 阶。

Text.en: Upgrades a Tier 10 map on the Atlas by five tiers
Text.zh: 将异界图鉴上的一个 10 阶地图提升 5 阶。

Text.en: Upgrades any map on the Atlas to Tier 16
Text.zh: 将异界图鉴上的任意地图提升到 16 阶。

Text.en: Right click this item then left click on a map on the Atlas to upgrade it by five tiers.
Text.zh: 右键点击该物品，然后在异界图鉴上点击一个地图，该地图的等阶将提升 5 阶

XBoxText.en: Press <<xbox_button_a>> to select, then press <<xbox_button_a>> on a map on the Atlas to upgrade it by five tiers.
XBoxText.zh: 按下 <<xbox_button_a>> 选择，随后在异界图鉴上对一张地图按下 <<xbox_button_a>>，将该地图的等级提升5阶。

Text.en: Right click this item then left click on a map on the Atlas to upgrade it to tier 16.
Text.zh: 右键点击该物品，然后在异界图鉴上点击一个地图，该地图将被提升到 16 阶

XBoxText.en: Press <<xbox_button_a>> to select, then press <<xbox_button_a>> on a map on the Atlas to upgrade it to tier 16.
XBoxText.zh: 按下 <<xbox_button_a>> 选择，随后在异界图鉴上对一张地图按下 <<xbox_button_a>>，将该地图的等级提升至16阶。

Text.en: Click here to migrate your account to the world wide servers.
Text.zh: 点击此处将账号合并到世界服务器

Text.en: This map's bonus objective must be completed before you can do this.
Text.zh: 必须先在异界图鉴上完成该地图的额外目标后才能使用此物品

Text.en: You can't do this to a unique map.
Map Boss has a Shaper's Memory Fragment
Text.zh: 地图首领携带 1 个塑界者的记忆碎片

Text.zh: 裂界者携带 1 个塑界者的记忆碎片

Text.en: Elder Guardian has a Shaper's Memory Fragment
Text.zh: 裂界者卫士携带 1 个塑界者的记忆碎片

Text.en: <default>{<white>{Bonus:} Kill boss of <magic>{magic} or higher version of this map}
Text.zh: <default>{<white>{额外目标:}在 <magic>{魔法} 或更稀有版本的该地图内击败头目}

Text.en: <default>{<white>{Bonus:} Kill boss of <rare>{rare} version of this map}
Text.zh: <default>{<white>{额外目标:}在 <rare>{稀有} 版本的该地图内击败头目}

Text.zh: 每完成一个奖励目标可获得 1 异界天赋点

Text.en: Click to open a webpage with the characters information
Text.zh: 点击后打开网页查看该玩家信息

标亮显示异界图鉴上和搜索关键字相匹配的地图

<default>{- 多个条件可以用空格隔开

Text.en: Press {0} or open the menu to access your Social Panel
Text.zh: 按 {0} 或打开菜单切换到你的社交面板

Text.en: Press the Guild tab to access Guild Functions
Text.zh: 按下公会标签使用公会功能

Text.en: You can create a guild here to invite your friends and talk to each other. You can also join an established guild. Guilds have their own chat channel, and you can easily find parties with fellow guildmates.
Text.zh: 你可以创建公会, 邀请好友加入并用公会频道畅所欲言。你也可以加入他人公会。公会有单独的聊天频道, 帮助你更快的找到组队和游戏的伙伴。

Text.en: Keep completing Master missions to earn reputation with that Master and to increase their level. Increase a Master's level to three and they can create a Hideout for you.
Text.zh: 不断完成大师任务可以赢得他们的声望，提升他们的等级。一位 3 级大师可以为你创建藏身处。

Text.en: This master has reached level three! Talk to them in Town and they can create a Hideout for you!
Text.zh: 该大师已达到 3 级！在城镇与他对话会自动获得一个藏身处！

Text.en: Convert unbound currency into account-bound currency?
Text.zh: 确认要将【非绑定】通货转化为【绑定】?

Text.en: Enter text here to send a message with your offer
Text.zh: 输入竞标附带的留言信息

Text.en: This message will be sent to all users who are currently playing.

Text.zh: 目标为错误的传奇物品

Text.zh: 你需要放入物品进行报价

Text.en:
Place items here to list them on the market 
Right click on them to set their note and price
Text.zh:
该页内物品将自动上架到市集。右键可设价格
摊位页时限为当前赛季,下赛季需重新购买
为控制市集"死物品"量,需玩家每日手动续期

Text.en: Please select the period below you would like to rent the tab for
Text.zh: 请选择你需要的摊位页种类

Text.en: You can spend revive coins to respawn with no experience penalty.
Text.zh: 使用复活币复活不会损失任何经验。

Text.en: You do not have enough Revive Coins to respawn with no XP loss. Would you like to purchase {0} Revive Coins before respawning?
Text.zh: 没有足够的复活币进行无经验损失复活。是否需要直接购买复活币复活?(小于等于60级100点券, 61至80级200点券, 81至90级300点券, 91-95级400点券)

Text.en: You do not have enough bound currency to buy this item, but you do have enough unbound currency. Click the checkbox to change currency types.
Text.zh: 没有足够的【绑定】通货, 但是你有足够的【非绑定】通货。请尝试用另一种通货支付。

Text.en: You do not have enough unbound currency to buy this item, but you do have enough bound currency. Click the checkbox to change currency types.
Text.zh: 没有足够的【非绑定】通货, 但是你有足够的【绑定】通货。请尝试用另一种通货支付。

Text.en: You are not currently in a Party
Text.zh: 你当前没有加入任何队伍

Text.en: You are not currently in a Guild
Text.zh: 你当前没有加入任何公会

Text.en: You have {0} points. Would you like to purchase a tab for {1} points?
Text.zh: 你拥有 {0} 点券。你确认花费 {1} 点券购买一个市集页吗?

Text.en: Click here to enter a rejection message
The Trade Market is available for testing to players who are level 40 or higher.
Text.zh: 市集处于功能测试阶段，仅对40级以上玩家开放。

Text.en: You must be in Town or your Hideout to use the trade market system. You can accept or reject offers while out of Town.
Text.zh: 只能在城镇和你的藏身处使用交易市集。但你可以在城镇外接受或拒绝交易请求。

XBoxText.en: You must be in Town or your Hideout to use the trade market system.
XBoxText.zh: 只能在城镇和你的藏身处使用交易市集。

Text.en: You can't use this item from inside an offer.
Text.zh: 该物品必须从竞标中取出后方可使用

Text.en: You have made too many requests too quickly, please wait a few seconds before trying again.
Text.zh: 您操作的频率过快, 请稍等一下再进行操作。

Text.en: Are you sure you want to sell: {0} for the items listed below?
Text.zh: 您是否确认要将:{0} 与以下物品成交?

Text.en: Select the Guidebook at any time to find additional help and information about your journey through Wraeclast.
Text.zh: 生存指南能在任何时刻给予你探索瓦尔克拉斯所需的帮助和必备讯息。

Text.en: Wraeclast survivor's guidebook （You can click the menu on the bottom right corner to open the guidebook in-game)
Text.zh: 瓦尔克拉斯生存指南 （打开右下角菜单，可随时查看）

Text.en: Using bound currency to craft a master mod will bind the item to your account. Do you wish to proceed?
Text.zh: 使用【绑定】通货加工后将获得【绑定】物品, 确认要继续吗?

Text.en:
Place the gem in the socket
which matches its colour.
Text.zh: 将技能宝石放到相同颜色的插槽中

Text.en:
This skill is now equipped on your skill bar and can be used with '{0}'.

Press {1} to close your inventory and press {2} to close your gem panel.
Text.zh:
该技能已装备到技能栏中，可以通过“{0}”使用。

按下 {1} 关闭物品栏，按下 {2} 关闭宝石面板。

XBoxText.en:
This skill is now equipped and can be used with {0}.
(This can be changed by

XBoxText.zh:
该技能现已装备，可以通过 {0} 使用。
（可以通过按下
<<xbox_button_rstick>> 来更改）。

Text.en: Press <normal>{{<n>{{{0}}}}} to use a Mana Flask
Text.zh: 按下 <N>{{<normal>{{{0}}}}} 使用魔力药剂。

Text.en: Certain profane words will be replaced in the chat
Text.zh: 特定的脏字将会在聊天窗口屏蔽
完成 {0} 项挑战，奖励珍贵物品：{1}

Text.en:
At 1 challenge you are rewarded with a
Challenger Statue to display in your hideout.
Text.zh:
完成 1 个挑战即可获得一尊挑战者雕像，
可放置于你的藏身处展示。

Text.en: You must restart Path of Exile in order for the selected change to take effect. Would you like to restart now?
Text.zh: 你必须重启《流放之路》客户端才能使改变生效。是否现在重启？

Text.en: You must restart Path of Exile in order for the selected change to take effect.
Text.zh: 你必须重启《流放之路》客户端才能使改变生效。

Text.en: The DirectX 11 client crashed on startup. Would you like to switch to the DirectX 9 client instead?
Text.zh: DX11在启动时失败。是否需要重新切换回DX9版本?

Text.en: Failed to start the DirectX 9 client. Would you like to switch to the DirectX 11 client instead?
Text.zh: DX9在启动时失败。是否尝试切换到DX11版本?

Text.en:
Click on this button and then click Essences to upgrade
them to the next tier. Press Esc when done.
Text.zh:
点击此按钮后, 你下一个点击的精髓
将升级至下一阶段, 完成后按下ESC关闭功能。

Text.en: Click on Essences in the stash to upgrade them. Press Esc when done.
Text.zh: 点击仓库页中的精髓进行升级, 完成后按下ESC关闭功能。

XBoxText.zh:
<bigger>{<<xbox_button_x>>}升级仓库中的精华
<bigger>{<<xbox_button_b>>}退出升级模式

Text.en: You can only upgrade a group of 3 or more Essences.
Text.zh: 你必须拥有至少3个同类精华才能升级

Text.en: You cannot upgrade a maxmum-tier Essence.
Text.zh: 该精华已达到最高等阶

Highlights nodes on the passive tree that match the keywords you specify.

标亮显示天赋树上和搜索关键字相匹配的天赋节点

<default>{- 多个条件可以用空格隔开

只搜当前区在线玩家物品

Text.en: Yama has nothing to say to you.
Text.zh: 雅玛看上去没有什么想对你说的。

Text.en: Travel to the Ancient Reliquary by using this item in a personal Map Device. Can only be used once.
Text.zh: 在私人地图装置中使用该物品，前往古藏宝库。只能被使用一次。

Text.en: You cannot do that at this time. Please wait for Tencent to validate your login.
Text.zh: 您正处于60秒安全保护时间或安全状态下, 暂时无法进行该操作, 请等待60秒或解锁后尝试。

Text.en: Item may not have a Mod of this type.
Text.zh: 该物品无法拥有此类词缀。

Text.en: Enchanting this item will replace the item's current enchantment. Would you like to proceed?
Text.zh: 对该物品附魔会覆盖其当前附魔，确认要继续附魔吗?

Text.en: This optional mode disables trade and party play for this character. You can convert it back to a regular character at any time.
Text.zh: 选择后该角色将无法交易和组队, 你可以在任何时刻将该角色转化为正常的可交易可组队角色。(但是正常已存在角色无法转化为独狼模式)

Text.en:
Are you sure you want to migrate this character and its items to its parent league? 
<colour:red>{This operation can not be undone.}
Text.zh:
您的确要将该角色及其物品都转入正常模式吗？
<colour:red>{该操作不可撤销。}

Text.en:
Are you sure you want to migrate <colour:red>{<bold>{ALL}} of your characters and their items, stash tabs, Hideouts, masters and Atlas state from this league to its parent league? If you are the <colour:red>{<bold>{leader of a guild}}, this will also migrate all of your guild's stashes.
<colour:red>{This operation can not be undone.}
Text.zh:

Text.en:
Use this Panel to switch God Powers
- You may only have one major and one minor God Power active at a given time.
- The Major Gods appear up the top.
- The Minor Gods appear below and are smaller than the Major Gods.

<default>{You can unlock new God Powers by defeating them in battle and can enhance
these Powers by capturing the souls of certain bosses in end game maps.
You can only change which God Powers you have active when in Towns or Hideouts.}
Text.zh:
使用该界面可以切换不同神力组合
- 你同时只能选择一种高阶神力和一种低阶神力
- 高阶神灵会显示在上方
- 低阶神灵会显示在下方并且较小

<default>{你可以通过击败这些神灵来解锁他们对应的神力
在地图装置中使用禁灵之瓶开启异界地图可以抓获BOSS之灵来强化神力
只能在城镇或藏身处才能切换神力组合}

Text.zh: 点击 "确认" 按钮确认你的选择

XBoxText.zh:

Text.en: You can't place a Hideout Decoration with an Item on your Cursor.
Text.zh: 你无法在光标上持有东西时放置装饰物

XBoxText.en:
By logging in, you agree to the Terms of Use.
Press <<xbox_button_rb>> to display.
XBoxText.zh:
登录游戏即表示您同意使用规范。
按下 <<xbox_button_rb>> 以显示。

Text.en:
In Path of Exile, all of your skills (other than your default attack) come from items called 'skill gems'. Skill gems must be socketed into your equipped weapons and armour in order for you to be able to use the skill they grant. It doesn't matter which item the gem is socketed into, but the socket has to match the colour of the gem. In other words, red skill gems can go in red sockets, and can't go in blue or green sockets.

Support gems work very similarly to skill gems, except they don't grant you a skill by themselves. Instead, support gems can augment the skill gems they are linked to. Not all skill and support gems work together; You can't use a 'Melee Physical Damage Support' with a spell, for example.
Text.zh:
在流亡之路中，你的所有技能(除了普通攻击)都是来自于「技能宝石」。要使用技能的能力，一定要将技能宝石镶嵌于武器和装备的宝石孔中。技能宝石无论插在哪个物品上都可以发挥效果，但一定要镶嵌于同样颜色的宝石孔中。举例：红色的技能宝石只能镶嵌于红色的宝石孔中，无法镶嵌于蓝色或绿色的宝石孔。

辅助宝石与技能宝石使用方法很相似，但它们无法直接给与你辅助效果。辅助宝石可以增强与他相连的技能宝石。并不是所有技能都可以和辅助宝石发挥效果。举例：近战物理伤害辅助与法术技能无法发挥效果。

Text.en:
For a support gem to properly augment a skill gem, both the skill and support gems must be socketed in linked sockets. If they aren't linked, the support will have no effect.

You can tell whether or not your support gem is affecting your skill gem by looking at the on-screen skill icon. Properly linked support gems add a little letter to the skill icon on the user interface. Most support gems also change the mana cost of the skills they're supporting.
Text.zh:
要让辅助宝石增强技能宝石，两者宝石孔必须要相连。若宝石孔没有相连，则辅助宝石将无法发挥效果。

你可以透过技能快捷键的视窗中确认辅助宝石是否有发挥效果。有效的辅助宝石会于技能图示中显示一个小字母。大多数的辅助宝石都会增加辅助技能的魔力消耗。

Text.en: You can add or remove your skill and support gems at any time, so don't be afraid to experiment with strange gem combinations.
Text.zh: 你可以在任何时候增加或移除技能和辅助宝石，所以不要害怕尝试各种宝石组合呦。

Text.en: Skill Gems II: Requirements and Restrictions
Text.zh: 技能宝石 II:  属性要求和限制

Text.en: Support and skill gems, like other items, have level and attribute requirements. Unlike other items, gems can level up, and when a gem levels up, its level and attribute requirements can change. If you level a gem past the point that you can use it, or if your attributes change and disable a gem, the entire item the gem is socketed in will also be disabled. That means it's worth checking whether or not you should level up gems that don't require your primary attributes. Sometimes it's better not to level up a gem!
Text.zh: 辅助和技能宝石和其他物品一样，有等级和装备的需求。但与其他物品不同的是，宝石可以升等，当宝石升等后，它的等级和装备需求都会改变。如果你将宝石升级至你无法使用的等级，或是你的能力改变导致宝石失效，则你镶嵌宝石的物品将会失去能力。这表示在升级宝石前，务必确认自己的等级和属性是否符合宝石升级后的需求。所以有时候最好别升级宝石呀!

Text.en: You may find that you want to use the same support gem for multiple skills. Simply socket that support in the same item as the skills you wish to support and make sure they are all linked. The support gem doesn't have to be adjacent to the skill gems you want to support; they just have to all be part of the same group of linked sockets. You may also find that you want the same skill to be supported by multiple support gems. The requirements for this are the same.
Text.zh: 你可能会发现你想要使用相同的辅助宝石辅助许多技能。你可以将你想要辅助的技能都镶嵌于辅助技能所在的物品中，但请确认物品宝石孔都是相连。辅助的技能不用与辅助宝石相邻一样可以获得辅助宝石的效果。你可能也会发现你的技能想要被多个辅助宝石辅助，则使用的方使与上述相同。

Text.en: Some support gems will significantly change the way the supported skills behave. A spell supported by the 'Spell Totem' support will now summon a totem to cast the spell for you, and you won't be able to cast the spell yourself. The same is true for the 'Trap' support and the two Mine supports, 'High-Impact Mine' and 'Blastchain Mine.'
Text.zh: 部分辅助宝石能改变被辅助技能的运作方式。例如【法术图腾】可以让你不再亲自施放被辅助的法术，而是召唤一个图腾代你施放。陷阱辅助宝石和高爆地雷及链爆地雷等地雷辅助宝石也是如此。

Text.en: Some support gems can be used to trigger a skill automatically. The 'Cast on Critical Strike Support' gem casts the spells it is supporting whenever you get a critical strike with an attack it is also supporting. Any spell supported this way can only be triggered and can no longer be cast manually, similar to how the Spell Totem Support works. Skills being supported by multiple trigger gems won't work at all. Keep this in mind when deciding which skills and supports you want to use.
Text.zh: 有些辅助宝石可以自动触发技能。「暴击时施放(辅)」宝石将会在你攻击暴击时，自动施放辅助的技能。当技能被此类型宝石辅助时，只能被触发无法在手动施放，就像是法术图腾一样。请谨记在心此技能串法喔。

Text.en: A skill gem's features can change when it levels up, including the requirements to use it.
Text.zh: 辅助宝石的效果和使用需求都可能在升级后发生变化。

Text.en: To the worthy go the spoils.

Text.zh: 移动停止, 紧张攀升。

Text.en: The heart quickens, the blood thickens.
Text.zh: 心跳加快, 血液粘滞。
通往伊泽洛出现的传送门。

Text.en:
Your character build is primarily composed of the items the character is wearing, the skill and support gems that are socketed within those items, and the passive skills you have chosen from the passive skill tree. Because the passive skill tree lays the groundwork for your items and gems, the passive skill tree is arguably the core of every character build. 

Whenever you level up, and upon completing certain quests, you'll get a passive skill point. Each point can be allocated on the passive skill tree to gain the benefits of the passive skill (often referred to as a 'passive') it is spent on.

You can only allocate points on passives that are connected to your other allocated passives. There are far, far more passive skills on the tree than you can ever allocate, so you need to think carefully about what you want to choose. It is often worth planning ahead.

There are three types of passive skill:
Text.zh:
你的角色配装主要由角色装备的物品, 物品内镶嵌的技能宝石和辅助宝石, 以及你所选择的天赋技能构成。由于天赋技能树决定了你的物品和宝石的效率, 所以天赋技能树可以说是每个角色配装的核心。

每次升级或是完成特定任务都可获得天赋技能点。在天赋技能树中花费点数, 即可习得给予角色增益的被动技能（也就是所谓的天赋技能）。

你只能将点数分配在与其他天赋技能连结的天赋技能上。天赋技能树中的技能数量非常多, 因此你需要慎重考虑要学习哪些技能。分配点数前最好考虑清楚。

天赋技能共有三种：

Text.en: Many clusters on the passive tree have 'Masteries' at their centres which signify the type of passives that cluster grants. Allocating any Notable in a cluster with a Mastery grants access to the 'Mastery passive.' Mastery passives provide a selection of one of many special stats related to the Mastery theme (e.g. Fire or Bow). Like regular passives, Masteries require a passive point to allocate. Mastery passives are shared across the tree, so Fire Masteries everywhere give the same selection of special stats. Special stats cannot be allocated more than once.
Text.zh: 在天赋树上，许多天赋群中间都有代表其特点的专精天赋。只要在天赋群里配置任意核心天赋就可以激活专精天赋。它可以提供一系列符合该天赋群特点的特殊数值（比如火焰，弓类等等）。专精天赋也需要花费一个天赋点才能配置，不过它们提供的数值表是全天赋树共用的，例如天赋树上任意火焰专精天赋都提供同一个表格。专精天赋提供的特殊数值只能选择一次。

Text.en:
The passive skill tree also contains jewel sockets. An allocated jewel socket can hold a jewel, but won't grant any sort of benefit by itself. Jewels cannot interact with Masteries.

The edges of the passive skill tree are also home to Large jewel sockets, these can hold Cluster jewels as well as regular jewels.
Text.zh:
天赋树上也有珠宝插槽。配置珠宝插槽可以使其容纳一个珠宝，但珠宝插槽本身不提供任何加成。珠宝也不能激活专精天赋。

天赋树边缘往往有可以容纳大型星团珠宝的珠宝槽。

Text.en:
The tree is shared by all of the character classes, but each class begins in a different location. Learning what is near each starting location will help you plan out future characters.

You can undo your choices with the passive refund points you get from certain quests and from using Orbs of Regret. You can only undo a single point per refund point, so if you plan on making changes later, make sure you can afford to do so.
Text.zh:
所有职业均有同样的天赋技能树, 但每个职业在天赋技能树中的起点却不同。了解每个角色在天赋技能树中的起点, 能帮助你更好地培养角色。

你可以通过花费在特定任务或是后悔石中获得的天赋技能重置点数来重置天赋点数。每个重置点数可重置一点天赋点数, 因此如果你想在游戏后期重置技能, 请确保自己有足够的重置点数。

Text.en: Items, monsters, strongboxes, and later even maps, can all have different rarities. Something's rarity determines what properties it has. Generally, something that is 'magic' is stronger than something that is 'normal', and something that is 'rare' is stronger than something that is 'magic'. This is achieved through random modifiers, or 'mods'.
Text.zh: 物品、怪物、保险箱甚至后期的地图的稀有度都不尽相同。稀有度决定了其价值。一般来说“魔法”的物品要比“普通”的物品强大, 而“稀有”的物品则比“魔法”的物品更强大。修正属性或是“修正”会变更稀有度。

Text.en: Rarity determines how many mods something can have. Magic rarity typically imbues something with either one or two mods, while most rares can get up to six.
Text.zh: 稀有度决定了某物可拥有的修正数量。魔法稀有度的物品一般能拥有一个或是两个修正, 高稀有度物品最多能有六个修正。

Text.en:
If you're lucky, you may also find something that is of 'unique' rarity. Unique items always have the same mods, but those mods can be very different to the ones you find on magics and rares.

For example, this unique staff changes how your projectiles work:
Text.zh:
如果你够幸运，你可以发现传奇稀有度的物品。传奇道具的词缀都一样，但这些词缀都会与魔法和稀有道具非常不同。

举例来说，传奇物品可以改变你的投射物运作方式：

Text.en: Many unique items come with a downside, or provide specialised or conditional power without staple mods, such as elemental resistances or life. As a result, using many unique items doesn't necessarily always benefit you! Unique items also have their own special art, names and flavour text.
Text.zh: 许多传奇物品都会有缺点，或是提供某方面强大的能力而不提供基础词缀，像是元素抗性或生命。所以并不是使用传奇装备就可以让自己变强！传奇物品都会有自己专属的美术图和寓意文字。

Text.en: When people talk about 'uniques', they are usually referring to unique items, but there are also unique strongboxes, maps, and monsters throughout Path of Exile. Major content updates usually includes a number of new uniques.
Text.zh: 当大家提到「传奇」时，多半是在讲传奇装备，但流亡之路中还有传奇保险箱、传奇地图和传奇怪物。大改版时通常都会有许多新的传奇道具。

Text.en: Normal, Magic, Rare and Unique rarities are indicated by the colour of the name.
Text.zh: 普通，魔法，稀有和传奇的名字显示对应的颜色。

Text.en: Each rarity tier has certain properties.
Text.zh: 每个稀有度都有某些效果。

Text.en: Some unique items provide utility at the cost of raw stats, or only fully work when certain conditions are met.
Text.zh: 有些传奇物品只能在原始状态下才能发挥效果，或是达成某些条件。

Text.en: Stats and Mods I: How Are They Calculated?
Text.zh: 状态和词缀 I:它们是如何计算的？
'额外增加总量'和'额外减少总量'

Text.en: Your Path of Exile character is primarily built from a combination of passive skills, skill gems, and items. Both the passive tree and the items can seem overwhelming at first, so in this tutorial we will cover some of the basics.
Text.zh: 流放之路的角色流派，主要由天赋、技能宝石和装备组合而成。天赋树和装备乍看之下可能会使人感到无助，故在此引导中，我们将介绍相关的基础知识让流亡者们了解。

Text.en: The most important thing to know is how the passive tree interacts with your character. In general, passive skills affect all the relevant stats on your character, regardless of where they come from. We call these global modifiers.
Text.zh: 你一定要知道你的天赋对你的角色有什么效果。一般来说，天赋影响到角色所有有关的能力，无论他的来源是什么。我们可以称呼这些为「全域词缀」。

Text.en: In the example above, we see that the 'increased maximum life' passives add together before they affect the character's life. Most passive skills, especially any that use the word 'increased', act this way.
Text.zh: 从上面的例子，增加生命上限的天赋会先全部加总，再增加到角色的生命。大多数的天赋都是这样运作的。

Text.en: Passives that specifically say they grant 'more' or 'less' of something are the exceptions to the above rule. These are applied after all of the increases, acting like multipliers. Unlike passives which increase something, passives which provide 'more' or 'less' of something never add together and instead each apply their multiplicative effect separately. These terms appear on Keystones in the passive skill tree, but are most commonly seen on support gems.
Text.zh: 如果天赋中有特别说明获得「额外增加总量」或者「额外减少总量」什么的话，则不适用此规则。这将会于加总全部的增加词缀后再套用此词缀，像是加成的效果。不像增加词缀会先加总，「额外增加总量」词缀会用相乘的方式计算。在辅助宝石上很常见此方式。

Text.en: Item mods tend to come in two varieties: 'global mods', which act like the passive skills, and 'local mods', which affect the item itself. Compare the weapons below, and note that the magic weapon (on the right) has 'Increased Physical Damage'. You'll see that the weapon's Physical Damage is higher, and is a different colour. It is this number that is used when other modifiers, such as your passive skills, are used to calculate how much damage your attacks deal.
Text.zh: 物品词缀会有两种分类：「全域」词缀作用方式与天赋一样，而「局部」词缀则只会作用于装备本身。比较下列的武器，并且注意魔法武器(右边)有「增加物理伤害」词缀。你可以看到这件武器的物理攻击比较高而且是不同颜色。这表示数字被其他词缀作用，像是你的天赋，这将会计算出你的攻击造成多伤害。

Text.en:
The same is true for increases to armour on items that naturally provide armour, or increases to evasion on items that naturally provide evasion, and so on.  
			
Some mods, such as 'Increased Attack Speed', can appear on both weapons and armour. Like the Increased Physical Damage modifier, the Increased Attack Speed on the weapon shown below is local to the weapon, and changes that specific weapon's rate of attack. The gloves shown below also have Increased Attack Speed, but they affect any weapon you are holding and use the Attacks Per Second value displayed on the weapon to calculate how quickly you attack.
Text.zh:
物品上有增加护甲词缀和增加闪避词缀就是直接增加护甲和闪避。

例如「增加攻击速度」词缀会出现在武器和护甲上。像增加物理伤害词缀，武器上的增加攻击速度词缀，只会作用于此武器上改变武器的攻击速度。手套若是有增加攻击速度词缀，他们会作用于任何你装备的武器，并且将计算出来的攻击速度呈现在武器上。

Text.en:
The attack speed mod on these gloves is a global modifier, so it adds together with other global increases to attack speed, including those on your passive tree.
 
As a general rule (though there are occasional exceptions), if the values in the top section of an item are different to the normal basetype, they are benefitting from local modifiers. If a modifier on an item doesn't seem to be affecting anything in the top section, then it is global.

See if you can work out which mods are local and which mods are global in the image below.
Text.zh:
手套上攻击速度词缀是全域词缀，所以它会先与其他的全域增加攻击速度词缀加总，包括在天赋树上的词缀。

一般来说(虽然会有些例外)

Text.en: This character has been granted life from their Iron Ring, as well as from their first passive skill. They also gained life simply by levelling up.
Text.zh: 此角色通过珊瑚戒指和起初的天赋获得生命。也可以通过升等级获得生命。

Text.en: By taking these two passive skills, this character also gains 4% and 5% increased maximum life. These add to a total of 9% increased maximum life.
Text.zh: 取得这两点天赋点，此角色获得 4% 和 5% 生命上限。总共增加 9% 生命上限。

Text.en: The global modifier (increased maximum life) increases all sources of maximum life, and after rounding, we land on this character's final life value.
Text.zh: 全域词缀（增加生命）会增加所有生命的来源，在四舍五入后决定角色的生命值。

Text.en: The Full Scale Armour has one local mod (increased Armour and Evasion) and one global mod (Lightning Resistance). The Steel Gauntlets also have one local mod (increased Armour) and one global mod (increased Attack Speed). The Sharktooth Claw's increased Attack Speed mod is local, and so is the implicit (life gained on hit).
Text.zh: 连身鳞甲拥有一条区域词缀(增加护甲和闪避)和一条全域词缀(闪电抗性)。冷钢护手拥有一条区域词缀(增加护甲)和一条全域词缀(增加攻击速度)。鲨颚爪的增加攻击速度词缀为区域词缀，固定词缀也是属于区域词缀（击中回复生命）。

Text.en: Glossary of Common Game and Player Terms
Text.zh: 常用游戏和玩家术语词汇

Text.en: A section of Path of Exile's main story. Each act has a Town, quests, and a story arc contained within it.
Text.zh: 流放之路主线故事的一部分。每个章节都有一个城镇、任务和自己的故事。

Text.en: Any skill that performs an action is an active skill. Most skill gems provide you with an active skill.
Text.zh: 只要技能有呈现动作就是主动技能。每个技能宝石，甚至一些辅助宝时都会提供你主动技能。

Text.en: The modifiers (or mods) that are randomly assigned to items. A magic item can have two affixes; one prefix and one suffix. Most rare items can have six; three prefixes and three suffixes.
Text.zh: 词缀会随机配置于物品中。魔法物品最多可以有两个词缀；一个前缀和一个后缀。稀有物品最多可以有六个词缀；三个前缀和三个后缀。

Text.en: [Bleeding], [Ignite], [Chill], [Freeze], [Shock] and [Poison]. [Ailments] can be removed by certain charms, or negated by items or passive skills.
Text.zh: 即[Bleeding|流血]、[Ignite|点燃]、[Chill|冰缓]、[Freeze|冻结]、[Shock|感电]、[Poison|中毒]。[Ailments|异常状态]可以被特定咒符移除，也可以被物品或天赋抵消。

Text.en: The area in which a skill has an effect. A fireball's explosion has a small area of effect, while the secondary effect of Earthquake has a large area of effect.
Text.zh: 技能于范围内作用。火球技能爆炸时会造成小的效果区域。地震技能的二阶段有大的效果区域。

Text.en: The primary defensive stat from Strength-based equipment. Armour reduces the damage taken from physical attack and spell hits.
Text.zh: 力量基底的装备主要的防御手段为护甲。护甲会减少物理攻击和法术击中时所造成的伤害。

Text.en: A specialised subclass unlocked via the Labyrinth.
Text.zh: 透过帝王迷宫来解锁的特殊副职业。

Text.en: One of the main skill types. With few exceptions, attacks use your weapon to calculate damage. Any skill gem with the "Attack" tag is an attack. Attacks can be both ranged and melee, and items and passive skills can affect ranged attacks or melee attacks exclusively. Some attacks, such as Spectral Throw, use a melee weapon but are not considered melee.
Text.zh: 主要技能类型之一。任何技能宝石标有「攻击」标签则为此类型技能。攻击技能有远距离和近战，装备和天赋都可以分别影响这两个类型。有些攻击技能，像「灵体投掷」虽然使用近战武器，但就不被列为近战技能。

Text.en: Strength, Dexterity and Intelligence. Most items have an attribute requirement.
Text.zh: 力量，敏捷和智慧。大多数物品有一个装备属性要求。

Text.en: A persistent field of an effect. If you step outside of an aura's radius, you won't be affected by it. Auras are also a specific set of skills that frequently reserve a portion of mana.
Text.zh: 在范围内会一直作用效果。如果踏出光环范围外，就不再获得光环的效果。使用光环时通常都会需要魔力保留。

Text.en: A group of monsters that are summoned, under certain conditions, when many enemies are slain in close proximity.
Text.zh: 在某些特定状态下，当击杀成群的敌人，可以召唤出一群强大的怪物。

Text.en: A strong unique enemy. Every non-unique map has one or more map bosses, and every act has one or more act bosses.
Text.zh: 一个强大的传奇敌人。每张非传奇地图都会有一只或更多头目。每个章节也都会有一只或更多章节头目。

Text.en: Visible as a clawed hand reaching out of the ground. Breaches grow in size and fill with monsters for a period of time. The more monsters slain within a breach, the longer the breach will remain open and continue to grow in size.
Text.zh: 像个魔爪从地面伸出来。启动后裂隙范围会成长，且范围内充满了裂隙怪物。击杀越多的裂隙怪物，裂隙开启的时间就会越长，直至最大范围。

Text.en: The way a character is played or intended to be played. Eg. A Tornado Shot build uses Tornado shot as its primary skill, and most of the items and passive skills serve to improve the effectiveness of Tornado Shot.
Text.zh: 角色进行游戏的方式和玩法。例如：龙卷射击流派使用龙卷射击技能做为主要攻击技能，而使用的物品和天赋大多是来增强龙卷射击的威力。

Text.en: One of the five damage types, along with Physical, Fire, Cold and Lightning. Chaos damage bypasses Energy Shield by default.
Text.zh: 和火焰、冰冷、闪电、物理伤害一样，为五种伤害属性的其中之一。混沌伤害将无视护盾。

Text.en: Usually refers to the Marauder, Duelist, Ranger, Shadow, Witch, Templar and Scion playable characters.
Text.zh: 一般指野蛮人、女巫、游侠、圣堂武僧、决斗者、暗影刺客、贵族、七位可游玩角色。

Text.en:
May refer to one of several things: Frenzy, Endurance, and Power Charges, which can be gained from items or skills, and which grant significant boosts to damage and attack/cast speed, damage reduction and resistances, and critical strike chance respectively. 

Charge may also refer to Flask charges, which determine how many uses a flask has. Flask charges are regained primarily by slaying monsters.

Charge can also reference the number of uses a skill has, such as some trap skills or Vaal skills that can store enough souls for multiple uses.
Text.zh:
可能指如下一种：狂怒球、耐力球和暴击球。它们可以通过物品和技能获取，大幅提升伤害、加快攻击速度和施法速度；提高伤害减免和抗性；或者提升暴击率。

除此之外就是药剂充能，它能决定药剂使用次数。击败怪物可以定期回复药剂充能。

它同样可以指某些技能的使用次数，例如部分需要充能的陷阱技能或利用灵魂多次施放的瓦尔技能等。

Text.en: One of the five damage types, along with Fire, Lightning, Physical and Chaos. Cold damage can chill and freeze by default.
Text.zh: 和火焰、混沌、闪电、物理伤害一样，为五种伤害属性的其中之一。冰霜伤害能够冻结、冰缓敌人。

Text.en: One of the mysterious forces that is causing the dead to rise and life to mutate on Wraeclast. Also refers to the act of using a Vaal Orb on an item to change its properties. A corrupted item cannot be further modified.
Text.zh: 散布于瓦尔克拉斯的神秘能量，使死者复苏，生者突变。同时指使用「瓦尔石」在物品上使其污染的动作。已污染的物品将无法进一步修改属性。

Text.en: The act of changing or creating an item. This can be done through the use of the various Orbs, Essences and Hideout crafting benches.
Text.zh: 更改或创造一个物品。使用各种天球、精髓和藏身处的工作台均可完成。

Text.en: Usually refers to the various Orb items such as the Chaos Orb.
Text.zh: 一般指游戏中各式各样的「石头」，例如：混沌石、崇高石、瓦尔石、护甲片、磨刀石、点金石等等。

Text.en: An alternate Defence introduced in the Expedition League. Ward intercepts an amount of Damage taken from a single Hit, up to the total amount of Ward you have, before that Damage would be taken from your Energy Shield or Life. When this happens, Ward Breaks, and will be Restored after a short delay. Ward has no effect on further Hits while it remains Broken, but such Hits will also not reset the delay before it is Restored.
Text.zh: 结界是先祖秘藏赛季推出的一种新防御手段。它可以拦截单次攻击的部分伤害（最大不超过结界的总值），在被能量护盾或生命承受前将其抵消。一旦承受了伤害，结界就会破碎，在一小段时间后自动恢复。在其破碎期间，结界不会对接下来受到的攻击产生效果，但这些攻击也不会重置它的恢复时间。

Text.en: Damage that occurs over a period of time without a 'hit'. Eg. Standing on burning ground, or the poison component of Viper Strike.
Text.zh: 没有「击中」但在特定时间内持续发生的伤害。例如：站立于燃烧地面、或者毒蛇打击所附加的中毒效果。

Text.en:
Armour, Energy Shield and Evasion are the three main defences. These are found on most non-weapon equippable items.

Ward is also a defence, and can be found on certain pieces of armour obtained from Expeditions and the Iron Flask.
Text.zh:
护甲、能量护盾和闪避是三种主要防御手段。它们出现在绝大多数非武器类装备上。

结界也是一种防御手段，它们出现在先祖秘藏赛季的护甲和坚铁药剂上。

Text.en: One of the three attributes, along with Strength and Intelligence. Dexterity passively grants some Accuracy and increases your Evasion.
Text.zh: 和力量与智慧一样，为三项属性的其中之一。敏捷能够提升你的角色命中和闪避数值。

Text.en: A type of item that can be turned in at Tasuni in Highgate or Lilly Roth in your Hideout for the reward written on the card. Each of these was designed by a Path of Exile supporter.
Text.zh: 这种物品可以在统治者之殿的达苏尼和你藏身处的丽莉·罗斯处兑换牌面上的物品。它们都是由流放之路的社区玩家创作的。

Text.en: The primary defensive stat from Intelligence-based equipment. Energy Shield protects Life from all damage types except Chaos by default. Energy Shield also rapidly recovers after a period of taking no damage.
Text.zh: 智慧基底的装备主要的防御手段为护盾。护盾会保护生命值不受到任何除了混沌伤害以外的伤害。护盾在没有受到伤害一段时间后会迅速的回复。

Text.en: Weapons, shields, helmets, body armours, boots, gloves, rings, amulets, and belts all count as equipment.
Text.zh: 包括武器、盾牌、头盔、护甲、靴子、手套、戒指、项链和腰带。

Text.en: The primary defensive stat from Dexterity-based equipment. Evasion provides a chance to ignore incoming attacks. Evasion provides no benefit against spells.
Text.zh: 敏捷基底的装备主要的防御手段为闪避值。闪避值提供能够无视攻击的机率，闪避值对法术无效。

Text.en: Any NPC who was exiled from Oriath. Each of the player characters is also an Exile.
Text.zh: 任何被奥瑞亚逐出的人，玩家也属于流放者。

Text.en: One of the five damage types, along with Cold, Lightning, Physical and Chaos. Fire damage can ignite by default.
Text.zh: 和冰霜、混沌、闪电、物理伤害一样，为五种伤害属性的其中之一。火焰伤害能够点燃敌人。

Text.en: An item type that sits in the flask slots and is used to gain some effect on the player character, such as restoring life or mana, or gaining a temporary buff. Flasks are refilled by slaying monsters, or returning to a Town or Hideout.
Text.zh: 放置于药水栏的道具，给玩家角色使用可以获得不同的效果，例如回复生命或魔力，获得临时性增益效果等等。击败怪物或返回城镇和藏身处后，药剂都会自动充能。

Text.en: The Town in Act 2 that is sitting atop the river.
Text.zh: 第 2 章的城镇坐落在河边。

Text.en: May refer to Skill Gems or Support Gems. Not to be confused with Jewels.
Text.zh: 指技能宝石或者辅助宝石。和珠宝不同。

Text.en: A mod which affects more than just the item it is on.
Text.zh: 影响范围不限于所属物品的词缀。

Text.en: A collection of players that have access to a shared chat channel and a shared stash. Guilds can also have Guild Tags, a sequence of letters that represents which guild they are a part of.
Text.zh: 可以访问共享聊天频道和共享仓库的玩家集合。 公会也可以有公会标签，一系列的字母代表他们是哪一个公会的一部分。

Text.en: An area owned by the player that can house Masters and crafting benches, and can be decorated and altered by the player. Hideouts are shared across all characters on the same league and account.
Text.zh: 玩家自有的空间，能够自行布置，收留大师和他们的工艺台。每个赛季区的藏身处是互通的。

Text.en: Any object that can be moved and placed within a Hideout.
Text.zh: 藏身处里的任何物品都可以移动摆放。

Text.en: The Town on Mount Veruso, first encountered in Act 4.
Text.zh: 第 4 章会首先遇到维鲁索山上的城镇。

Text.en: The mod that appears above the randomly generated mods on an item. This is guaranteed by the basetype that the implicit is on, but can be changed by a few different sources. The most common way to change an implicit is by using a Vaal Orb (see Corruption).
Text.zh: 显示于物品随机生成词缀上方的固定属性，这条词缀会根据不同类型的物品而定。虽然一般来说是固定的，但流放之路中存在能更改固定词缀的方式，例如：瓦尔石（参考：腐化）

Text.en: One of the three attributes, along with Strength and Dexterity. Intelligence passively grants some Mana and increases your Energy Shield.
Text.zh: 和敏捷与力量一样，为三项属性的其中之一。智慧能够提升你的角色魔力和护盾。

Text.en: An item that can be socketed in the passive tree.
Text.zh: 一种能够镶入天赋树的物品类型。

Text.en: Usually refers to rings and amulets. Sometimes also includes belts and jewels.
Text.zh: 一般指戒指、项链、腰带、宝珠。

Text.en: One of the very large passive skills on the passive tree. Keystones drastically change the function of your character, and often come with a drawback.
Text.zh: 天赋树中最显眼的一系列天赋点，会从根本上改变一个角色的战斗风格以及各项配置。 它通常会有一项正面的增益效果，并搭配上一项负面的减益效果。

Text.en: A long, difficult dungeon that grants the player Ascendancy points upon completion. The layout changes every day.
Text.zh: 困难且复杂的迷宫，完成后能够获得升华点数。迷宫的配置随每日改变。

Text.en: Usually refers to items that have mods, mod values or other features that cannot be obtained through normal means anymore. May refer to the Legacy challenge league, which ran in 2017.
Text.zh: 所谓不朽物品，是指该物品拥有目前已经无法再取得的词缀。也可能指2017年的不朽挑战模式。

Text.en: Players and some items have levels, used to track the progress or strength of a range of features.
Text.zh: 玩家和某些物品都有等级，主要用来分辨进度或者强度。

Text.en: Determines whether your character is alive or dead. If your life falls to zero, you're dead.
Text.zh: 决定你的角色生死，若你的生命消耗至零，你将会死亡。

Text.en: One of the five damage types, along with Fire, Cold, Physical and Chaos. Lightning damage can shock by default.
Text.zh: 和冰霜、火焰、混沌、物理伤害一样，为五种伤害属性的其中之一。闪电伤害能够使敌人感电。

Text.en: The bridge between two sockets on an item, that allows skill gems to be supported by support gems.
Text.zh: 物品上插槽与插槽间的桥梁，使辅助技能宝石和技能宝石能够互相影响。

Text.en: The remains of a fortress that now acts as the Town in Act 1.
Text.zh: 现在第 1 章的城镇是一处要塞的遗迹。

Text.en: Any mod that only affects the properties of the item it is on, and not the character as a whole.
Text.zh: 任何只影响物品上属性而非整体角色的词缀。

Text.en: A keyword that denotes that a mechanic that has some randomness will be checked twice, and the best outcome of the two checks will be used.
Text.zh: 所谓幸运，是指某个变数在系统随机产生两次结果后，选择使用对流放者较有利的结果。

Text.en: One of the tiers of rarity. Things that are of Magic rarity are tinted or coloured blue.
Text.zh: 物品稀有度的等阶之一，魔法物品的名称将会显示为蓝色。

Text.en: The primary resource for using skills, represented by the Blue orb on the UI.
Text.zh: 使用技能的主要资源，在玩家界面上透过蓝色球状物表示。

Text.en: Usually refers to the Map item type, which can be used in a Map Device to enter an area that is imbued with the mods that were present on the map when it was used. May also refer to the navigation tool on the UI.
Text.zh: 一般指一种道具类型，能够透过地图装置使用开启带有各种词缀的地区。同使可能指游戏中的地图界面。

Text.en: Any one of the NPCs which you encounter in the world and have special side missions for you to complete.
Text.zh: 你在世界中遇到的，为你提供支线任务的 NPC

Text.en: Refers to the use of the crafting bench available in your Hideout.
Text.zh: 指在藏身处使用工艺工作台。

Text.en: Any attack which is not ranged. Typically very close-range.
Text.zh: 任何非远程的攻击。一般来说范围很近。

Text.en: A stationary object that can be placed and detonated by the player.
Text.zh: 静止的物体，玩家能够放置并且引爆。

Text.en: Usually refers to Mirror of Kalandra, the rarest currency item. A Mirrored item cannot be modified.
Text.zh: 一般指「卡兰德的魔镜」，游戏中最为稀有的通货物品。被复制的物品将无法进一步修改。

Text.en: Short for Modifier. Anything that modifies an item, area or skill is a mod.
Text.zh: 任何能够改变/修正物品、地区、技能、角色效果的属性，皆称为词缀。

Text.en: Short for Microtransaction. Usually refers to the cosmetic effects for sale in the shop.
Text.zh: 能够通过商城取得的外观效果。

Text.en: One of the rarity tiers. Normal items have no special qualities and appear white or uncoloured.
Text.zh: 物品稀有度的等阶之一，普通物品的名称将会显示为白色，并且没有特殊效果。

Text.en: Passive skills that are smaller than keystones but larger than most other passives. Notables usually provide strong benefits.
Text.zh: 关键天赋点比一般的天赋点大，比关键天赋大点小，具有较特殊的名字且提供较多的能力。

Text.en: Short for non-player character. Includes any character that can be talked to or traded with, but usually doesn't refer to enemies.
Text.zh: 包含任何能够互动的非玩家角色，一般不是敌人。

Text.en: The small, sole-surviving city of the now defunct Sarn Empire. Each player character was exiled from Oriath.
Text.zh: 萨恩帝国唯一残存下的城市。每位流放者都是从奥瑞亚流放出来的。

Text.en: The powers obtained from major and minor gods are stored and selected on the Pantheon screen.
Text.zh: 从主神和次神取得的神之力会显示在万神殿界面中。

Text.en: Any group of two or more players that have joined forces. Players in a party all gain experience from slain monsters if they're close enough, and can chat to one another.
Text.zh: 任两位以上玩家一同冒险。组队中的玩家皆可获得击杀怪物所获得的经验，他们也能够在队伍中聊天交流。

Text.en: Anything you can assign a passive skill point to. Passive skills provide incremental benefits for the player character.
Text.zh: 任何能够使用天赋点数启用的效果。天赋能够使你的角色越来越强大。

Text.en: The area surrounding Sarn, named for one of Sarn's early emperors.
Text.zh: 萨恩城周边地带，以萨恩较早期的帝王命名。

Text.en: One of the five damage types, along with Fire, Cold, Lightning, and Chaos. Physical damage has no special features by default.
Text.zh: 和冰霜、火焰、混沌、闪电伤害一样，为五种伤害属性的其中之一。物理伤害没有其他特殊的效果。

Text.en: Created by using a Portal Scroll. Most portals take players to the nearest Town.
Text.zh: 使用传送卷轴创建。大多数传送门将玩家传送到最近的城镇。

Text.en: One of the Affix categories. Prefixes are typically stronger than suffixes.
Text.zh: 词缀的类型。一般来说前缀相较下比后缀来的强大。

Text.en: An attack or spell component which travels without being connected to the casting or attacking player.
Text.zh: 法术或攻击的一部分，包含任何在飞行中不和施法或攻击者相连的物体。

Text.en: Improves the effectiveness of weapon, equipment, skill gems, support gems, and other items. Quality is usually limited to 20%.
Text.zh: 品质会增加武器、装备、技能宝石、辅助宝石和其他物品的效果。一般来说品质的上限为20%。

Text.en: A task which either forwards the story or rewards the player upon completion. Questgivers are indicated by a yellow '!' above their head.
Text.zh: 任务，一般来说会推进故事进度，或者提供给玩家奖励。当NPC头上显示黄色「！」表示该NPC有任务需要你的协助。

Text.en: One of the rarity tiers. Rare items typically have up to six random mods. Rares are coloured or tinted yellow.
Text.zh: 物品稀有度的等阶之一，稀有物品的名称将会显示为黄色，并且能拥有至多六条随机词缀。

Text.en: The term used to describe how many mods an item can have, or how strong an enemy is. There are four rarity tiers: Normal, Magic, Rare and Unique.
Text.zh: 一般指物品能拥有几条词缀，或者敌人多强大。物品稀有度阶级一共分四个等阶：普通、魔法、稀有、传奇。

Text.en: A keyword which is short for "within the last four seconds".
Text.zh: 关键词近期内指「过去 4 秒内」。

Text.en: Used to calculate the amount of damage dealt or taken by sources of Fire, Cold, Lightning or Chaos damage.
Text.zh: 用来计算受到或者造成的各种属性伤害，包含火焰、冰霜、闪电、混沌。

Text.en: An enemy, usually clad in Microtransactions, that attacks with skills commonly used by players. Rogue Exiles drop an item from each equipment slot.
Text.zh: 敌人的一种，穿着华丽的商城物品，大多使用一般玩家会使用的技能。击败盗贼流放者后他将掉落所有部位装备各一件。

Text.en: The capital city of the Eternal Empire, and the primary location for Act 3.
Text.zh: 位于第 3 章的主要城镇。永恒帝国的首都。

Text.en: The source of most active skills. Skill gems, when socketed in weapons or armour, grant a skill. This skill can be augmented by linking the skill gem with a support gem.
Text.zh: 主动技能的来源。当你将技能宝石插入武器或装备的插槽时你将获得该技能。此技能可以通过辅助宝石进一步增加效果。

Text.en: A slot where a Skill or Support gem can be placed in weapons or armour. The passive tree also has sockets, however these sockets can only hold jewels.
Text.zh: 位于武器或者装备上的「孔」，能够将技能宝石、辅助宝石插入。天赋树中也存有珠宝插槽，但天赋树中的珠宝插槽只能够插入宝珠。

Text.en: One of the main skill types. Any skill gem with the "spell" or "cast" tag is a spell. Spells are unaffected by anything that affects attacks, unless an item or skill specifically says otherwise. Spells can create things that attack (such as Raise Zombie) but do not themselves count as attacks.
Text.zh: 主要技能类型之一。任何技能宝石标有「法术」标签则为此类型技能。法术不受到任何攻击的词缀影响，除非该物品有特别说明。法术能够创造出能够攻击的物件（像是魔卫复苏）但不代表该法术属于攻击技能。

Text.en: The primary way to store items and pass them between characters is via the stash. The stash can be expanded by purchasing stash tabs in the microtransaction shop.
Text.zh: 储藏和同帐号角色之间物品交流的主要手段。前往商城能购买仓库扩充页。

Text.en: One of the three attributes, along with Dexterity and Intelligence. Strength passively grants some life and melee physical damage.
Text.zh: 和敏捷与智慧一样，为三项属性的其中之一。力量能够提升你的角色生命和近战物理伤害。

Text.en: A special kind of chest that can be modified with Currency. Almost all strongboxes are guarded by several packs of monsters, and cannot be opened until those monsters have been slain.
Text.zh: 可使用通货道具修改的箱子。几乎所有的保险箱都受到怪物守护着，必须清光这些怪物保险箱才会顺利开启。

Text.en: One of the two main affix groups. Suffixes tend to be weaker than prefixes. On Magic items and monsters, suffixes can be seen as the last part of the item's name (such as 'of Heat' or 'of Calm')
Text.zh: 两种主要词缀的其中之一，相较前缀较为弱势。

Text.en: Used to modify the behaviour, cost, and power of skill gems. Support gems have no effect by themselves and must be linked to a skill gem to have any effect.
Text.zh: 能够使技能宝石的特性、消耗、强度产生变化。一般来说辅助宝石本身不带有任何效果，必须与技能宝石连结才能够显现出它的价值。

Text.en: Any player who purchases a Supporter Pack or other microtransaction from the shop. Supporters keep the Path of Exile developers fed and happy. We love supporters!
Text.zh: 曾购买任何赞助者包或者商城道具的玩家。赞助者是流放之路的制作团队的衣食父母，也让制作团队开心，我们超爱赞助者的。

Text.en: One of the past challenge leagues. Tempest is also the name of the signature effect of the Tempest challenge league. Tempests create fields around the world that influence player and monster behaviours, such as shrinking them or granting a speed boost.
Text.zh: 过去其中一期赛季的名称。风暴会在区域中产生并对区域中的怪物和流放者们造成诸多变异，例如改变体型大小、造成伤害、改变掉宝率、甚至使掉落的武器自动幻化。

Text.en: A stationary object that can cast spells or attack remotely. Unlike traps and mines, totems have a life pool akin to minions. Unlike minions, totems can't typically move around, and are unaffected by minion modifiers.
Text.zh: 静止的物体，能够远端施放法术或攻击。和陷阱和地雷不同的是，图腾有自己的生命值，并且不会受到怪物词缀的影响。

Text.en: Any location other than a Hideout where players can buy, sell, and stash items. Towns also contain quest-givers and other NPCs.
Text.zh: 除了藏身处，玩家可以在任何地点购买、贩卖、储存物品。城镇里还有任务发布者和其他 NPC。

Text.en: The act of exchanging one good for another, typically between two players (rather than between a player and an NPC). There is a trade chat channel designed to allow players to advertise their items for sale.
Text.zh: 指玩家与玩家间的物品交换。游戏中设有交易频道，让玩家有专门的通道能够与其他玩家交易。

Text.en:
A stationary object that, when triggered, can attack or cast a spell. Traps break after they have been triggered, and can be easily destroyed by enemy attacks and spells, however they are also very difficult to see. 

May also refer to the traps in the Labyrinth which serve as damaging obstacles.
Text.zh:
静止难以察觉的物体，被触发后能够攻击或者施放法术。陷阱在触发或者被敌人攻击/法术击中后会遭到破坏。

也可以参考迷宫中的陷阱，这些陷阱是有害的障碍。

Text.en:
Typically refers to items or skill or support gems that cast a spell or deal an attack without the player's direct input. 'Cast on Critical Strike Support' is an example of a Trigger gem.

May also refer to the act of setting off a Trap.
Text.zh: 一般指某些不需要玩家直接使用的技能或辅助宝石。（例如：「暴击时施放(辅)」就是典型触发类的辅助宝石）

Text.en: One of the rarity tiers. Uniques do not have randomly generated names or mods, setting them apart from the other rarity tiers. Unique monsters are typically very strong, while unique items can provide a wide range of effects not available on other items.
Text.zh: 物品稀有度的等阶之一。和其他等阶的物品不同，传奇物件没有随机生成的名称或词缀。传奇怪物一般来说非常强大，传奇物品则会提供众多其他其他道具上不会出现的特殊效果。

Text.en: The oldest known culture on Wraeclast. The Vaal were the first known users of the gems, and their ruins are scattered across the land. Traces of the Vaal can be seen most notably in Act 2, and in the corrupted side areas. Vaal may also refer to the act of "Vaaling" an item -- using a Vaal orb on an item to corrupt it.
Text.zh: 瓦尔克拉斯最古老的文明，是古灵宝石最早的使用者。他们的遗迹四散在各个地区，尤其在第二章节中更能够找到瓦尔的踪迹。瓦尔同时也代表使用瓦尔石「瓦」某些物品使该物品受到腐化的动作。

Text.en:
Typically refers to the act of selling an item at an NPC for scraps and fragments.

May also refer to the NPC themselves.
Text.zh: 一般指将物品贩卖给商人换取各种通货碎片的行为。

Text.en: A stacking effect that grants offensive attack bonuses for each stack. Stacks will be lost over time if you avoid combat for too long.
Text.zh: 一种可以堆叠的效果，每叠一层都可以为你提供攻击性奖励。脱战一段时间后就会逐渐消失。

Text.en: A subset of skills that are not attacks or spells, and thus are unaffected by things that ordinarily affect attacks and spells. The potency of any Warcry skill is affected by how many enemies are nearby when it is used.
Text.zh: 不属于攻击也不是法术的一系列技能，也因此不受到一般会影响攻击与法术的词缀所影响。战吼的效力主要基于使用时附近怪物的数量。

Text.en: The primary way of saving your progress through the world of Path of Exile. Waypoints allow travel to any other waypoint that you have previously found.
Text.zh: 流放之路中主要纪录进度的方式，传送点使你能够在已经开启的传送点之间互相传送。

Text.en: A type of item that can only be equipped in the main-hand and off-hand slots. Weapons are a major factor in the damage dealt by most attacks, and can also influence which skills you can or cannot use.
Text.zh: 一系列只能够装备于武器栏位的物品，是大多攻击造成伤害量的主要指标，同时不同类型的武器也决定你能否使用某些技能。

Text.en: The largest continent in Path of Exile's known world. Criminals on Oriath are exiled to Wraeclast, a mysterious continent with a murky and bloody history. Most of Path of Exile's main storyline takes place on Wraeclast.
Text.zh: 奥瑞亚的罪人将被流放到瓦尔克拉斯，流放之路世界中最大最神秘的大陆，拥有血腥神秘的历史背景。流放之路中大部分剧情皆在瓦尔克拉斯上发生。

Text.en: Stats and Mods II: What to Look Out For
Text.zh: 状态和词缀 II:寻找什么

Text.en: Character builds in Path of Exile are extremely varied, and which items and passives are important to a character is highly dependent on what that character is trying to achieve, but there are some things almost everyone should look out for.
Text.zh: 在流放之路中角色玩法和流派极为多变，不同的道具和天赋的价值也因此依每个流派的需求而异。虽然如此，还是有某些属性是几乎每个角色都用的到的！

Text.en: Because of the properties of Fireball, this staff increases Fireball's damage by 66%.
Text.zh: 因为火球的特性，这把长杖将能够增加火球的伤害整整 66%。

Text.en:
Unless you're in a coordinated group, every character needs a way to kill monsters. Figure out how you plan to deliver damage and look for items that amplify that. If you plan to shoot arrows at monsters from afar, a high-damage bow, as well as passive skills that benefit your chosen weapon, are a must. 

If you plan to cast spells, look for weapons with 'increased Spell Damage'. If you're strictly dealing fire damage, look for things that boost your fire damage. A fire spell like Fireball benefits from increases to fire, spell, and projectile damage. A character who wants to smash things with a one-handed mace should look for modifiers to one-handed weapons, maces, attacks and melee attacks specifically.
Text.zh:
除非你时常和亲朋好友组成特殊队伍，否则几乎每个角色都需要利用某种方式杀死怪物。找出造成伤害的方法，接着收集可以加强它的道具。如果你想远远的对敌人发射箭矢，一把攻击力高的弓和加强弓系伤害的天赋几乎可以说是必备的。

如果你想施放法术，那么你可以尝试寻找有「增加法术伤害」的武器。如果你对火属性情有独锺，那么你也可以把焦点摆在火属性伤害加成的道具。举例来说「火球」，它不仅可以被「增加火焰伤害」影响，也能够受到「增加法术伤害」、「增加投射物伤害」的影响。一位想要使用单手锤打扁怪物的角色，可以把焦点摆在「单手武器伤害」、「单手锤伤害」、「攻击伤害」、「近战伤害」相关的词缀。

Text.en: Weapon-specific passives are often stronger than more generalised passives, but you lose some flexibility in which items you can use.
Text.zh: 限定武器的天赋一般来说比广泛影响的天赋来的强力，但同时你失去了武器选择的灵活性。

Text.en:
You can't kill monsters if you're dead, so you should also carefully consider your defences. Most characters will want some armour, energy shield or evasion, or some combination of the three. Sources of life and increases to it are a great way to extend your lifespan, but you'll also want to seek out ways to mitigate the damage before it ever touches your life pool. 

Fire damage, such as the fire from a cannibal's thrown torch, can be mitigated by sources of 'Fire Resistance'. Merveil's spells deal cold damage, so 'Cold Resistance' is very useful against her. If a certain spell or attack deals significantly more damage to you than anything else, it might be of an element that you don't have much resistance to. If you're ever unsure where you spend your next passive point, it's almost always worth investing in a relevant defence.
Text.zh:
不论你再怎么厉害，死了一切都是浮云。在提升角色能力的同时，你也可以多多研究你的防御手段。大多角色选择使用护甲、护盾、闪避、或者混搭。同时基础生命和增加生命相关的来源也非常受欢迎，但最有效的方式就是在伤害还没碰到你的生命池前就已经被减免缓和了。

火焰伤害，可以通过「火焰抗性」来减免。莫薇尔的法术造成冰霜伤害，所以「冰霜抗性」对付她非常有效。如果游戏中突然发现某些技能对你的角色造成特别多伤害，可能是因为你对应的抗性过低。如果你不确定接下来的天赋该往何处发展，防御手段几乎都是不错的选择。

Text.en: Not too shabby! As you progress, you'll be able to fill some gaps using the crafting benches given to you by characters called Masters.
Text.zh: 别沮丧。随着游戏进度前进，你可以找到一些称为大师的角色用工艺台填补一些空白。

Text.en: While out in the wilds of Wraeclast, you might've run out of bag space and found that you couldn't pick anything else up. Luckily, every Town and Hideout in Path of Exile comes with a stash. The items you put in your stash can be accessed wherever a stash can be found. You'll find the same items you stashed in Lioneye's Watch waiting for you at the Forest Encampment, your Hideout, and anywhere else with a stash.
Text.zh: 在瓦尔克拉斯的荒野中，你可能会发现背包不够用，没法装更多东西。好在每个城镇和藏身处都有一个仓库。而且每个仓库的空间都是互通的。你在狮眼守望放进仓库的物品，在森林营地、你的藏身处、或者任何其他城镇的仓库中都能找到。

Text.en: Every Town and Hideout has a stash.
Text.zh: 每个城镇和藏身处都有一个仓库。

Text.en: In fact, all your other characters in the same league can also access the same stash, so if you get a great bow while playing your Marauder, you can stash it to use on your Ranger later.
Text.zh: 帐号中隶属相同赛季区下的角色皆使用相同的仓库空间，当你使用野蛮人冒险时找到了一把不错的弓，你可以通过仓库转移给你的游侠使用。

Text.en: At some point you may find yourself running low on stash space. Extra stash tabs can be bought in the Microtransactions shop, and once purchased, will be available in every league. They come in a few different varieties:
Text.zh: 流放一段时间后你可能会觉得自己的仓库空间渐渐无法满足需求。不必担心，额外的仓库页可以通过商城购买，而且一旦购买日后每一个赛季区都可以使用。仓库页分几种类别：

Text.en: Basic stash tabs are functionally identical to your free tabs.
Text.zh: 一般仓库页和起初免费的仓库页拥有一样的功能。

Text.en: Premium stash tabs can be labelled and colour-coded for ease of use, and allow you to list items for sale. You can price each item individually or set a price that applies for every item in the tab.
Text.zh: 高级仓库页提供了命名和更改标签颜色的功能，方便你进行整理和归类不同类型的物品。

XBoxText.en: Premium stash tabs can be labelled and colour-coded for ease of use, and allow you to list items for sale.
XBoxText.zh: 高级仓库页可以添加标签和颜色以便使用，还能允许你列出待售的物品。

Text.en: The specialised stash tabs, such as the Currency stash tab, can hold thousands of specific items, far exceeding the normal stack-size limits, and keep them neatly organized.
Text.zh: 特殊仓库页，如通货仓库页，能够储藏上千个特定物品，完全高出平常的堆叠限制，而且还摆的整整齐齐。

Text.en:
All stash tabs have a search bar at the bottom that lets you search for and and filter out items, so you can quickly find what you are looking for.

The items in your stash never go away. However, when a temporary league ends, all the items in your stash will be moved to the stash in its permanent equivalent.

When this happens, your items can be found in stash tabs labelled "Remove Only". These will hold your items indefinitely, but anything removed from a Remove Only tab can't be returned to that tab.
Text.zh:
每一种仓库页的下方都提供了搜寻的功能，让你可以迅速方便的找到自己的物品。

仓库中的物品永远不会消失。然而当赛季或者短赛季结束后，它们将会被移动至对应的永久区（或永久专家）中。

这类转移发生后，你的道具将会出现在永久区的仓库中，分页名称将显示为「只能取出」，这些仓库页虽然没有保存期限，但如其名称所指出，物品取出后是无法放回去的。「只能取出」仓库页被清空后，重新登入游戏后将会消失。

Text.en: Remove-only tabs keep your items safe and sound after a challenge league ends.
Text.zh: 「只能取出」仓库页会完善保存你的物品。

Text.en: Wraeclast is pretty big, and is full of places you'll want to visit and revisit. To help you get around, the land is dotted with 'Waypoints' which let you quickly travel to destinations you have previously visited. To use a waypoint, activate it and select where you would like to travel. You can only travel to waypoints you've activated previously, so it is always worth activating new waypoints when you come across them.
Text.zh: 瓦尔克拉斯是个非常大的陆地，也有很多地方是时常需要拜访的。为了让流放者更容易跑腿，地图上会出现许多传送点，让你在启用后能够迅速的往返。

Text.en: Selecting a quest icon on the World Panel will display a path to the next step of the quest.
Text.zh: 在世界面板上选中任务图标，可显示一条通往任务下一步的路径。

Text.en:
When you click on a waypoint, the panel that pops up is called the World Panel. It doesn't just show your waypoints, however; It also displays every area you have previously visited, as well as some connected areas you haven't been to yet. Your quests are listed below the map, and by selecting one you can highlight the path that you need to follow to complete it. 

Because areas in Path of Exile have varying degrees of random generation, you may not always recognize the layout of an area, even if you've been there several times. The minimap or map overlay may also be different and will need to be revealed again. This may take some getting used to, but it means no two playthroughs are exactly the same.
Text.zh:
点击传送点后，世界面板将会弹出。它将会显示出所有你已经拜访过的地区，同时也会显示出相连的为探索区域。你的任务会显示在地图的下方，选择任务图示后，世界面板将会显示下一步的路线。

在流放之路的世界中，每次进入一个区域，该地图都有随机生成的机制，所以就算你已经拜访过某些区域数次，你可能还是没办法一眼确定地形。这也代表每次游戏都有比较不一样的体验。

Text.en: Monsters throughout Wraeclast won't just hurt you -- they can also inflict [Ailments]. Fortunately, you can too.
Text.zh: 瓦尔克拉斯的怪物不但会伤害你，它们还会造成[Ailments|异常状态]。幸运的是，你也可以。

Text.en: [Ailments] usually come from a specific kind of damage. [Fire] damage can '[Ignite]', which deals further fire damage over time. [Cold] damage can '[Chill]', slowing you down, or '[Freeze]', causing you to stop moving entirely. [Lightning] damage can '[Shock]', causing you to take a lot of extra damage from any source. Some enemies can also '[Poison]' you or inflict '[Bleeding]', both of which deal damage over time. If you move while you're bleeding it will deal extra damage.
Text.zh: [Ailments|异常状态]一般来自特定的伤害。[Fire|火焰]伤害能够[Ignite|点燃]并造成火焰持续伤害。[Cold|冰霜]伤害能够[Chill|冰缓]或者[Freeze|冻结]，使怪物或你行动缓慢甚至无法进行任何动作。[Lightning|闪电]伤害能够[Shock|感电]，使怪物或你受到伤害时额外受到伤害。有些怪物能够使你[Poison|中毒]或者[Bleeding|流血]，两者皆为持续性伤害。当你正在流血时进行移动，你将受到更多的流血伤害。

Text.en: Each ailment typically comes from a specific type of damage, though some unique items can change this.
Text.zh: 异常状态一般来自特定的伤害，但某些传奇物品可以改变规则。

Text.en: Items, passive skills, support and skill gems, curses, and other things can each influence how likely it is that you'll suffer or inflict any of these [Ailments], as well as how effective these ailments are.
Text.zh: 物品、天赋、辅助宝石、技能宝石、诅咒、和其他因素都可能影响你受到或造成[Ailments|异常状态]的几率和异常状态的效果。

Text.en: Unique items and passive skills can prevent you from suffering from specific [Ailments], or grant something beneficial when you're suffering from one.
Text.zh: 某些传奇物品和天赋能够使你免疫特定的[Ailments|异常状态]，甚至当你受到该异常状态的影响时提供给你有益的效果。

Text.en: Flasks are capable of removing each [Ailments|ailment] if they have the right mods. Figuring out which ailments might be dangerous to you and getting flasks that will remove them can make a big difference to your journey.
Text.zh: 某些带有特定词缀的药剂将可以移除对应的[Ailments|异常效果]。了解哪些异常效果对你造成威胁并取得能够反制的药剂对你的旅途将会有莫大的帮助。

Text.en: Path of Exile is an online game where you can talk, trade, and play with other players whenever you want.
Text.zh: 在流放之路中你将能够与其它玩家一起游玩、聊天、交易。

Text.en: There are several chat channels enabled by default, which can be toggled on and off using the buttons at the top of the chat window. You can also select which channel you want to talk in via the drop-down menu at the bottom.
Text.zh: 流放之路的聊天频道预设就已经为你开启了多个聊天频道，你可以通过聊天频道上方的按钮将它们关闭。聊天时你可以通过左下角的下拉式选单选择你要发言的频道。

Text.en: You can link items in chat with Ctrl + Alt + Left-click
Text.zh: 按下 Ctrl + Alt + 左键点击物品将可以把该物品信息发送至聊天窗口。

Text.en: The Social panel (Hotkey S) is where you can quickly access your friends list, guild and party. Once you add a friend, both their account name and character name will be visible to you. If they have a Hideout and have enabled their friends to enter it, you'll be able to enter their Hideout from this menu while in your own Hideout or a Town.
Text.zh: 你可以在社交面板（快捷键为 S）中快速查看好友列表、公会和队伍。如果你添加过好友, 就能看到好友的账号名和角色名。如果他们拥有藏身处并允许好友参观，你就可以在自己的藏身处或城镇通过该菜单进入他们的藏身处。

Text.en: You can also use this panel to join public parties created by other players, or create your own.
Text.zh: 你也可以使用此面板建立自己的公开队伍或加入其他玩家的公开队伍。

Text.en: If you're looking to buy, sell, or exchange items with another player, you can open the trade window by right-clicking a character in the world. If they're in your party, you can trade by right-clicking their character portrait. Items up for trade must be checked by each player before the trade can be completed, to ensure you know exactly what it is you're trading for.
Text.zh: 若希望与其他玩家进行买卖或者是交换物品，你可以使用右键点击其他玩家并选择交易的选项。如果对方与你处同一个队伍之中，点击对方的角色头像也能够开启交易视窗。每次的交易中双方玩家都必须使用鼠标确认交易的物品，否则将无法完成该交易，提醒流放者们务必留意交易的内容。

Text.en: Path of Exile's players come from all walks of life, and the Path of Exile community is an important part of what makes Path of Exile so much fun. So please remember to be respectful when you talk to other players.
Text.zh: 流放之路的玩家来自各行各业, 而流放之路的玩家社区更是让流放之路变得如此有趣的主要原因之一。因此与其他玩家交流时一定要保持礼貌。

Text.en:
Prophecies are similar to the quests that characters like Tarkleigh send you on, however they are less structured, less predictable, and can only be acquired from Navali in exchange for a silver coin. 

Prophecies can do a broad range of things. Some can guarantee that certain items will drop from specific monsters. Some add new monsters to areas, some drastically change the look of certain areas, and some grant avenues to new or upgraded unique items.
Text.zh:
和一般的任务相似，但更难以捉模，没有一定的模式，只能通过纳瓦莉花费银币随机取得。

预言能提供非常广泛的效果。有些能够保证特定的物品从特定的怪物掉落。有些会为地图增加更多怪物，有些甚至会改变地区的样貌，有些还能够将传奇物品升级成更强大的版本。

Text.en: Sometimes you may get a prophecy that you don't want or need at that moment. Navali can seal such prophecies for some silver coins, turning it into an item that you can store in your stash or trade to another player.
Text.zh: 偶尔你可能会取得对你目前没有用处的预言，这时你可以花费银币请纳瓦莉协助将它封印。封印后的预言会转化成一件可以储藏、交易的物品道具。

Text.en: While some prophecies can grant you access to powerful and valuable rewards, sometimes the prophecy IS the reward. Remember, you can end up fulfilling a prophecy without meaning to, so it's always worth considering spending some silver to save a nice crafting prophecy for an item that could greatly benefit from it.
Text.zh: 有些预言会引领你取得极有价值的奖励，但别忘了有些预言本身的效果就是价值的所在。为了不要不经意的浪费掉某些稀有的预言，有时将它们封印起来是非常明智的选择。

Text.en:
You can modify a vast number of objects in Path of Exile using the various orbs, scrolls, essences, whetstones and other stacking consumables. Collectively these items are referred to as "Currency", as they are also used to trade and barter with both NPCs and other players. At higher levels you might find currencies that other players value highly.
 
The Orb of Transmutation, Orb of Alteration and Orb of Augmentation are great items to carry and use during your journey. They can be used to upgrade normal items to magic and to reroll or change the mods on magic items, and they're common enough that you can pretty quickly replace whatever you use. Using these currencies on flasks can let you customize their behaviour.
Text.zh:
在流放之路中你能够使用多种道具对物品进行改造，像是点金石、精髓、磨刀石、卷轴等消耗型道具，一般称之为「通货」，因为它们时常被当作交易货币的一种，随着你的等级提升，你也将能够找到更有价值的通货。

改造石、蜕变石、增幅石都是非常常见也是平常带在身上极为有用的通货物品。它们能够将普通物品升级成魔法物品，或者改变魔法物品的词缀和属性。使用在药水上也能为你带来更多不同的效果。

Text.en:
