If you're in need of a damage boost, try using them on a weapon base-type that is close to your level. Sometimes a magic item with the right mods is better than a rare item with the wrong ones.

We've listed out some of the more common currencies, and what they do, just below:
Text.zh:
若你需要更多伤害，不妨试试将他们用在与你等级相近的武器上，有正确词缀的魔法武器有时比起错误词缀得稀有武器来的好用。

以下为更多常见的通货物品和它们的用途：

Text.en:
There are many more currency items than just these, and they can be used in other ways. Later on, you will be able to fill your Hideout with devices which let you spend currency to modify your items very precisely.
			 
If you've accumulated a few of a type of currency, don't be afraid to try using it on an item. Sometimes the results will surprise you!
Text.zh:
除此之外，流放之路中还有许多其它通货物品，并另有他用。随着进度推进，你的藏身处里会添置各种装置，并允许你用通货物品精细化调整物品。
			 
假如你已经取得了好几种通货物品，请不要吝惜把它们用在物品上。偶尔结果会让你大吃一惊！

Text.en: Even strongboxes can be modified with currency. Keeping some with you will give you a degree of control over the contents of the strongboxes you come across.
Text.zh: 即使是保险箱也能够受到通货的影响。身上随时携带通货能够让你遇到保险箱时多少控制保险箱的内容物。

Text.en: There are many little tips and tricks that you will naturally pick up as you play Path of Exile, but here's a few that will make life in Wraeclast easier.
Text.zh: 在流放的旅途中你将自然而然的学习到许多有帮助的诀窍，在那之前以下提供几个对你接下来在瓦尔克拉斯的时间可能有所帮助的建议。

Text.en: While your stash or a vendor window is open, you can hold down 'Ctrl' and click items to quickly move them into or out of your inventory.
Text.zh: 仓库或者商人视窗打开的时候，按住 Ctrl + 左键点击想要移动的道具可以忽略拖曳的动作。

XBoxText.en: While your stash or a vendor window is open, you can use <<xbox_button_x>> to quickly move them into or out of your inventory.
XBoxText.zh: 打开仓库或商人窗口时，你可以使用 <<xbox_button_x>> 快速将其移入或移出背包。

Text.en: If you run out of room in your stash, you can buy more stash tabs in our in-game microtransaction shop. The same is true if you run out of character slots.
Text.zh: 如果你的仓库页或者角色栏位放不下了，游戏中的商城页面提供多种仓库页和角色栏位让流放者们购买。

Text.en: Holding Alt while hovering over an item in your inventory will display it against what you have equipped. It will also show any extra information if the item uses some complex or obscure game terms.
Text.zh: 按住 Alt 键的同时，将鼠标移至物品上方将可以和目前角色装备中的物品做比较，也可以看到该物品的详细信息。

XBoxText.en: Holding <<xbox_button_lstick>> while hovering over an item in your inventory will display it against what you have equipped. It will also show any extra information if the item uses some complex or obscure game terms.
XBoxText.zh: 在背包的一件物品上按住<<xbox_lstick>> 可以跟您装备的物品进行对比，也可以看到该物品的详细信息。

Text.en: At high levels you may find that item drops fill up your screen. In the UI tab of the Options menu you'll find an option to turn on an item filter. Item filters will limit which items are displayed and when.
Text.zh: 随着画面上的掉落物变多，你可能会开始觉得地图过于杂乱。在界面设定中你可以设置物品过滤器，将能够订制物品显示的规则。

Text.en: If you pick up a cool unique item or see a skill gem you want to use but it doesn't suit your build, stick it in your stash! Remember, your stash is shared across all of your characters in that league. Don't be afraid to make a new character and try out a new build. Building new characters is a big part of what makes Path of Exile so much fun.
Text.zh: 捡到很酷的传奇物品，还是突然找到了某颗想要使用的技能宝石了吗？想使用却与你目前的流派不搭？不用担心，将它们收藏到你的仓库中吧，别忘了你的仓库与其他相同赛季区下的角色是共享的。不要害怕尝试更多的职业、更多的角色和流派，流放之路会受欢迎的原因不就是因为流派的多样性吗？

Text.en: Currency that enhances an item's quality works more effectively on Magic and Normal items. If you want to craft an item or need an item with a certain amount of quality, try enhancing the item before you upgrade its rarity.
Text.zh: 提升道具品质类的通货，当使用在魔法或一般稀有度的物品上时效益最高。在制作某些物品前建议可以先使用品质类通货后再提升物品的稀有度。

Text.en: Some item mods, such as "Squire's" on weapons and "Beetle's" on armour-based body armours, can give the appearance of actually being two mods. These are hybrid mods, and are actually single mods that grant two stats at lower values. That means you may still be able to craft an extra mod onto that item! If you're unsure if you have room on an item or not, try putting it in a Master's crafting bench.
Text.zh: 某些出现在武器或者胸甲上的词缀，乍看之下是两条词缀，实际上它可能是复合式词缀，由两条较低数值的效果组成。若不确定是否为复合式词缀，建议你可以将该物品放进大师工艺台进行判断。

Text.en: If you ever get stuck, don't be afraid to ask for help. If players in the global chat can't answer your questions, you can always visit our forums.
Text.zh: 如果你卡关了, 请积极提问。如果世界频道里的玩家没有回答你, 你还可以在论坛中提问题。

XBoxText.en: If you ever get stuck, don't be afraid to ask for help on our forums.
XBoxText.zh: 如果你举步维艰，不要害怕，到我们的论坛上求助吧。

Text.en: Your stash has a field at the bottom that lets you filter out items.
Text.zh: 你可以在仓库页面底部的输入框中输入过滤关键词

Text.en: Auras are skills that persistently affect things around you. Most auras, such as 'Hatred', affect you and your nearby allies and party members. They usually grant some sort of benefit, but reserve a portion of your mana for as long as you keep them activated.
Text.zh: 光环是一系列对你的角色有持续效果的技能。大部分的光环，如「冰霜伤害光环(Hatred)」会影响你与你的队友。一般来说它们带给你某种增益效果，但同时在它们启用时会保留你魔力的一部分。

Text.en: Some auras instead affect your nearby enemies. The 'Blasphemy Support' turns any supported curse into an aura that reserves some mana and curses any enemy that enters its radius.
Text.zh: 有些光环仅会影响你周边的敌人。「诅咒光环(辅)」宝石会将它辅助的诅咒的效果转换成光环，并和一般光环一样保留你的魔力，同时影响附近的敌人。

Text.en:
Reserved mana can't be used or recovered until whatever is reserving it is disabled, so consider whether you will be able to use your skills with the mana you have remaining. Things that change how skills interact with your mana (like 'Blood Magic') also apply to mana reservation.
 
Heralds also reserve mana and grant benefits that are similar to some of the aura skills, however they only affect you. Heralds also have special behaviours that interact with ailments.

Some auras don't reserve mana or don't persist indefinitely. This is true of Vaal versions of auras such as Vaal Grace.

Vaal auras have a limited duration but grant very powerful bonuses for the short time they are active.
Text.zh:
被保留的魔力不能被使用也无法回复，直至对应的光环还被停用。因此在开启光环时必须留意剩余的魔力是否足够让你可以灵活的使用你的技能。

捷光环，和一般光环较为不同的是，它只影响你自己。各个捷光环对于异常状态都有对应的效果。

某些光还不保留魔力也不会永久维持效果，像是「正义之火」启用时将燃烧消耗你的生命，且无法通过一般的方式解除它。

瓦尔版本的光环虽然提供强大的增益效果，但持续时间非常的短暂。

Text.en: Each Herald skill interacts in some way with its associated ailment.
Text.zh: 各个捷光环对于异常状态都有对应的效果。

Text.en:
Jewels are items that have mods just like your weapons and armour. However, instead of being equipped, they are socketed in the passive skill tree.

Jewels only work when they're socketed in a jewel socket that has been allocated with a passive point. If they are in an unallocated socket, the jewel won't do anything.
Text.zh:
珠宝和你的武器和装备一样拥有词缀。然而它们无法直接装备。

珠宝必须通过天赋树上的珠宝插槽才能够获得珠宝的效果。

Text.en:
Just like other items, jewels can be normal, magic, rare or unique. They can be modified with currencies like other items, though unlike your weapons and armour, a rare jewel can only have up to four mods. 

Cluster jewels are a type of jewel that can only be socketed in the outer rim of your passive tree. These come in 3 sizes, small, medium and large, and allow you to expand your passive tree with new passive nodes, notables and even more jewel sockets!

Some unique jewels, such as Efficient Training above, can modify the passive skills around them:
Text.zh:
就像其他物品一样，珠宝也有分魔法、稀有、传奇稀有度。珠宝也能够受到通货物品的改造，但不像一般的武器和装备，珠宝最多只能拥有 4 条词缀。

天赋树外环只能插入星团珠宝。它们分别有小型、中型、大型等 3 种大小，可以让您的天赋树扩展新的小天赋、核心天赋以及更多珠宝插槽。

类似充分训练等传奇物品可以调整天赋效果：

Text.en: Some unique jewels have a radius and change the behaviour of passive skills within that radius.
Text.zh: 某些传奇珠宝甚至会改变它周边的天赋的效果。

Text.en:
The colour of a jewel affects the likelihood of it having certain mods, but has no effect on your ability to socket it.

Since the number of jewels you can socket is only limited by the number of jewel sockets you've allocated, some unique jewels have limits placed on them. If you have more of that type of jewel than the limit allows, the extra jewels won't have any effect.
Text.zh:
珠宝的颜色意味着不同词缀能在该珠宝上出现的机率，任何颜色的珠宝都能被插入置任何珠宝插槽中。

某些珠宝带有同一时间能作用的数量限制，若你的角色天赋插入该珠宝的数量超出珠宝上所标示的数量限制，额外的珠宝将不会有任何效果。

Text.en:
Throughout your journeys you will encounter other exiles. The Forsaken Masters are a set of such exiles who, when found, will offer you a quest for the area you're in. Each Master has a different style of quest, and within those quests there are many randomised features, so although you might have a general idea of what your task may be, the specifics may vary greatly. Be prepared!

If you succeed in helping one of these Masters, they will gain experience and eventually level up. Whenever a master levels up, you unlock something within their realm of expertise.
Text.zh:
在流放的旅途中你会遭遇其他流放者。其中「被遗忘的大师」当你遇到他们时，会提供给你当前区域的任务。每位大师的任务模式都不太一样，而且包含些许随机的因素在。

若你成功完成大师们的任务，他们会获得经验值，完成够多的任务就能够使大师们提升等级。每当大师升级，他们也会将自己的专业领域通过其他的方式分享给你。

Text.en: When a Master reaches level 3, they can grant you the ability to create a Hideout -- a place all to yourself that you can decorate as you see fit. If you have a Hideout, a Master of level 2 or higher can also give you their crafting bench.
Text.zh: 当大师等级达到 3 等时，他们将给予你能够建立自己藏身处的功能。一个属于你自己的地盘，一个随心所欲的布置的空间。当你已经拥有一个藏身处后，当大师达到等级 2 他们将会提供给你特别的工艺台。

Text.en: Each Master's crafting bench offers different crafting options. Elreon's Blessing Font primarily works with rings and amulets, for example, while Vagan's Sharpening Wheel improves melee weapons. As you level up the associated Master, their crafting bench options grow.
Text.zh: 每位大师的工艺台都不同，提供的工艺选项也有所区别。举例来说博学大师的工艺台主要提供戒指、项链相关的词缀，而武器大师的工艺台则较专注于近战武器词缀。随着大师的等级提升工艺台的选项也会增加。

Text.en: Masters also buy and sell items. At high levels, some of the items they offer can't be found anywhere else. They will also sell Hideout decorations in exchange for favour, which is earned as you help them. Their range of decorations for sale also grows as they level up.
Text.zh: 大师也会买卖物品，高级大师会出售一些别处难求的物品。你还可以用友情点向他们交换藏身处装饰物，这种点数只能通过帮助大师来赢取。大师等级越高，贩售的装饰品也会越多。

Text.en:
Masters in your Hideout can also offer you a daily mission. Daily missions take the same structure as their ordinary missions but offer significantly more Master experience and favour. Whenever you complete a Master's daily mission their inventory of wares for sale changes.

Be sure to check your Hideout daily if you want to rapidly level up your Masters!
Text.zh:
藏身处里的大师可以给你日常任务。日常任务跟大师的普通任务相似，却给予更多大师经验和友情点数。一旦完成日常任务，该大师所贩售的物品将刷新。

若想要迅速升级大师，记得每天都去藏身处拜访他们！

Text.en:
You may have noticed that sometimes when you sell some items to an NPC you get something unexpected. You may have encountered a 'vendor recipe'!

Items with certain properties, or specific combinations of items, can be sold together to fulfil a recipe. Listed below are a few useful examples:
Text.zh:
你可能发现，当你将某些物品贩售给NPC时偶尔会出现意想不到的物品，流放之路中称之为「商人配方」。

物品上不同的属性或者拥有某些特性的物品同时贩售给NPC后会达成特定条件，能够取得对应的道具，以下为常较为用的范例：

Text.en:
There are many more than these, some of which are complex and result in powerful unique items or valuable currency. 

Try experimenting with different combinations of items. You might just stumble upon a new recipe.
Text.zh: 除了上述配方外，还有更多更复杂的配方，有些说不定会给予你强大的传奇物品或价值连城的通货。

Text.en:
The Labyrinth is a dungeon unlike any other in Path of Exile. It is filled with perilous traps, valuable secrets, tricky puzzles, and objectives that may require you to do things across several areas. 
			
To gain access to the Labyrinth, you must complete the six prerequisite trials that are scattered across the first three acts. A portal to the Aspirants' Plaza will then appear in the centre of the Sarn Encampment, and it is in the Aspirants' Plaza that all versions of the Labyrinth can be reached.
Text.zh:
帝王迷宫与流放之路中其他地牢不同。帝王迷宫中充斥着陷阱、秘密、谜题、甚至会需要你在多个区域完成目标。

若想进入帝王迷宫，首先你必须完成前个章节中出现的六种试炼，即可前往萨恩城进入试练者广场。

Text.en: Best each of the six trials and you can enter the Aspirants' Plaza via the Sarn Encampment.
Text.zh: 完成全部六种试炼，即可前往萨恩城进入试练者广场。

Text.en:
Successfully navigating the Labyrinth ultimately leads to a sequence of fights with the Labyrinth's creator, Izaro. Failure to survive the Labyrinth means starting again, so be careful where you step.
 
If you manage to make it to the end, you'll be rewarded with treasure, an opportunity to enhance an item, and the ability to select your Ascendancy class.
Text.zh:
在帝王迷宫中顺利前进，你将会遇上帝王迷宫的创造者——伊泽洛。在迷宫中死亡代表着从头开始，流放者必须全神贯注，步步为营。

成功到达迷宫的终点，你将会获得宝藏、附魔道具的机会、和升华职业的选择。

Text.en: The Labyrinth's structure changes every day, but you can view the sequence of chambers as you progress through them, as well as what features they may hold.
Text.zh: 迷宫的构造每天都会改变，但随着探索，你将能看到每个区域的顺序和内容。

Text.en:
There are four versions of the Labyrinth, each with a different set of entry requirements, and each reward you with two Ascendancy points upon completing it for the first time. 

Unlike most areas in Path of Exile, the Labyrinth's structure does not change greatly between runs during the same day, but once a day the layout is randomised.
Text.zh:
帝王迷宫一共有四种，每一种的进入要求都不一样，并且每一个在首次完成时都可以给你 2 个升华点数。

帝王迷宫和流放之路里的其它地区不同，它们在同一天内的布局不会有太大变化，但它们仍然会每天一变。

XBoxText.en:
There are four versions of the Labyrinth, each with a different set of entry requirements, and each reward you with two Ascendancy points upon completing it for the first time. 

Unlike most areas in Path of Exile, the Labyrinth's structure does not change greatly between runs during the same day, but once a day the layout is randomised.
XBoxText.zh:
帝王迷宫一共有四种，每一种的进入要求都不一样，并且每一个在首次完成时都可以给你2个升华点数。

帝王试炼迷宫和流放之路里的其它地区不同，它们在同一天内的布局不会有太大变化，但它们仍然会每天一变。

Text.en:
Although any class in Path of Exile can eventually reach any passive skill on the passive skill tree, each class has their own distinct set of Ascendancy classes. A Witch can, for example, eventually become an Elementalist, but a Templar cannot. 
 
You can unlock your Ascendancy class by completing the Labyrinth and using the Altar of Ascendancy in the final room. Higher-tier Labyrinths then grant two more Ascendancy points when you reach the Altar of Ascendancy, for a total of 8 points.
Text.zh:
虽然流放之路中任何职业都可以随心所欲的扩展天赋，但每个职业都拥有属于自己的升华职业。举例来说，女巫将能够升华成为「元素使」但圣堂武僧却不行。

在第一次完成帝王迷宫后点击升华盘即可选择解锁升华职业，后续更高阶的帝王迷宫中，每次完成都会奖励你额外 2 点升华点数，每只角色最多可以取得 8 点升华点数。
标准，专家模式和单人模式

Text.en:
The two primary modes for playing Path of Exile are Standard and Hardcore. In Standard, if your character dies, you respawn at a nearby checkpoint and have the opportunity to try again. At higher levels you will start to lose a portion of your experience when you die. Don't worry, you can't go down in level from dying too much.
 
In Hardcore, however, one death means you're out. Characters that die in Hardcore are sent to Standard, along with any items they were carrying. To reach a high level in Hardcore is a big achievement -- one that even very experienced players struggle with.
Text.zh:
流放之路中最主要的两种游戏方式为「标准(Standard)」或「专家(Hardcore)」模式。在标准模式中若你的角色死亡你将会重生在最近的城镇或者重生点，后期当你的角色死亡你将会失去一部份经验值。但也别担心，即使你的角色已经没有经验值，死亡也不会使你降低等级。

在专家模式中，每个角色只有一次机会。专家模式死亡的角色和身上的物品将会被转移至标准模式。在专家模式达到高等是非常优秀的成就，即便是老手也必须努力奋斗一番。

Text.en:
Both of these modes also have a Solo Self-Found (SSF) variant. In these SSF leagues players cannot team up or trade with any other players. That means the only items they have access to are the ones they've found or made. Players in SSF leagues can opt-out at any time and join the community of players in Standard (if they were playing Standard SSF), or Hardcore (if they were playing Hardcore SSF). 
 
There is no tangible benefit to playing Hardcore or SSF -- only the prestige. So if the idea of not being able to play with others or being booted out of your league if you die doesn't appeal, don't worry. It's the same game no matter how you choose to play.
Text.zh: 选择专家或单人模式没有额外的奖励，只有对自己的挑战和荣誉感。所以若对于这类游戏模式没有兴趣，别担心，不论甚么模式下流放之路的游戏内容都是一致的，想怎么游戏自己决定最重要。

Text.en: Path of Exile launches new temporary challenge leagues several times a year. These temporary leagues always have some twist or new gameplay mechanic that changes how you play, and a fresh economy. Everyone starts with nothing in their stash or on their character, other than a few flasks and scrolls. These leagues usually last about three months.
Text.zh: 流放之路每年都会推出多个「赛季」。这些赛季区都将包含不同的游戏机制或新奇的规则，同时也提供所有流放者一个全新的经济，平等的起点。这些赛季区一般会持续三个月左右，但有时也会进行适当调整。

Text.en: Many favourite Path of Exile features started out as challenge league mechanics: strongboxes, essences, breaches and tormented spirits, just to name a few.
Text.zh: 许多深受玩家喜爱的流放之路特色玩法，开始都是以赛季机制的形式出现的，如：保险箱、预言、裂隙和痛苦之灵等。

Text.en:
Challenge leagues also come with a set of special challenges (hence the name!). If you complete enough, you can earn exclusive microtransactions and Hideout decorations that are only available from that league.

When a challenge league ends, all of the items, characters, Atlas progress, and virtually anything else you can think of, transfer to their parent leagues, the permanent Standard and Hardcore leagues. Once everything has transferred across to Standard or Hardcore, you can continue playing those characters where you left off.

The start date of a new challenge league is usually announced several weeks in advance, and the first day of a new league is always very exciting, and bustling with players. The great majority of Path of Exile players play in these temporary challenge leagues. If you've never had a chance to experience it, we recommend joining us for the next one!
Text.zh:
每个赛季都会带来一系列特殊挑战。完成够多挑战，你将能获得该赛季独家的商城道具和藏身处装饰品。

当赛季结束时，所有的道具、角色、异界图鉴进度、和所有你能想到的皆会转移合并至正常模式，即永久存在的标准模式和专家模式。转移完成后仍可以继续用这些角色进行游戏。

每个赛季的开始时间都会提前几周宣布，开服首日都会有大量玩家涌入。大多流放者选择在赛季区中进行游戏，如果你还没体验过，我们邀请你加入我们的下一个新赛季区！

XBoxText.en:
Challenge leagues also come with a set of special challenges (hence the name!). If you complete enough, you can earn exclusive microtransactions and Hideout decorations that are only available from that league.

When a challenge league ends, all of the items, characters, Atlas progress, and virtually anything else you can think of, transfer to their parent leagues, the permanent Standard and Hardcore leagues. Once everything has transferred across to Standard or Hardcore, you can continue playing those characters where you left off.

The first day of a new league is always very exciting, and bustling with players. The great majority of Path of Exile players play in these temporary challenge leagues. If you've never had a chance to experience it, we recommend joining us for the next one!
XBoxText.zh:
每个赛季都会带来一系列特殊挑战。完成够多挑战，你将能获得该赛季独家的商城道具和藏身处装饰品。

当赛季结束时，所有的道具、角色、异界图鉴进度、和所有你能想到的皆会转移合并至正常模式，即永久存在的标准模式和专家模式。转移完成后仍可以继续用这些角色进行游戏。

开服首日都会有大量玩家涌入。大多流放者选择在赛季区中进行游戏，如果你还没体验过，我们邀请你加入我们的下一个新赛季区！

Text.en: Complete enough challenges within a league and you can earn an exclusive Hideout decoration.
Text.zh: 在一个赛季里完成足够的挑战，你可以获得独特的藏身处装饰物。

Text.en:
Divination cards are items found throughout Path of Exile that can be turned in for a reward. Different divination cards reward you with different things, including currency, specific item basetypes, other divination cards, and even unique items that can't normally be found. There are even some items that can only be obtained by collecting the right cards.
 
Every divination card was designed with the help of our supporters, though the rarity and drop locations were determined by Path of Exile developers.

Some divination cards can only be found in certain locations or from certain enemies, so pay attention to where you are when you find them. If there's one you really like, you might consider visiting that area frequently to find more.
Text.zh:
命运卡指流放之路内可用于换取奖励的物品。不同的命运卡换取的奖励也不同, 包括通货、特定基础物品、其他命运卡, 甚至有机会换得罕见的传奇物品。有些物品甚至只能靠兑换命运卡获得。

每张命运卡都是在我们的赞助者的协助下设计的, 不过其稀有度和掉落地点是流放之路的开发人员决定的。

某些命运卡只出现在特定区域或是只由特定敌人掉落, 因此寻找此类命运卡时一定要确认其出现条件。如果你有特别喜欢的命运卡, 不妨多拜访该命运卡出现的区域。

Text.en: The number of cards you need to turn in for the reward is visible on the card itself. If you have a full stack of cards in your inventory or stash, the value on the icon will be blue instead of the usual white. Once you have enough, Tasuni in Highgate or Lilly Roth in your Hideout will accept them and reward you with the prize on the card.
Text.zh: 命运卡上会显示需要收集的数量。当你收集到该数量，数字会转变呈现蓝色。第四章节的达苏尼会非常乐意接受你的卡片并提供给你对应的奖励。

Text.en: Path of Exile is completely free to play. You can't buy items, experience boosts, or anything that provides power, and you can do every bit of content without ever spending a cent. That said, we greatly appreciate our supporters as they allow us to continue to develop the game we love.
Text.zh: 流放之路的本体是完全免费的。你无法购买物品、经验提升道具或是其他任何提升角色游戏内强度的物品。你无须支付一分一厘就能获得完整的游戏体验。

Text.en:
To that end, cosmetic items and stash tabs can be purchased from the Microtransaction shop. If you run out of stash space, the store sells extra stash tabs (you can even buy them in bulk!). If you would like to organise your stash to a greater degree, premium stash tabs and specialised stash tabs such as the Currency tab are available for purchase.

There's also a wide variety of cosmetic items available for purchase. Some replace the appearance of an item, while some add to the appearance of the items you're already wearing. Some even completely change the way a particular skill looks. After you buy a cosmetic microtransaction, you can proudly display it by opening your inventory panel and navigating to the Cosmetics tab. From here you have the ability to display any cosmetic microtransaction you own in its appropriate slot.
Text.zh:
为此目的，商城中可以购买外观效果，若你的仓库空间不足够，商城也提供许多仓库扩充的选择。

外观效果的选项众多，有些会代替物品的外型、有些会为你的穿著增加更多特效。有些甚至会完全改变技能的效果。购买后只需要前往物品界面中的装饰分页即可装备它们。

Text.en: The Cosmetics tab is accessible from the Inventory screen.
Text.zh: 你可以从物品栏界面进入外观特效管理面板。

Text.en:
Many players who want to support Path of Exile opt to buy Supporter Packs, which contain points for purchasing microtransactions as well as forum titles, player portrait frames, exclusive cosmetics that are only available from those packs, and more. Each Supporter Pack is only available for a limited time. Once it gets taken off the market, it never returns.
 
If you would like to support us and the continued development of Path of Exile, please consider visiting our Shop.
Text.zh: 特效管理面板中，玩家可以自由选择在特定的部位上搭配自己喜欢的特效。这些特效不会与实际该位置上的装备绑定。例如使用手部外观之后，不论你如何更换护手，你的护手都会使用你已使用的手部外观。

Text.en:
The Pantheon lets you selectively enhance your character for the dangers that lay ahead. By defeating any of the major or minor gods in Part 2, your character gains access to that god's Pantheon power.

You can have one major and one minor Pantheon power active at any given time. Each Pantheon power only enhances a narrow aspect of your character's survivability, so carefully consider what you are likely to soon face, and select a power that'll best help you.

You can only change which Pantheon powers are active in a Town or Hideout, but doing so is entirely free.
Text.zh:
万神殿能让你选择性地强化自己的角色，更好地应对未来的危险。击败第 2 大章中的大小神祇就能获得他们的神力。

你同时只可启用一项主要神力和一项次要神力。每种神力都只能强化角色的一种属性，因此请谨慎考虑将来面对的敌人，选择最适合自己的神力。

你只能在城镇或藏身处改变启用的神力，并且完全免费。

Text.en: At later levels you can upgrade each power, broadening the protection it provides. To do so, you have to obtain a Divine Vessel and put it in your map device, then open a map that contains one of the map bosses displayed on the Pantheon.
Text.zh: 万神殿中的能力在后期将可以通过神之容器强化，得到更广泛的防御能力。将神之容器放置在地图装置中并开启万神殿对应的地图。

Text.en: Once you've defeated the map boss, your filled Divine Vessel will be waiting for you in the map device.
Text.zh: 击败地图头目后，你的神之容器将会装满力量在地图装置中等着你取回。

Text.en: Although the main storyline ends at Act 10, hundreds (if not thousands!) of hours of fun still lay ahead, by way of a special kind of item called maps.
Text.zh: 在玩家完成第 10 章，并且完成任意难度的升华试炼之后，异界图鉴系统将会完全开启。丰富耐玩的地图系统将会有上百小时(甚至上千小时)的游戏体验等着你。

Text.en:
Maps are items that open up brand new areas through the Map Device, located in the Epilogue area. High level monsters in the last few Acts can drop the earliest maps, but higher tier maps can only be found within other maps. 

Like other items, maps can be normal, magic, rare or unique, and have a wide pool of mods that affect both the difficulty and reward of the areas they open. Carefully crafting your maps for challenges that suit your build is an important part of Path of Exile's map system. It's always worth checking the mods on a map before you try to complete it. Some of them can be very punishing!
Text.zh:
地图物品可以通过地图装置开启全新的地区，最后几个章节的高等怪物将会掉落最初期的地图物品，更高等的地图物品必须在地图中才有可能掉落。

就像其他物品，地图物品也分为一般、魔法、稀有和传奇地图，并且有整个系列的词缀能够影响每张地图的难度和奖励。多多留意每张地图的词缀，因为有些词缀可是非常难缠的。

Text.en:
You can view which maps you have completed in your Atlas (default hotkey G). You can also further influence the properties of each map by applying a sextant to the Atlas icon. Sextants last for a limited number of maps and affect every map within its radius. While in a map, enemies can drop any maps of a lower tier that you have previously completed, as well as maps of a higher tier that the map you are in is connected to. Map bosses have an especially high chance to drop a map. 

Maps also have a bonus objective; usually to complete the map as a specific rarity. Completing this bonus objective increases the chances of finding higher tier maps. The higher the map tier, however, the harder it is to obtain even higher tier maps.
Text.zh:
你可以在异界图鉴（默认快捷键G）中查看已完成的地图。你还可以在异界图鉴图标上添加六分仪以进一步影响地图的性质。此类地图中的敌人会掉落低阶地图以及与当前地图相连的高阶地图。地图Boss掉落地图的几率尤其高。

地图还自带额外目标, 虽然该目标通常不是完成地图的必须条件, 但完成此额外目标能提升找到高阶地图的几率。然而, 地图品阶越高, 获得高阶地图的几率就越低。

XBoxText.en:
You can view which maps you have completed in your Atlas (press <<xbox_button_view>> while in your Hideout or the Templar Laboratory once the atlas is unlocked). You can also further influence the properties of each map by applying a sextant to the Atlas icon. Sextants last for a limited number of maps and affect every map within its radius. While in a map, enemies can drop any maps of a lower tier that you have previously completed, as well as maps of a higher tier that the map you are in is connected to. Map bosses have an especially high chance to drop a map. 

Maps also have a bonus objective; usually to complete the map as a specific rarity. Completing this bonus objective increases the chances of finding higher tier maps. The higher the map tier, however, the harder it is to obtain even higher tier maps.
XBoxText.zh:
你可以在异界图鉴（解锁异界图鉴后，在藏身处或圣堂教团实验室按下 <<xbox_button_view>>）中查看已完成的地图。你还可以在异界图鉴图标上添加六分仪以进一步影响地图的性质。六分仪可持续多张地图，并会影响其范围内的所有地图。此类地图中的敌人会掉落低阶地图以及与当前地图相连的高阶地图。地图Boss掉落地图的几率尤其高。

地图还自带额外目标，虽然该目标通常不是完成地图的必须条件，但完成此额外目标能提升找到高阶地图的几率。然而，地图品阶越高，获得高阶地图的几率就越低。

Text.en:
Later, you'll find Shaper's Orbs which let you upgrade the tier of a map, increasing the difficulty and levels of the monsters within.

Most players aim to work their way towards the centre of the Atlas in the hopes of challenging The Shaper, a very difficult but rewarding boss.
Text.zh:
你还能找到可用来提升地图阶级的塑界者之石, 地图阶级越高, 其难度和其中怪物的等级也越高。

大多数玩家都会试图向异界图鉴中心推进, 希望能与塑界者一战。塑界者虽然非常强大, 但击败他也能获得相当丰厚的奖励。

Text.en:
Path of Exile features several player-versus-player (or PvP) modes. At the top of the Sarn Encampment is an entrance to Sarn Arena, an area for open, unstructured player-slaying.

Want something more structured? You can duel individual players, or form a team and fight as a group. Path of Exile also supports a Capture the Flag game mode.

There are two main PvP brackets -- Open PvP, which has no limits on player level, and Low Level Dueling (LLD) which is limited to players of level 28 or below.

Leo Redmane in the Sarn Encampment offers daily PvP missions, and rewards active PvPers with Hideout decorations and crafting options, similar to other Forsaken Masters.

Dying in a PvP area on a Hardcore league does not send you to Standard, but if you die to another player outside of a PvP area, such as during the Act 2 Bandit questline, you will be sent to Standard as normal.

Note that special damage scaling rules are in place for PvP to level the playing field to some degree. Even so, the difference in both player skill and gear can be extreme, so don't become discouraged if you get slaughtered on your first try.
Text.zh:
《流放之路》自带数种玩家对抗（简称PvP）模式。你可以在萨恩营地的顶部找到萨恩竞技场的入口，在那里与其他玩家决一死战。

喜欢更具组织性的战斗？你可以与其他玩家单挑，或是组队和其他队伍对抗。《流放之路》还支持夺旗模式。

PvP 主要有两大类——开放PvP：该模式不限制玩家的等级。低级决斗（LLD）：该模式的玩家等级限定最高 28 级。

萨恩营地内的赤炎斗者里奥会提供每日 PvP 任务，并用藏身处装饰物和工艺选项给积极的 PvP玩家作为奖励，这些奖励同其它被遗忘的大师类似。

在专家模式中死于 PvP 区域不会将角色转移至标准模式。但如果你在 PvP 区域外死于其他玩家之手（如第 2 章的土匪任务线）， 就会被照常转移至标准模式。

请注意，为了保证平衡性，PvP 战斗的伤害按照特殊比例进行了处理，但即使如此， 玩家技能和装备的差异也会对战斗的结果造成举足轻重的影响，因此就算初次战斗惨败也无需灰心。

Text.en:
Path of Exile's customer support team is available 24 hours a day, 7 days a week. If you experience abuse or harassment while playing Path of Exile, you can report the abusive players by right-clicking their name in the chat window, and the support team will investigate the issue.

If you have a question or problem, try searching the Path of Exile forums to see if someone else has had a similar experience that has been resolved before you contact support. If you cannot find a resolution to the problem you are facing, please email support@grindinggear.com.

If you're experiencing payment or microtransaction problems or account issues, please email support@grindinggear.com. Someone will be in contact with you as soon as they can. We aim to have an extremely quick response time, but rest assured if there's any delay we're working to respond as soon as we can.

If you're experiencing technical issues, please try searching the Technical Support section of the Path of Exile forums for possible solutions.
Text.zh: 流放之路的客户支援团队每周七天，每天二十四小时提供服务。如果您在《流放之路》中遇到谩骂或骚扰，可以在聊天窗口右键点击谩骂玩家的名字进行举报，支援团队将为您进行调查。

XBoxText.en:
Path of Exile's customer support team is available 24 hours a day, 7 days a week. If you experience abuse or harassment while playing Path of Exile, you can report the abusive players and the support team will investigate the issue.

If you have a question or problem, try searching the Path of Exile forums to see if someone else has had a similar experience that has been resolved before you contact support. If you cannot find a resolution to the problem you are facing, please email support@grindinggear.com.

If you're experiencing payment or microtransaction problems or account issues, please email support@grindinggear.com. Someone will be in contact with you as soon as they can. We aim to have an extremely quick response time, but rest assured if there's any delay we're working to respond as soon as we can.

If you're experiencing technical issues, please try searching the Technical Support section of the Path of Exile forums for possible solutions.
XBoxText.zh:
流放之路的客户支援团队每周七天，每天二十四小时提供服务。如果您在《流放之路》中遇到谩骂或骚扰，可以在聊天窗口中双击不良玩家的名称并发起举报，支援团队将为您进行调查。

您可以在流放之路论坛上搜索您遇到的问题，看看其他人是否也有类似的经历，这样您就可以在联系支援团队之前解决问题。如果没有找到相关解决办法，请发送电子邮件至support@grindinggear.com。

如果您遇到的是账号问题、支付问题以及商城交易问题，请发送电子邮件至support@grindinggear.com，我们会尽快跟您取得联系。我们致力于以最快的速度为您回复，尽量缩短延迟时间。

如果您遇到的是技术问题，请发送电子邮件至techsupport@grindinggear.com

Text.en: This item will transform when correctly arranged with other items.
Text.zh: 当与其他物品一起被正确收集时，会转化成为一件传奇物品。

Text.en:
The Help Panel is designed to introduce you to Path of Exile's many features, and provide you with enough information to start engaging with them. This is not a comprehensive guide, and we encourage learning through experimentation to discover the depths that each part of the game has to offer. 

Each page of the Help panel is unlocked as you encounter the associated feature or reach an appropriate level. 

If you are looking for something specific and can't find it here, you may not have encountered it yet, or we may not have made a Help page for it. If you have any questions not answered here, please visit our official forums at www.pathofexile.com/forum.
Text.zh:
流放小百科将会提供给流放之路中许多功能的使用方式，但这只为流放者打开功能的大门，并不会太详细说明每个功能的所有使用方法，我们不希望将流放之路的一切拱手献上，希望每位流放者都能靠自己的学习体验流放之路的深度。

流放小百科的每一页会随着你的等级和进度解锁。若你正在找寻解答但流放小百科中没有出现对应的答案，可能是你还没达到对应的条件。当然，也有可能是这页我们还没做出来，这时我们建议你可以通过各大论坛或者其他玩家找寻解答！


- 感谢热心骨灰玩家 amsco为百科汉化提供了帮助与支持:)
尚未击杀解锁该神力的BOSS

Text.en: Once you've chosen your Ascendancy, you can change it by returning to the Labyrinth, refunding any allocated Ascendancy points (Refunding an Ascendancy point costs five refund points each), and selecting a new class at the Altar of Ascendancy.
Text.zh: 即便选择了升华职业，只要将你的升华点数完全重置（每点升华点数消耗 5 点重置点数）并回到帝王迷宫即可重新选择你的升华职业。

Text.en:
Once you have rescued Helena from the Chamber of Sins in Act 2, she will offer you a quest to claim and populate a Hideout. Your Hideout is your own private space, and is shared by all of the characters on your account, regardless of league (though access to certain things within your Hideout is still restricted by league). It comes with a stash, a guild stash if you're in a guild, a waypoint, and a crafting bench. 

The crafting bench comes with several basic recipes by default, but many more can be unlocked as you journey through the campaign and participate in side content such as the Azurite Mine and the Eternal Labyrinth. Typically an item may only have one crafted mod at a time, but any existing crafted mod can be replaced via the Crafting Bench for a small additional cost.

You can also invite the masters to your Hideout. There are currently 5 masters -- Einhar, Niko, Alva, Jun and Zana -- although you can invite Helena and Navali to your Hideout as well. Each master has a gameplay mechanic associated with them, such as capturing beasts for Einhar.
Text.zh:
你一旦从第二章的罪孽之殿救出赫莲娜，她就会给你一个任务，让你清理出一个藏身处。这是专属于你的私人空间，可以为账号下同赛季的所有角色共享（在藏身处中访问特定事物仍然受赛季限制）。藏身处里有一个仓库，一个公会仓库（如果加入公会），还有一个传送点和一个工艺台。

工艺台有一些默认的基础配方，你可以通过进行战役，参与支线内容（如蓝晶矿坑、永恒之灵、升华试炼等等）来解锁更多工艺配方。通常，一件物品同时只能附加一种属性，你只需要支付很小的代价就能在工艺台上替换。

你还可以邀请五位大师进入藏身处，分别是：伊恩哈尔、尼克、阿尔瓦、琼、札娜。此外还可以邀请赫莲娜和娜瓦莉。每一位大师都跟特定的游戏机制有关，例如伊恩哈尔可以捕捉魔物。

Text.en:
Besides the functional objects within your Hideout, you can place hundreds of special Hideout decorations. Some of these come with your Hideout, but many more can be purchased with Favour, a resource earned by helping masters like Einhar and Niko. Each master has their own Hideout decorations they can sell, though what is available is limited by the master's decoration level. Each master has a different requirement for raising their decoration level. You can see the requirement by hovering over their level when talking to them. 

Your Hideout, the masters within it, and all your decorations, both placed and stored, are all shared across all leagues. That means your Hideout will be the same on Standard as it is in a challenge league. The recipes available on your Hideouts crafting bench are not, and must be rediscovered in temporary leagues.
Text.zh:
除了这些实用功能，你还可以用上百种物品来装饰藏身处。除了它本身的默认装潢，你还可以通过完成伊恩哈尔、尼克，以及其他大师的任务获得友情点数来购买新的装饰品。每一位大师都会出售不同的装饰品。它们受大师的装潢等级限制，并且需要满足每一位大师的不同要求才能提升他们的装潢等级。你可以在跟他们对话时，把鼠标悬停在装潢等级上看到这些要求。

藏身处里的所有大师、装潢（无论是放置的还是储藏的）都可以在所有赛季下共享，在永久赛季和挑战赛季下完全一样。但工艺台的可用配方并不共享，你需要在临时赛季中去重新探索这些配方。

Text.en:
Not happy with the look of your Hideout? Many new Hideouts can be found through exploration and gameplay, including some very rare ones found exclusively in the Atlas of Worlds, so keep your eyes peeled. Others can be purchased directly from the Microtransactions store.

You can swap your Hideout to any you've unlocked by talking to Helena. Any decorations you've placed in your old Hideout will remain there until reclaimed, so you can swap between Hideouts safely without fear of your time spent decorating going to waste!
Text.zh:
不喜欢自己的藏身处？没关系，许多新藏身处在探险和游戏过程中等待你去发现，还有些稀有的藏身处只能通过异界图鉴来获得，多留意吧。你也可以在商城购买其它藏身处。

你可以跟赫莲娜对话来把藏身处变成任何你解锁的外观。曾经放置的任何装饰在收回之前都会得到保留，所以你不必担心花时间重新装修，尽管放心地改变藏身处外观吧。

Text.en:
In your travels you may come across mysterious entities with names in a language you don't recognise - Harbingers from an unknown realm. These Harbingers can create and command monsters from the area, and empower them with their own abilities.

You can't directly harm the Harbingers yourself, but defeating a Harbinger's monster allies hurts the Harbinger as well. Successfully defeating a Harbinger earns you currency shards of both existing currency types and currency types exclusively available from these entities.
Text.zh:
在瓦尔克拉斯的各个角落，你可能会遇到先驱者。他们能够创造并命令周围的怪物, 并使其增强。

你无法直接伤害先驱者本身, 但击败先驱者召唤的怪物也会伤害到先驱者。击败先驱者会有机会获得一些稀有的通货物品。

Text.en: One of these currency types may lead you to the source of the Harbinger incursion. If you can halt their arrival, you'll find pieces of shattered unique items that can be arranged to form powerful Harbinger-summoning uniques.
Text.zh: 这些通货中有一些可以带你来到先驱者的来源。在阻止先驱者入侵的过程中, 你也有机会获得一些传奇物品的碎片, 这些碎片最终能合成可以召唤出先驱者的传奇物品。

Text.en: If you want to run the same area many times back to back, you will need to create new instances. You can do this by Ctrl+Clicking the waypoint marker on the World Screen of the area you want to rerun while you're at a waypoint, or the entrance to the area you want to rerun when you're in an adjacent area. This opens the Instance Manager, which displays all of the instances of that area that you currently have access to, how long they have until they close, which servers they are connected to, and which players are in each one.
Text.zh: 如果你想反复刷相同的剧情地图, 你可以按住Ctrl不放再点击传送点上的地图点, 打开副本管理器。然后创建一个新的地图副本。地图管理其中还会显示当前该地图的所有副本信息, 包括该副本关闭的时间和当前副本内的玩家。

You can do this by pressing <<xbox_button_y>> on the waypoint marker while you're at a waypoint, or the entrance to the area. This opens the Instance Manager, which displays all of the instances of that area that you currently have access to, how long they have until they close, which servers they are connected to, and which players are in each one.
XBoxText.zh: 如果你想反复刷相同的剧情地图，你可以在传送点对准传送点标记，或者在地图的入口处按下 <<xbox_button_y>>，打开副本管理器。然后创建一个新的地图副本。地图管理其中还会显示当前该地图的所有副本信息，包括该副本关闭的时间、连接的服务器和当前副本内的玩家。

Text.en: Throughout the latter half of Path of Exile, you will find fissures (called Abysses) which open as you approach them, and monsters will spill out from below. You can pursue these cracks as they form, and they will lead to difficult encounters with great rewards.
Text.zh: 在瓦尔克拉斯，你会遇到深渊在地面裂开后出现，并从中爬出怪物们。不断追逐成型的深渊并与之战斗，你将遇到越来越强的敌人和惊人的奖励。

Text.en:
Time is an important element when following an Abyss. Each Abyss you encounter will close after a short duration, but may spread further if you can slay enough monsters in time. If you're quick and a little bit lucky, an Abyss chest may appear at the end of the sequence of events.

By slaying Abyss monsters you may be able to obtain items not found anywhere else:
Text.zh:
面对深渊时最重要的一点是---快速清怪。每个深渊在出现后的短时间内就会消失。但如果你能快速的消灭其中出现的怪物，那么深渊就可能继续扩大。如果你运气足够好的话，深渊宝箱可能会在深渊的尽头出现。

同时击败深渊怪物的过程中，你也会获得许多深渊赛季专属的物品：

Text.en:
Abyss jewels are special jewels with their own pool of mods. Unlike ordinary jewels, Abyss jewels have multiple tiers of many of their mods, as well as level requirements. They can also be socketed in a new type of item socket -- the Abyssal socket -- as well as in the passive skill tree. Abyssal sockets can be found on the Stygian Vise belt base type.

At higher levels, some Abyss events will lead into subterranean areas with special bosses. The most dangerous of these bosses can drop special Abyss league-exclusive unique items with Abyssal sockets.
Text.zh:
深渊珠宝是一种特殊的珠宝，这类珠宝带有一批特殊的词缀。与一般的珠宝不同，深渊珠宝的词缀具有不同的等阶，也具有不同的需求等级。深渊珠宝可以被插入装备上的深渊插槽之中，也同样能插入天赋树的珠宝插槽中。深渊插槽可以在以深渊腰带为物品基底的装备上找到。

在高等级时，一些深渊还会带你进入特殊的首领挑战区域。这些首领有可能掉落附带深渊插槽的深渊赛季专属传奇物品。

Text.en: Abyss jewels can drop as magic or rare items.
Text.zh: 掉落的深渊珠宝为魔法或稀有物品。

Text.en: The Stygian Vise can be found at all rarity tiers.
Text.zh: 深渊腰带有各种稀有度版本。

Text.en: Einhar Frey, first found in Act 2, wants your help capturing beasts to place in his Menagerie. Einhar only wants beasts he feels are "worthy" of the First Ones, so he will only appear when there are beasts with Bestiary mods in the area. These are easily identified by their yellow or red icons on the minimap. For Einhar to capture a beast, you must first weaken it through combat.
Text.zh: 伊恩哈尔·弗雷，会在第二章首次与我们见面，他想要我们帮忙捕捉魔物，放置在他的魔物园中。伊恩哈尔只在乎那些他觉得“有价值”的初生之子，所以他只会在带有猎魔词缀的魔物出没的地方露面。在小地图上查看黄色或红色的标识，即可找到这些魔物。想要让伊恩哈尔捕捉它们，你首先要通过战斗来使其变的虚弱。

Text.en:
Captured beasts are taken by Einhar to the Menagerie. Your Menagerie is shared across all characters in the same league on the same account, much like a Hideout. Other players can enter your Menagerie if you allow it, and you can enter theirs.

The Menagerie has a small arena with a stone plate, called the Blood Altar. At the Blood Altar you can perform 'Beastcrafting'. This requires that you select a recipe for which you have the required beasts. Once selected, those beasts will attack you in the arena. Successfully defeating those beasts will complete the craft, while death will result in those beasts escaping (and, if you're in a Hardcore league, your character transferring to Standard). 

Recipes can be discovered by capturing beasts, so be sure to capture a wide range of beasts!

Each captured beast, and each unlocked recipe, is also logged in your Bestiary - a document that can be found in your Challenges tab while you are in an area with Einhar or in the Menagerie.
Text.zh:
被捕捉的魔物将被伊恩哈尔置入魔物园。你的魔物园会在同赛季同账号的所有角色中共享，与藏身处很相似。如果得到你的许可，其他玩家可以进入你的魔物园，反之亦然。

魔物园有一个小的竞技场，里面有一座石板状的祭坛。在祭坛里，你可以进行魔物工艺。你可以选择一个奉献魔物配方，再准备相应魔物，就可以开始奉献。被选中进行奉献的魔物会在竞技场攻击你。成功地击败那些野兽将会完成这次魔物工艺，而战斗失败将会导致那些魔物逃逸(如果你是在专家模式中，死亡后你的角色会被转移到标准模式的永久区)。

捕捉魔物可以发现配方，所以请一定要广为捕捉！

每只被捕获的魔物，和每个解锁的配方，都将存储在你的猎魔笔记里，当你位于魔物园，或与伊恩哈尔位于同一片区域时，去挑战页签即可找到你的这本猎魔笔记。

XBoxText.en:
Nets can be found from slain monsters, or can be purchased from Einhar in a Town. There are different kinds of net to find and buy, increasing in effectiveness and price. Some of the toughest and rarest beasts will be difficult to capture without high-tier nets.

Captured beasts are taken by Einhar to the Menagerie. Your Menagerie is shared across all characters in the same league on the same account, much like a Hideout. Other players can enter your Menagerie if you allow it, and you can enter theirs.

The Menagerie has a small arena with a stone plate, called the Blood Altar. At the Blood Altar you can perform 'Beastcrafting'. This requires that you select a recipe for which you have the required beasts. Once selected, those beasts will attack you in the arena. Successfully defeating those beasts will complete the craft, while death will result in those beasts escaping (and, if you're in a Hardcore league, your character transferring to Standard). 

You can trade beasts with other players by purchasing a Bestiary Orb from Einhar and then using it on a captured beast in your Menagerie. The beast will vanish into the Orb, which can then be traded with another player. Using an Orb with a captured beast inside will add it to your Menagerie.

Recipes can be discovered by capturing beasts, so be sure to capture a wide range of beasts!

Each captured beast, and each unlocked recipe, is also logged in your Bestiary - a document that can be found in your Challenges tab by pressing <<xbox_button_view>>.
XBoxText.zh:
网可以在被击败的怪物处找到，也可以在城镇中向伊恩哈尔购买。你可以找到并购买不同类型的网，其效果和价格各有不同。较为坚韧和稀有的魔兽很难捕获，除非使用高等阶的网。

被捕捉的魔物将被伊恩哈尔置入魔物园。你的魔物园会在同赛季同账号的所有角色中共享，与藏身处很相似。如果得到你的许可，其他玩家可以进入你的魔物园，反之亦然。

魔物园有一个小的竞技场，里面有一座石板状的祭坛。在祭坛里，你可以进行魔物工艺。你可以选择一个奉献魔物配方，再准备相应魔物，就可以开始奉献。被选中进行奉献的魔物会在竞技场攻击你。成功地击败那些野兽将会完成这次魔物工艺，而战斗失败将会导致那些魔物逃逸(如果你是在专家模式中，死亡后你的角色会被转移到标准模式的永久区)。

捕捉魔物可以发现配方，所以请一定要广为捕捉！

每只被捕获的魔物，和每个解锁的配方，都将存储在你的猎魔笔记里，当你位于魔物园，或与伊恩哈尔位于同一片区域时，去挑战页签即可找到你的这本猎魔笔记。

Text.en: Eventually you may be able to fight one of the four Spirit Beast bosses, each of which can drop their own special set of unique items. These are the pinnacle fights available through Beastcrafting, and may require that you capture particularly rare beasts.
Text.zh: 最终你将要去挑战四大初始灵兽中的一个，每个初始灵兽会掉落自己独特的传奇道具套装。这是猎魔之旅中最具有挑战性的任务，过程中也可能需要你捕获许多特定类型的魔物。

Text.en: The item level of the resultant item is based on the Beast in the top-left slot.
Text.zh: 组合物品的物品等级取决于最左上方奉献槽内的魔物等级

Text.en:
No Recipes Unlocked
Capture some Beasts to unlock Recipes
Text.zh:
没有配方被解锁
捕获更多魔物解锁奉献配方

Text.en: Are you sure you want to itemise this beast?
Text.zh: 你确定要塑化这些魔物吗？

Text.en:
Special chests, called Strongboxes, can be found throughout Path of Exile. Unlike ordinary chests, Strongboxes are protected by monsters that must be defeated before the Strongbox will relinquish its treasures. 

Although Strongboxes are not technically items, they do share some special traits in common with many of Path of Exile's items. Specifically, Strongboxes have mods and, like items, these mods can be changed with the use of currency.

There are several different kinds of Strongbox to find, each one providing different amounts or kinds of items. Here are a few of the more common ones:
Text.zh:
保险箱是一类特殊的箱子，可能在瓦尔克拉斯的各处出现。与普通的箱子不同，保险箱通常是由怪物守护的，你必须打败守护这些怪物后，保险箱才会被打开。

虽然保险箱不是技术意义上的物品，但它们确实有一些共同的特点，它们与许多物品一样，也具有词缀。这些词缀可以通过使用通货进行改变。

游戏中有许多不同类型的保险箱，每一种都提供了不同数量或种类的物品奖励。下面是一些比较常见的例子:

Text.en: It is often worth carrying some currency items with you, so you can modify any strongboxes you happen to come across. The difference between a normal Strongbox and a well-crafted magic Strongbox can be quite significant.
Text.zh: 随身携带一些通货通常是值得的，因为你可以调整任何你碰巧遇到的保险箱词缀。一个正常的保险箱和一个精心制作的魔法保险箱之间的区别是非常明显。

Text.en: They may not be as flashy as a powerful weapon or armour item, but flasks in Path of Exile will literally mean the difference between life and death.
Text.zh: 药剂可能不像强大的武器或盔甲一样华丽，但是在流放之路中，药剂很多时候将意味着生与死的区别。

Text.en:
Flasks in Path of Exile are not consumable items. Unlike Scrolls of Wisdom, when you use a Flask, it does not vanish. Instead, it simply consumes a number of flask charges based on the flask you're using, and, once empty, must be refilled before it can be used again. Flasks can come in normal, magic or unique rarity, but not rare. 

Usually, flasks refill as you slay monsters. This means as long as you're successfully engaging in combat, you should always have a flask or two available for use. But if you get into a spot of trouble and empty your flasks, you'll either have to carefully slay enough monsters to refill them or return to Town. 

Your flasks also refill when you return to Town, so jumping into a portal is a valid strategy when you're running low on flask charges. Some flasks, such as those with the 'Surgeon's' prefix, can be refilled based on other conditions.
Text.zh:
《流放之路》的药剂不是一次性消耗品。与智慧卷轴不同，药剂在使用后不会消失，而是基于药剂的种类消耗一定数量的药剂次数。一旦次数用尽，就需要充能才能再次使用。药剂有【普通】、【魔法】、【传奇】三种稀有度（没有【稀有】）。

一般情况下，击败怪物可以给药剂充能。因此你只需要一直击败敌人，就总有药剂可用。不过万一药剂用尽，请务必小心击败怪物来为药剂充能，或者返回城镇。

返回城镇会自动将药剂充满，因此用尽药剂后跃入传送门是个不错的策略。有些药剂（如“外科医生”词缀的）的充能机制有所不同。

Text.en:
Other magic mods can enhance the amount of life or mana a [Flask] restores, or the duration it lasts, or the number of times it can be used. Some also provide extra utilities, such as removing curses or [Ailments]. 

Carefully selecting your flasks and which mods they have is just as important as selecting which weapon to wield or passive skills to take. If ever you are struggling to survive, take a look at your flasks and see if improvements can be made. They are often a cheap and effective place to start solving character build problems.
Text.zh:
词缀可以增加[Flask|药剂]回复的生命或法力数量，药剂持续时间，词缀也可以增加药剂的使用次数。有些词缀还能提供额外的效果，如去除诅咒或[Ailments|异常状态]。

仔细地选择你携带的药剂和它们所拥有的词缀。这与选择使用哪种武器或天赋加点同样重要。如果你正在挣扎在生死边缘，看看你的药剂，看看是否可以改进。这通常是一个廉价而有效的解决角色养成问题的途径。

Text.en: Carefully consider your flask modifiers. They can make all the difference.
Text.zh: 认真考虑你的药剂词缀搭配，它们可以让你的战斗力直线上升。

Text.en: It's helpful to have a mix of different flasks for different situations.
Text.zh: 为不同的情况配备不同的药剂组合是非常明智的策略。

Text.en: Flasks are friends! Don't be afraid to use them often.
Text.zh: 药剂是你的伙伴！千万不要忘了用它们！

Text.en:
You may encounter large blue crystals throughout the world that have imprisoned several monsters. By activating the central crystal you can free the monster within, but beware: that monster has been empowered by an Essence, and will be significantly tougher to kill than usual. If you manage to defeat the monster within, you can claim the essence for yourself. 

Essences are a special type of currency item that can typically only be found by defeating these trapped monsters. Unlike ordinary currency items, Essences have semi-predictable outcomes -- they will always guarantee that a certain mod appears.
Text.zh:
你可能会在流放之路中遇到巨大的蓝色水晶，其中囚禁了几个怪物。通过激活中心位置的水晶，你可以释放这些怪物，但一定要小心:这个怪物已经被一个精华赋予了额外的力量，将会比平常更加强力和难以击败。如果你能打败这个怪物，你就可以获得他身上的力量精华。

精华是一种特殊的通货物品，通常只能通过打败这些被禁锢的精华怪来获取。与普通的通货物品不同，精华在使用的时候更有针对性，他们会保证使用后一定会出现某种特定词缀。

Text.en: Essences are particularly useful early on, or when your character needs a certain mod, such as fire resistance. When the usefulness of low-level essences drops away, you can upgrade them by selling three identical essences to a vendor. Doing so will grant you one similar, but more effective, essence.
Text.zh: 精华在游戏早期，或者当你的角色需要一个特定词缀时(例如增加火焰抗性)，特别有用。当低等阶的精华逐渐无法满足你的需求时，你可以将三个相同精华出售给NPC来升级他们，获得一个属性更好的高阶精华。

Text.en: Monsters who carry essences are much more difficult than ordinary monsters. Be careful!
Text.zh: 被精华力量禁锢的怪物要比普通怪物强大很多！一定要当心！

Text.en: You can only capture Beasts with your nets.
Text.zh: 你只能对魔物使用猎魔夹进行捕获！该生物不是魔物！

Text.en: You can't capture a Beast while it is enraged.
Text.zh: 你无法捕获愤怒状态的魔物，请稍等

Text.en: Press {0} when targeting a Beast to throw a Net.
Text.zh: 选中一头魔物后，按 {0} 来投掷猎魔夹。

XBoxText.en: Press <<xbox_button_rstick>> to bind the Capture Monster skill to your skillbar

Text.en:
Explore a mysterious Vaal Temple, uncovering what became of the ancient empire.

<colour:yellow>{The default challenge league.}

<colour:yellow>{这是一个标准模式的赛季区。}

Text.en:
Explore a mysterious Vaal Temple, uncovering what became of the ancient empire.

<colour:red>{A character killed in Hardcore Incursion becomes a Standard character.}

在一座上古的瓦尔宝藏神庙中开启时空穿越，寻找它真正的所在。

<colour:red>{在专家模式的穿越中被击败的角色将变为永久标准模式角色。}

Text.en: Movement skills will not lock onto the target and always move the player in the direction of your cursor.
Text.zh: 位移技能将不会锁定目标，并总会朝鼠标指针的方向移动。

Text.zh: 腐化一件物品，使其谜之变化。

Text.zh: 腐化一件物品，彻底使其谜之变化。物品可能会被摧毁。

Text.en: Sacrifice a unique equipment for another random unique.
Text.zh: 奉献一个传奇装备来随机获得另一个。

Text.zh: 奉献一个传奇装备来随机获得另一个同类传奇物品。

Text.en: Sacrifice a unique equipment for another random unique of the same item class. Transforms unique items found exclusively in the Temple of Atzoatl.
Text.zh: 奉献一个传奇装备来随机获得另一个同类传奇物品。转化在阿佐亚特神庙中才能找到的传奇物品。

Text.en: Corrupts a Skill or Support Gem, modifying it unpredictably twice.
Text.zh: 腐化一个技能或辅助宝石，使其谜之变化两次。

Text.en: This item can be placed into an Altar of Passage to create a connection between two adjacent rooms in the Temple of Atzoatl. This item will drop on the ground when leaving an Incursion.
Text.zh: 该物品可放置在通路祭坛上，为阿佐亚特神庙中的两个相邻房间创造通路。离开穿越时该物品会掉在地上。

Text.en: This item can be used to destroy a wall connecting two chambers in the Temple of Atzoatl. This item will drop on the ground when leaving the Temple.
Text.zh: 该物品可用于摧毁连接阿佐亚特神庙中两个房间的墙。离开穿越时该物品会掉在地上。

Text.en:
Once you have reached Act 7, you may encounter Alva Valai. Alva is trying to find the location of the lost treasure temple of Atzoatl using ancient Waystones that begin appearing from the Causeway onwards. With her help, you will travel back in time two thousand years, to the Temple of Atzoatl during its construction. During this time, you can help influence the temple's construction, so that when you eventually find it, it is filled with glorious treasure.

You'll only have a limited amount of time during this visit to influence the layout of Atzoatl in the present day, but this time can be extended by slaying its inhabitants. Enemies will not drop loot during your Incursions, but once the timer runs out, you'll be returned to the present-day and showered with loot based on how well you did.

There are two primary objectives to pursue during your incursion: Architects and Altars of Passage.
Text.zh:
当前的挑战赛季被称为“穿越赛季”。在该赛季，你会遇到阿尔瓦·维莱。他在寻找失落的阿佐亚特神庙。在她的帮助下，你可以回到两千年前，回到阿佐亚特神庙最初兴建的年代。在此过程中，你可以影响神庙的兴建过程，使你最后在现今找到它的真正位置和其中的奇珍异宝。

穿越并影响神庙结构的次数有限，但你可以通过击败其中的敌人来延长逗留的时间。敌人在穿越期间不会掉落战利品，但当时间结束后，你会返回现今世界，你在穿越中所造成的影响会决定奖励的不同。

在穿越过程中你有两个主要目标：击败建筑师，找到通路祭坛。

Text.en:
Each chamber in Atzoatl has several walls which could potentially allow it to connect to another chamber. Some of these may already be connected, but many won't. If, during your Incursion, an enemy drops a Stone of Passage, you can pick it up and place it in an Altar of Passage, and it will connect the chamber you are in to an adjacent one.

This is important, because when you visit the Temple of Atzoatl during the present day, you may only be able to reach the chambers you managed to connect in the past!
Text.zh:
阿佐亚特的每个房间都有数道可能连接至其他房间的墙壁。有些已经连接了，而有些则还没有。如果在你的穿越期间，敌人掉落了通路灵石，你可以使其并将其放置在通路祭坛上，它会连接与你相邻的一个房间。

这非常重要，因为当你回到现今世界的阿佐亚特神庙，你将可能只会进入到你在过去连接好的房间。

Text.en:
Within each Incursion you can find two Vaal Architects. By slaying one, you will allow the other to escape and later develop that chamber in their own vision. If the surviving Architect had previously influenced the development of that room, that room will then be upgraded. If not, then that room will change to something within their realm of expertise.

For example, if you land in the Banquet Hall during an incursion and slay the Architect of Fortifications, allowing the Architect of Toxins to survive, the Banquet Hall will become the Poison Garden. If in a later Incursion you land in the Poison Garden and kill the Architect of Iron, again allowing the Architect of Toxins survive, it will be upgraded to the Cultivar Chamber.
Text.zh:
每次穿越你可以找到两名瓦尔建筑师。击败其中一名，另一名则会逃脱并根据他自己的视界来发展他的房间。如果存活下来的建筑师之前影响过他所逃往的房间，则该房间会被升级。若并非如此，该房间则会根据存活建筑师的专长而进行改变。

举例说明，如果你在穿越中抵达了宴会厅，击败了防御建筑师，并让剧毒建筑师活了下来。宴会厅就会变成烈毒花园。如果在随后的穿越中你抵达了烈毒花园，并击败了钢铁建筑师，并又饶了剧毒建筑师一命，则烈毒花园会升级为变种植园。

Text.en:
The types and tiers of the rooms you help engineer through your Incursions ultimately form the Temple of Atzoatl in the present day. 

Each room has a different effect. Some are purely positive, while others may put you at significant risk for valuable rewards. By upgrading the Cultivar Chamber to the Toxic Grove, for example, you will fill the Temple of Atzoatl with dangerously poisonous plants, but you will also give yourself the opportunity to loot a unique item that can be found nowhere else.
Text.zh:
穿越过程你的选择会最后影响现今世界中阿佐亚特神庙内房间的类别和层阶。

每个房间的效果都不同。有些很安全，有些则危险重重但奖励丰厚。举例说明，若将变种植园升级为毒林，则阿佐亚特神庙会遍布危险的剧毒植物，但你也会在其中找到独一无二的传奇物品。

Text.en:
Once you've performed enough Incursions, Alva will discover the location of Atzoatl, and will offer you the opportunity to go there. At long last, you can explore the temple you helped create, and loot it for all it's worth! 

After you've visited the temple in the present-day, the next time you find Alva in the world, she will offer you the opportunity to start your Incursions all over again, with a new temple layout and with new opportunities to maximise your rewards.
Text.zh:
当你穿越了多次后，阿尔瓦会发现阿佐亚特的位置，并让你有机会前往那里。最终，你可以探索受你影响后兴建的神庙，获取历史结下的果实！

在你探索了现今的阿佐亚特神庙后，下次你再遇到阿尔瓦，她会给你重新穿越的机会，再度创造历史，最大化你的宝藏之旅。

Text.en:
The Incursion league includes a set of 40 new challenges. When you complete 12 challenges, you will receive the Incursion Bandana. At 24, you will receive the Incursion Cloak. When you complete your 36th challenge, you will receive the Incursion Portal Effect. These cosmetic effects are only obtainable in this league. 

From the 19th challenge onwards and for every third challenge after that, you will receive pieces of the Incursion Totem Pole decoration to display in your Hideout. The Totem Pole permanently showcases how many of the Incursion challenges you completed during the league.
Text.zh:
《穿越》赛季包括 40 个全新挑战。当你完成其中 12 个，你会获得头部外观：穿越面罩；完成 24 个，你会获得背饰：穿越斗篷；完成 36 个，你会获得时空之门：穿。这些效果仅限此赛季区获得。

从第 19 个挑战开始，每完成 3 个挑战，你会获得穿越图腾柱来装饰你的藏身处。图腾柱永久存在，用于展示你在本赛季的穿越壮举。

Text.en: Passages which are already open are lit green, while closed passages are lit red.
Text.zh: 已经开启的通路会亮起绿光，而关闭的通路则是红光。

Text.en: Remember where in the chamber the architects are hidden so you don't spend too much time trying to find them!
Text.zh: 请记住建筑师的藏匿位置，这样就不用花费太多时间再次寻找他们！

Text.en: Each Incursion is an opportunity to incrementally shape Atzoatl for your future visit. Plan ahead!
Text.zh: 每次穿越都是逐渐重塑未来阿佐亚特神庙的机会，请仔细规划！

Text.en: Completing this map will yield additional powerful items.
Text.zh: 完成该地图可以获得额外的强力物品。

Text.en:
Delve into the infinite depths of the Azurite Mine to discover its ancient treasures.

<colour:red>{A character killed in Hardcore Delve becomes a Standard character.}

深入无尽的蓝晶矿坑深处，探索远古的宝藏。

独狼模式（地心探索专家）

Text.en: You do not have enough Azurite for this purchase.
Text.zh: 你的蓝晶不足，无法购买。

Text.en: Travel to the Timeworn Reliquary by using this item in a personal Map Device. Can only be used once.
Text.zh: 在私人地图装置中使用该物品，前往尘封圣物厅。只能被使用一次。

Text.en: You have insufficient Sulphite to reach this location.
Text.zh: 你的亚硫酸不足，无法抵达该区域。

Text.en:
Once you have broken the seal in Highgate and gained access to the mines below, you will begin to encounter veins of Voltaxic Sulphite throughout the world. When you interact with these Voltaxic Sulphite veins, a character called Niko will appear to mine it out of the ground for you. 

Niko operates a mine that was previously abandoned by the Eternal Empire, and wants your help obtaining enough Sulphite to help illuminate the mine. Once you have some Sulphite, you can visit his mine. There are three points of interest at the mine: Niko himself, the Subterranean Chart, and the Generator.
Text.zh:
当前的赛季区称为地心探险。在地心探险赛季区中，你将遭遇散布在世界各地的魔暴亚硫酸矿脉。当你跟魔暴亚硫酸矿脉互动时，一位名叫尼克的角色会立刻出现为你采集这些矿物。

尼克经营着一处被永恒帝国废弃的矿坑，只有在你的帮助下取得足够的亚硫酸矿才能照亮矿坑。一旦你取得一些亚硫酸矿，你就能拜访他的矿坑。矿坑中有三大看点：尼克、地下地图，以及发生器。

Text.en:
To access the mine itself, you need to use the Subterranean Chart device and select the point within the mine you wish to visit. Once there, you will appear next to a mobile machine called Crawler, which is powered by the Voltaxic Sulphite you have collected throughout the world. Use Crawler to select which adjacent area within the mine you would like to explore, and it will start moving in that direction. Be aware that this consumes some amount of Voltaxic Sulphite. 

Along the way to your destination you will encounter monsters and other paths into the dark depths of the mine, and at your destination you may find a difficult fight! Be careful when straying too far from Crawler, because the darkness in this mine is no ordinary darkness!
Text.zh:
要进入矿坑，你必须使用地下地图装置选择你要拜访的矿坑地点。一旦抵达，你会出现在一台名为引路矿车的移动机械旁边，它使用你从遍布世界各地的矿脉采集的魔暴亚硫酸驱动。使用引路矿车向选择的方向探索，它会朝你选择的方向移动。但留意别让魔暴亚硫酸燃尽。

在前往目的地途中，你将同怪物遭遇，并找到通向矿坑更深处的道路。在你的目的地将有一场艰难的战斗在等待着你！注意不要距离引路矿车太远，因为矿坑中的黑暗并非普通黑暗！

Text.en:
The darkness in this mine obscures your vision, but it also deals you damage. The damage grows the longer you stay in the darkness, so while short visits into the darkness might be OK, you won't be able to stay in there for long periods.

The monsters within the mine are also empowered by the darkness, and will take massively reduced damage while they dwell within it. Some of the monsters will even use the darkness as a weapon, shutting down nearby lights. But don't worry, you can create some weapons of your own!
Text.zh:
它不但会阻碍你的视野，还会给你造成伤害。这个伤害会伴随待在黑暗中的时间增长而增加，因此短暂停留在黑暗中不会造成大碍，但你无法在黑暗中待很长时间。

矿坑中的怪物同样被黑暗强化，它们在黑暗中会显著地受到更少的伤害。一些怪物甚至会将黑暗当作武器，切断周围的光源。但不用担心，你也能为自己打造一些武器。

Text.en:
With the Azurite you find in the mine you can craft and upgrade flares and dynamite.

Flares are portable light sources that can be thrown to specific locations and last for a short while. You won't get very far through the mine by just throwing flares -- you need Crawler's help for that -- but you can use them to explore areas near your pre-lit paths for valuable treasures.

Dynamite won't provide any light, but can be used to harm enemies and open up new paths. You'll encounter Fractured Walls throughout the mine that can be destroyed with a well-placed stick of dynamite.  Both of these items can be upgraded at the Generator, improving their effectiveness as well as the amount of each that you can carry. It's worth carrying a few on your character when you want to go treasure-hunting in the dark.
Text.zh:
你能用找到的蓝晶打造装备，升级照明弹和炸弹。

照明弹是一种便携性光源，能够投掷在特定的地点，并维持一小段时间。但你不能只靠照明弹深入矿坑。你需要引路矿车的帮助才能办到。但你能用它为珍贵的宝物照亮道路。

炸药并不能提供光照，但它能伤害敌人，并炸开新的道路。你能在矿坑中找到开裂的墙壁，它们能被适当安置的炸药摧毁。这两种装备都能在发生器升级，增强效能并增加携带数量。当你在黑暗中探寻宝物的时候，值得带上它们。

XBoxText.en:
With the Azurite you find in the mine you can craft and upgrade flares and dynamite. These can only be used within the Azurite Mine, and need to be bound to buttons like a skill.

Flares are portable light sources that can be thrown to specific locations and last for a short while. You won't get very far through the mine by just throwing flares -- you need Crawler's help for that -- but you can use them to explore areas near your pre-lit paths for valuable treasures.

Dynamite won't provide any light, but can be used to harm enemies and open up new paths. You'll encounter Fractured Walls throughout the mine that can be destroyed with a well-placed stick of dynamite.  Both of these items can be upgraded at the Generator, improving their effectiveness as well as the amount of each that you can carry. It's worth carrying a few on your character when you want to go treasure-hunting in the dark.
XBoxText.zh:
你能用找到的蓝晶打造装备，升级照明弹和炸弹。但只能在蓝晶矿坑中使用，并需要和按键绑定。

照明弹是一种便携性光源，能够投掷在特定的地点，并维持一小段时间。但你不能只靠照明弹深入矿坑。你需要引路矿车的帮助才能办到。但你能用它为珍贵的宝物照亮道路。

炸药并不能提供光照，但它能伤害敌人，并炸开新的道路。你能在矿坑中找到开裂的墙壁，它们能被适当安置的炸药摧毁。这两种装备都能在发生器升级，增强效能并增加携带数量。当你在黑暗中探寻宝物的时候，值得带上它们。

Text.en:
While it's fun to explore and slay monsters, the main reason you'll want to explore the Azurite Mine is for the Resonators. Resonators are special crafting items with sockets. They act like Chaos Orbs and come in several different sizes. To use one, you need to find Fossils to socket into them.

It's the Fossils that set Resonators apart from their currency counterparts. Each Fossil socketed into a Resonator in some way influences what the outcome will be when that Resonator is used on an item. See below for an example.
Text.zh:
除了探索和屠杀怪物的乐趣，你探索蓝晶矿坑最主要的原因是为了寻找共振器。共振器是特殊的镶孔锻造物品。它们作用的方式类似混沌石，但有一些区别。要使用它，你需要用化石给它镶孔。

正是化石将共振器从从硬通货中分离出来。每一种给共振器镶孔的化石都能影响共振器作用在物品上的结果。你可以在下面找到范例。

Text.en:
The Delve league includes a set of 40 new challenges. When you complete 12 challenges, you will receive the Canary pet. At 24, you will receive the Azurite Back Attachment. When you complete your 36th challenge, you will receive the Delve Portal. These cosmetic effects are only obtainable in this league. 

From the 19th challenge onwards and for every third challenge after that, you will receive pieces of the Delve Totem Pole decoration to display in your Hideout. The Totem Pole permanently showcases how many of the Delve challenges you completed during the league.
Text.zh:
《地心探索》赛季包括 40 个全新挑战。当你完成其中 12 个，你会获得宠物：金丝雀；完成 24 个，你会获得背饰：蓝晶；完成 36 个，你会获得时空之门：地心探索。这些效果仅限此赛季区获得。

从第 19 个挑战开始，每完成 3 个挑战，你会获得地心图腾柱来装饰你的藏身处。图腾柱永久存在，用于展示你在本赛季的地心探索壮举。

Text.en: Dangerous monsters and valuable treasures await you in the dark depths of the Azurite Mine.
Text.zh: 在蓝晶矿坑的黑暗深渊中，有无数恐怖的怪物和惊人的财富在等待你。

Text.en: Darkness is its own type of damage with its own resistance. You can gain more Darkness Resistance at the Generator.
Text.zh: 黑暗是一种带有抗性的伤害。你可以在发生器处获得更多黑暗抗性。

Text.en: It's a good idea to stay in the Crawler's light while moving to a new location.
Text.zh: 在移动到新地点的时候，逗留在引路矿车的光线范围内，是个不错的自保方法。

Text.en: Keep on the lookout for Resonators and Fossils. They're powerful crafting tools.
Text.zh: 注意查看共振器和化石的总计。它们都是强大的工艺工具。

Text.en: <colour:red>{We have detected suspicious activity on your account. You will be required to enter login unlock codes more often until you change your password.}
Text.zh: <colour:red>{我们侦测到了你账号的可疑举动。在修改密码之前，你可能会被要求多次输入解锁码。}

Text.en:
You may soon find strange patterns on your Atlas, such as swirling tentacles or glittering stars. These are indicators of whose influence those maps are under. Maps concealed by tentacles are under the influence of an entity called The Elder, while maps masked by stars are under the influence of The Shaper.

Each of these entities augment the maps they are influencing, either by adding extra monsters or making the boss fights more difficult. Completing a map that is influenced by one of these entities will remove the influence and may cause the other entity to influence that map instead.
Text.zh:
你很快将在异界图鉴上发现奇怪的图形，类似卷曲的触手或闪烁的星辰。它们暗示着那些潜在影响着地图的存在。隐藏在触手下的地图受到了裂界者的影响，而被星辰掩盖的地图则受到了塑界者的影响。

它们的影响给这些地图带来了额外的怪物或格外艰难的首领战。完成被它们之一影响的地图，可能会导致这个地图被它们中的另一位影响。

Text.en:
Completing other maps may also grow an entity's influence, though since the Shaper and Elder are at war with each other, you may not always get the outcome you want. If you want to grow The Elder's influence, your best bet may be to target Shaper-influenced areas or areas with no influence at all.

As The Elder's influence grows, you may find that several maps become inhabited by The Elder's guardians. Completing these maps involves tough boss encounters, but if you manage to do it, they may lead to The Elder itself.

Monsters in Shaper- or Elder-influenced maps can drop special versions of items that are also Elder- or Shaper-influenced. These items can roll special (and often very powerful) mods that are not ordinarily available.
Text.zh:
完成其他地图同样会增加它们的影响。由于塑界者同裂界者彼此处于战争之中，因此你无法总是取得你希望的结果。如果你想增加裂界者的影响，你最好将塑界者影响的地区作为目标，或者前往无任何影响的地区。

随着裂界者影响的增加，你会发现一些地区会变成裂界者守卫者的居住地。要完成这些地图将伴随艰难的首领战，并且这样的尝试可能会让你遭遇到裂界者本尊。

在塑界者和裂界者影响的地区会掉落特殊版本的物品，它们同样受到塑界者和裂界者的影响。这些物品拥有非常特殊（同时非常强力）的随机特性，这些特性不会通过普通方式获得。

Text.en: The Shaper (left) and Elder (right) are fighting for control of the Atlas.
Text.zh: 塑界者（左）和裂界者（右）在争夺异界图鉴的控制权。

Text.en: Elder and Shaper items have powerful mods no other items can obtain.
Text.zh: 塑界者和裂界者拥有着其他物品无法获得的强大词缀。

Text.en: Drops a flare at your feet which illuminates an area around it for a duration. Fades over time.
Text.zh: 在你脚下丢下一枚照明弹，会在一段时间内照亮该区域，照明弹逐渐变暗。

Text.en: Explodes at the target location after a small delay, damaging nearby enemies based on their rarity. Can be used to destroy Fractured Walls.
Text.zh: 短暂延迟后在目标区域爆炸，根据周围敌人的稀有度，对其造成伤害。可以用来摧毁分裂的墙体。

Text.en: <default>{Explore the Azurite Mine by Delving to encounters that are adjacent to ones you have previously completed. Longer Delves require more Voltaxic Sulphite to initiate.}
Text.zh: <default>{在你上一个完成的遭遇战旁，开启下一段遭遇战，来探索蓝晶矿坑。探索越长，需要的魔暴亚硫酸越多。}

XBoxText.en:
Delve
<smaller>{<default>{Explore the Azurite Mine by Delving to encounters that are adjacent to ones you have previously completed. Longer Delves require more Voltaxic Sulphite to initiate.}}
XBoxText.zh:
探索
<smaller>{<default>{在你上一个完成的遭遇战旁，开启下一段遭遇战，来探索蓝晶矿坑。探索越长，需要的魔暴亚硫酸越多。}}

Text.en: Complete Niko's quest to unlock this feature.
Text.zh: 完成尼克的任务来解锁该功能。

Text.en: Customize your endgame experience and fight the new Maven boss in Echoes of the Atlas. Sacrifice waves of enemies to grotesque shrines and earn powerful rewards in the new Ritual League.
Text.zh: 来自第三世界的恐怖双王降临，终局之战风云再启，加入我们并肩作战吧！T21双王来袭、异界图鉴重做、600+异界天赋点、古灵物品、罪恶枷锁、新技能新辅助、威力绝伦的新物品等待你的发现！

Text.en: You need to be in the Mine Encampment to buy upgrades.
Text.zh: 你需要在矿坑营地购买升级

Text.en: You can right-click on a Stash Tab in this dropdown list to send it to the far left.
Text.zh: 你可以在该下拉列表右键点击仓库页，将其送到最左边。

Text.en: Blow up Fractured Walls with Dynamite to find a path to this encounter.
Text.zh: 用炸药炸开分裂的墙体可以找到通往此遭遇战的道路。

Text.en: Complete Solo Delves at deeper and deeper depths to accumulate this streak. Once it gets to {0}, you can score on the Solo Ladder again. Having other party members join your Delves resets this streak.

Text.zh: 尼克钻开了一个矿井，你可以选择从这里探索地心。

Text.en: Complete Red Tier Maps to unlock more of these missions.
Text.zh: 完成红色等阶地图可解锁更多任务。

Text.en: Are you sure you want to teleport to this player's location?
Text.zh: 你确定要传送到该玩家的所在地？

Text.en: Click here to turn this mtx into a tradeable item.
Text.zh: 点击此处转化为可交易物品。

Text.en: Shaper-influenced Maps of Tier {0} or higher
Text.zh: 塑界者影响的地图等阶为 {0} 或更高

Text.en: Some graphics features will be disabled in Performance mode to achieve a smoother framerate.
Text.zh: 某些图形功能会在性能模式中被禁用，以此获得更流畅的帧率。

Text.en:
While not in a party this option will not affect you.
While in a party the party leader controls this option.
Text.zh:
不在队伍中时，该选项不会影响你。
位于队伍中时，队长将控制该选项。

Text.en: You will lose all fossils socketed into this item.
Text.zh: 你会失去所有镶嵌在该物品上的化石

Text.en: Drop item with fossils in it?
Text.zh: 要丢掉镶嵌有化石的这个物品？

Text.en: Fossils in items traded with an NPC will be lost.
Text.zh: 与NPC交易此物品，会失去所有其上的化石

Text.en:
Highlights Delve encounters within the current visible map that match the keywords you specify. 
You can use 'depth:x' to move the map to an active node at that depth.
You can press <b>{CTRL + F} as a shortcut
Please connect a controller that is paired to your account
Text.zh: 请连接与你账号配对的 DUALSHOCK®4 控制器
上限购买（仅限照明弹和炸药）

Text.en: Take this item to the Well of Souls to reveal the [Abyssalify|Desecrated Modifier]
Text.zh: 将此物品带到灵魂之井以显示[Abyssalify|渎灵词缀]。

Text.en: Place an item with an [Abyssalify|Unrevealed Desecrated Modifier] into the slot to reveal its options, then select one to be placed on the item.
Text.zh: 将一个带有[Abyssalify|未揭示的渎灵词缀]的物品放入插槽以揭示其选项，然后选择一个词缀放置到物品上。

Text.en:
Investigate, manipulate and take down the shadowy organisation called the Immortal Syndicate.

<colour:yellow>{This is the default Path of Exile league.}
Text.zh:
调查、操控并瓦解神秘的组织：不朽辛迪加。

<colour:yellow>{【推荐】体验最新赛季内容，赛季结束后数据会合入永久区。}

Text.en:
Investigate, manipulate and take down the shadowy organisation called the Immortal Syndicate.

<colour:red>{A character killed in Hardcore Betrayal becomes a Standard character.}
Text.zh:
调查、操控并瓦解被称为“不朽辛迪加”的隐秘组织。

<colour:red>{在专家模式中死亡的角色会被转移到标准模式的永久区。}
独狼模式（毁灭不朽专家）

Text.en: Can be obtained in Act 1. Check Nessa's store often while completing Act 1 Quests.
Text.zh: 可在第 1 章获得。完成第 1 章任务时，请经常查看奈莎的商店。

Text.en: Stop the Caravan before it reaches the end
Text.zh: 在车队抵达尽头之前阻止它

Text.en: Cannot open portals to the Safehouse because a portal is already being opened.
Text.zh: 无法开启通往安全屋的传送门，已经有一个传送门打开了。

Text.en: Cannot open portals to the Safehouse because you are not the map owner.
Text.zh: 无法开启通往安全屋的传送门，你不是地图的拥有者。

Text.en: Cannot open portals to the Safehouse because Jun is not present in the area.
Text.zh: 无法开启通往安全屋的传送门，琼目前没有出现在该区域。

Text.en: Cannot open Portals to the Safehouse from a Town.
Text.zh: 无法开启从城镇通往安全屋的传送门。

Text.en: Cannot open Portals to the Safehouse as you do not have the required amount of intelligence.
Text.zh: 无法开启通往安全屋的传送门，你所掌握的情报不足。

Text.en: Cannot open Portals to the Safehouse because there is not enough space at the current location. Walk to somewhere nearby with more room and try again.

你已经掌握了当前安全屋情报的 {0}%。

Text.zh: 警告：藏身处模板中有 1 个不可用装饰物。它不会被导入。

Text.zh: 警告：藏身处模板中有 {0} 个不可用装饰物。它们不会被导入。

Text.zh: 警告：藏身处模板还需要 1 个更多的  '{0}' 。它将不会被导入。
