Text.zh: 警告：藏身处模板还需要 {1} 个更多的  '{0}' 。它们将不会被导入。

Text.en: Cannot create item. The Blood Altar already has an item in it.
Text.zh: 魔物祭坛上已有物品，无法再创造物品。

Text.en: You can only itemise captured monsters inside your Menagerie.
Text.zh: 你只能在自己的魔物园中将捕获的魔物物品化。
已捕获的魔物物品化失败。

Text.en: Target item does not have enough mods.
Craft failed. Your prophecies are full.
Text.zh: 制作失败。你的预言已满。

Text.en: Craft failed. You have no prophecies to seal.
Text.zh: 制作失败。你没有可封印的预言。

Text.en: Your captured monster list is full, so another monster was deleted to make room.
Text.zh: 你捕捉的魔物已满，系统将去除一个魔物以腾出空间。

Text.en: Items in the Well of Souls slot cannot be modified.
Text.zh: 灵魂之井插槽中的物品无法被更改。

Text.en: Cannot Open a Portal to the Safehouse as you do not have a map device.
Text.zh: 无法开启通往安全屋的传送门，你没有地图装置。

Text.en: Cannot Open a Portal to the Safehouse as the Job selected is invalid.
Text.zh: 已选工作无效，无法开启从城镇通往安全屋的传送门。

Text.en: {0} imprisoned for 3 turns. +{1} {2} Intelligence per turn
Text.zh: {0} 被囚禁 3 回合。+{1} {2} 情报每回合

Text.en: {0} imprisoned for 3 turns. +{1} {2} Intelligence per turn. -1 rank on release
Text.zh: {0} 被囚禁 3 回合。+{1} {2} 情报每回合。释放后等级 -1

Text.en: {0} becomes leader of {2}. {0} and {1} become Rivals
Text.zh: {0} 变为 {2} 的首领。{0} 和 {1} 变成敌对
{1} 已从不朽辛迪加中被除名
{0} 已从不朽辛迪加中被除名

Text.en: +{1} rank(s) to {0}. {2} loses all ranks. {0} and {2} become Rivals
Text.zh: 为 {0} +{1} 等级。{2} 失去所有等级。{0} 和 {2} 变成敌对
所有的囚犯都被释放了。
摧毁 {0} 成员的所有道具

Text.en: Remove all rivalries in the Immortal Syndicate
Text.zh: 将不朽辛迪加的所有死敌除名

Text.en: +1 rank to {0} members. -1 rank to {1} members
Text.zh: {0} 成员等级 +1。{1} 成员等级 -1

Text.en: Drop an additional Rare Item with Veiled Mod
Text.zh: 丢下一个带有影匿词缀的额外稀有物品

Text.en: Clear the monsters from the area

Text.zh: {0} 每回合给 {1} 提供 {2} 情报。

Text.en: Select a modifier to place on the item
Text.zh: 选择一个属性放置在物品上

Text.en: Unable to open Map. Scarabs which cause the Map to contain Masters cannot be used if a Master is already being added from a Sextant or Atlas Objective.
Text.zh: 无法开启地图。若已从六分仪或异界图鉴添加过某个大师，则无法使用会使地图出现大师的圣甲虫。

Text.en: Unable to open Map. Scarabs cannot be used with Unique Maps.
Text.zh: 无法开启地图。圣甲虫不能用于传奇地图。

Text.en: Unable to open Map. The Map being opened already has a different Influence type.
Text.zh: 无法打开地图。开启的地图已经有一个另外的影响效果了。

Text.en: Unable to open Map. Maps cannot be opened with more than one of the same type of Scarab.
Text.zh: 无法开启地图。地图无法用多个相同类型的圣甲虫开启。

Text.en: To raid this Safehouse, talk to Jun in your Hideout or after a Syndicate encounter and click this button. You need room around you for six portals to appear.
Text.zh: 想要夺取安全屋，在你的藏身处与琼对话，或在辛迪加遭遇战后点击此按钮。你周围需要有足够的空间开启六个传送门。

Text.en: Craft as much as you can
Interrogate syndicate members to gain intelligence about their division's Safehouse. When a bar hits 100%, raid that Safehouse!
Text.zh: 审讯辛迪加成员来获得他们分部的安全屋情报。当进度条到达100%时，夺取该安全屋！

Text.en: A Syndicate member you haven't encountered yet.
Text.zh: 你还没有遭遇一个辛迪加成员

Text.en: The relationships of members in an encounter affect available options
Text.zh: 遭遇中的成员关系会影响现有选项

Text.en: Higher-rank members are more rewarding but more dangerous
Text.zh: 高级成员的奖励更多但更危险

Text.en: Items confer special abilities and make the fights more difficult
Text.zh: 物品会赋予特殊能力，让战斗更加困难。

Text.en: Item is an Elder or Shaper item.
Text.zh: 此为裂界者或塑界者物品。

Text.en: Learn about which Support Gems work well with this skill
Text.zh: 了解哪个辅助宝石可以和此技能有效联动

Text.en: Item must be a single Divination Card.
Text.zh: 物品必须为单张的命运卡。

Text.en: Command can only be used in Town or in a Hideout.
Text.zh: 该指令只能在城镇或藏身处使用。

Text.en: Leaving this area may allow the Immortal Syndicate members to escape from the Safehouse, requiring you to gather more intelligence to track them down again. Are you sure you want to leave this area?
Text.zh: 离开此区域会让不朽辛迪加的成员逃离安全屋。那样你就要收集更多的情报来再次寻找他们。你确定要离开此区域吗？

Text.en: You are already dealing with another stash. Complete that one first before moving on.
Text.zh: 请完成当前进度再继续。

Text.en: You cannot replace multiple crafted modifiers
Text.zh: 你无法更换多个工艺属性

Text.en: All items in the Synthesiser must be Fractured.
Text.zh: 所有幻境之台上的道具必须为分裂之物。

Text.en: All items in the Synthesiser must be Rare.
Text.zh: 所有幻境之台上的道具必须为稀有。

Text.en: All items in the Synthesiser must be the same Item Class.
Text.zh: 所有幻境之台上的道具必须为同类物品。

Text.en: One or more of the items in the Synthesiser is not a valid Item Class.
Text.zh: 幻境之台上的一个或多个物品的种类不同。

Text.en: You are trying to Synthesise too few items. You require at least 2 Fractured items to Synthesise.
Text.zh: 你要合成的道具太少了。需要至少 2 个分裂之物才能合成。

Text.en:
The Synthesiser will <colour:red>{destroy} all Fractured Items input for Synthesising.

These items will be combined into a new Synthesised item which will have one or more Implicit Modifiers based on the destroyed Fractured Items.
The number of Synthesised Implicit Modifiers is based on the number of Fractured Modifiers on destroyed Items.
The type and values of Synthesised Implicit Modifiers are based on all of the explicit Modifiers on destroyed Items.
Text.zh:
幻境之台会<colour:red>{摧毁} 所有分裂之物后再进行合成。

这些道具将被组合成一个全新的幻境道具，基于被摧毁的分裂之物，新道具将会拥有一个或更多的基底属性。
幻境道具的基底属性数量将基于被摧毁物品的分裂之体属性。
幻境道具的基底属性类别和数值将基于被摧毁物品的外延属性。

XBoxText2.en: First Time Login
XBoxText2.zh: 首次登录

PlaystationText.en: First Time Login
PlaystationText.zh: 首次登录

XBoxText2.en: There is no Path of Exile account associated with your Microsoft account. Do you want to create one?
XBoxText2.zh: 并没有找到跟您的微软账号关联的账号。需要现在创建一个吗？

PlaystationText.en: There is no Path of Exile account associated with your account on PlayStation<font:'quikhand'>{™}Network. Do you want to create one?
PlaystationText.zh: 没有与您的PlayStation<font:'quikhand'>{™}Network关联的《流放之路》账号。是否创建账号？

Text.en:
<colour:yellow>{Warning:} You are about to migrate your last character out of this league.  Use the 'Migrate All' option if you wish to transfer all league progress and stashes.
<colour:red>{This operation can not be undone.}
Text.zh:
<colour:yellow>{警告：} 你即将把最后一个角色移出本赛季。如果你想要转移所有赛季进度和仓库页，请使用“转化(全部)”选项。
<colour:red>{该操作不可撤销。}

Text.en:
Stabilise Cavas' memories before they decay, then chain them together to reach valuable rewards.

<colour:yellow>{This is the default Path of Exile league.}
Text.zh:
在卡瓦斯的回忆朽坏之前将其稳定，随后拼接回忆，获得丰厚奖励。

<colour:yellow>{【火爆】体验最新赛季内容，赛季结束后数据会合入永久区。}

Text.en:
Stabilise Cavas' memories before they decay, then chain them together to reach valuable rewards.

<colour:red>{A character killed in Hardcore Synthesis becomes a Standard character.}
Text.zh:
在卡瓦斯的回忆朽坏之前将其稳定，随后拼接回忆，获得丰厚奖励。

<colour:red>{在专家模式中死亡的角色会自动转移至标准模式。}
独狼模式（虚空忆境专家）

Text.en: Complete Cavas's quests to unlock the Memory Nexus
Text.zh: 完成卡瓦斯的任务来解锁回忆枢纽

Text.en: Click to travel to your Memory Nexus
Text.zh: 点击并前往你的回忆枢纽

XBoxText.en: Select to travel to your Memory Nexus
XBoxText.zh: 选择前往你的回忆枢纽

Text.en: Using this currency is forbidden in the unique tab.
Text.zh: 在这个页签中不能使用此通货。

Text.en: Interact to stabilise the Distant Memory
Text.zh: 与之互动来稳定遥远回忆

Text.en: Item already has a similar modifier
Text.zh: 物品已有一个相近的属性
与之互动来放置一段回忆

Text.en: Are you sure you want to erase this memory?
Cannot join group because the active user is not signed in
Text.zh: 活跃用户尚未登录，无法加入小队
与之互动来进入首领战

Text.en:
<colour:yellow>{Memory Not Awarded}
You must be present when the
first Memory Stabiliser is activated.
Text.zh:
<colour:yellow>{回忆未得到奖励}
你必须在第一个回忆稳定器激活时
在它身旁。

Text.en: The tier of the Map that you are opening does not match the tier of that Map on your Atlas. Elder and his Guardians will not drop items if killed and will not be removed from your Atlas. Shaper and Elder influenced monsters will also not spawn. Are you sure you want to open this Map?
Text.zh: 你当前打开的地图等阶与异界图鉴不符。击败裂界者和它的守卫不会掉落物品，也不会从你的异界图鉴中移除。塑界者和裂界者所影响的怪物也不会刷新。你确定要打开这个地图吗？
无法用于虚空忆境物品。

Text.en: Cannot split an Item with an Enchant or Catalyst Quality.
Text.zh: 无法分割有附魔或催化剂的物品。

Text.en: Cannot split Influenced, Fractured, Synthesised Items.
Text.zh: 无法分割塑界者、裂界者、分裂之物或幻境物品。

Text.en:
You were not automatically logged in to your invited game session because the previous character you logged in with is not in the <bold>{{{0}}} league.
Please select an existing character in the <bold>{{{0}}} league, or create a new character in the <bold>{{{0}}} league.
Text.zh:
你没有自动进入被邀请的游戏进程，因为你之前登录的角色不在 <bold>{{{0}}} 赛季区。
请选择一个属于 <bold>{{{0}}} 赛季区的角色，或在 <bold>{{{0}}} 赛季区中创建一个。

Text.en:
You were not automatically logged in to your invited game session because you have no characters in the <bold>{{{0}}} league.
Please create a new character in the <bold>{{{0}}} league.
Text.zh:
你没有自动进入被邀请的游戏进程，因为你之前在 <bold>{{{0}}} 赛季区中没有角色。
请在 <bold>{{{0}}} 赛季区中创建一个新角色。
无法自动加入游戏进程

Text.en: You were not automatically logged in to your invited game session because the other members of the group are not yet in-game.
Text.zh: 你没有自动进入被邀请的游戏进程，因为其他队友还没有进入游戏。

Text.en: Please create your first character in order to proceed with Play Together.
Text.zh: 请创建你的第一个角色，这样才能享受“与好友同乐”功能。

Text.en: Interact to select a Memory, applying a Modifier to it and all Memories placed next to it
Text.zh: 与之互动来选择一段回忆，在其上和所有放置在其旁边的回忆上添加一个属性

Text.en: You were not automatically logged in to your invited game session because the inviter is in a Solo Self-Found league that does not support multiplayer.
Text.zh: 你没有自动进入被邀请的游戏进程，因为邀请者在自力模式中，该模式不支持多人游戏。

Text.en: Play Together cannot be started from a Solo Self-Found league because it does not support multiplayer.
Text.zh: 无法在自力模式下启动“与好友同乐”功能，自力模式不支持多人游戏。

Text.en:
Interact to cause this Memory to rapidly Decay
Items collected by Decay will be moved here
Text.zh:
与之互动来使该回忆迅速朽坏
朽坏过程中所收集的物品会移动至此

Text.en: Interact to open Memory Map or return to Nexus
Text.zh: 与之互动来打开回忆地图或返回回忆枢纽

Text.en:
Highlights blocks within the map and queue that match the keywords you specify. Mods of those blocks are also searched. 

Tips:
<default>{- Type multiple keywords by separating them with a space
- Search for block level by typing lvl:X
- You can press <b>{CTRL + F} as a shortcut}
Text.zh:
高亮地图内匹配你指定关键词的区块和队列。同时也会搜索这些区块的词缀。

小提示：
<default>{- 输入多个关键字，并使用空格分隔
- 输入 lvl:X 来搜索区块的等级
- 你可以按下<b>{CTRL + F} 来作为快捷键}

Text.en:
Combine this item with two Rare Fractured items of the same item class
at the Synthesiser in the Memory Nexus
Text.zh:
在回忆枢纽的忆境之台
来用相同种类的两个稀有分裂之体来合成此物品

任务失败
{0} 个稳定器已经朽坏

Text.en: You now have the maximum number of unplaced Memory Fragments. Visit the Memory Nexus to place some.
Text.zh: 未放置的回忆碎片已经达到上限。请去回忆枢纽进行放置。

任务失败
1 个稳定器已经朽坏

Text.en: This memory has only one charge left and will start to decay upon being entered.
Text.zh: 该回忆只剩下一层，一旦进入，便会开始朽坏。

Text.en:
Note:
Right click to erase memories from the map
Text.zh:
提示：
右键点击来抹除地图上的回忆

Text.en: Release the Target. You will gain no Intelligence and there will be no change to the Syndicate.
Text.zh: 释放目标。你不会获得情报，辛迪加组织也不会有任何改变。

Text.en: Are you sure you want to release the target? You will gain no Intelligence and there will be no change to the Syndicate.
Text.zh: 你确定要释放目标吗？如果这么做，你将不会获得情报，辛迪加组织也不会有任何改变。

Text.en:
Placed Memories<default>{<size:20>{<i>{
Right click to erase memories from the map or queue}}}
Text.zh:
放置回忆<default>{<size:20>{<i>{

Text.en:
When viewing your Atlas you may notice that some maps have large symbols around them. These are Atlas Objectives. Each objective signifies that opening and entering that map will guarantee an encounter with one of the masters.

Each symbol represents the presence of a specific master:
Text.zh:
当你浏览异界图鉴时，你可以注意到有些地图上有大型符号。它们是异界图鉴目标。开启进入这样的地图必定会遭遇到符号的主人。

每一种符号都代表一种特定的主人：

Text.en:
This special property is unique to your Atlas -- a party member can't benefit from the objectives on your Atlas.

The objectives are consumed as soon as you open the associated map. New objectives are guaranteed to appear once a day, but you also have a chance to generate a new objective whenever you complete a map.

New objectives select maps based on the tier of your last completed map, within two tiers. In other words, if you complete a tier 10 map, a new objective may appear on a tier 9, 10 or 11 map. The exceptions are tier 1 maps (which can cause objectives to appear on tiers 1, 2 or 3) and tier 16 maps (which can cause objectives to appear on tiers 14, 15, and 16). They favour maps you have previously completed but may appear on maps not yet revealed.

So if you're looking to find more Voltaxic Sulphite or just want to hunt beasts with Einhar, check your Atlas. You may have a friend waiting for you!
Text.zh:
该特性只对你的异界图鉴生效，队伍成员无法通过你的异界图鉴获利。

只要你打开合作地图，异界图鉴目标就会被消耗。新的异界图鉴目标每天必定出现一次，但只要完成一张地图，就会有一定几率出现新的异界图鉴目标。

新异界图鉴目标出现的地图由你最后完成的地图位阶来决定，上下浮动两阶。换言之，如果你完成了一张 10 阶地图，那么新异界图鉴目标就可能会出现在 9 阶、10 阶、11 阶的地图上。但有例外：1 阶地图的新异界图鉴目标可能会出现在 1 阶、2 阶或 3 阶的地图上，16 阶地图可能会出现在 14 阶、15 阶或 16 阶地图上。它们偏爱你在先前已经完成过的地图，但也会出现在尚未探索过的地图上。

因此，如果你乐于寻找更多魔爆亚硫酸，或者喜欢跟伊恩哈尔一起狩猎，那就查看你的异界图鉴吧。你会找到朋友的！

Text.en:
Once you have met Jun Ortoi, you will begin encountering the Immortal Syndicate. If you manage to defeat an Immortal Syndicate member, they may drop a Veiled Item. Veiled Items are special rare items with Veiled Modifiers - modifiers masked by ancient magic that only Jun Ortoi can reveal.

When Jun unveils the modifier, you'll be presented with three different options for what that modifier will ultimately be. Not only are many of these modifiers very powerful, but unveiling them allows you to craft those modifiers using your Crafting Bench in your Hideout! So your choice is very important, even if you have no plans to use the item it appears on.
Text.zh:
一旦你遇到琼·奥特伊，你就会开始遭遇到不朽辛迪加。只要设法击败一名不朽辛迪加的成员，他们就会掉落一件加密物品。这是一种特殊的稀有物品，具有加密属性，它们被上古魔法笼罩，只有琼·奥特伊能够破解。

一旦琼解密属性，你会有三个不同的选择来决定该属性最后到底是什么。这些属性不但非常强力，你还可以在藏身处的工艺台来锻造这些属性！因此，即便你不打算使用，也请谨慎选择。

Text.en:
Veiled modifiers often have multiple tiers, however all tiers of a modifier will be unlocked for crafting when unveiled for the first time. Once you have unlocked a Veiled modifier for crafting, it will be available for all of the characters you create in that league. 

Additionally, some modifiers can only appear on items from specific Immortal Syndicate members. You can check whether a Veiled modifier is from a certain member before you unveil it by looking at the advanced modifier description (enabled in the Options menu).

One final thing to consider: even if you have unlocked all the Veiled modifiers you want, Veiled items still have value -- to other players! Some players may pay a premium for items that have not yet been unveiled, so that they can rapidly learn the recipes! Consider selling Veiled items to other players!
Text.zh:
加密属性一般都有多个位阶，但只要首次解密就能解锁所有位阶。解锁之后，你在该赛季创建的所有角色都可以用其进行工艺锻造。

有些属性只存在于特定的不朽辛迪加成员掉落的物品上。有些属性只存在于特定的不朽辛迪加成员掉落的物品上。当你通过查看属性详情来解锁之前（在设定中开启），你会看到它是否来自特定的成员。最后，即便你需要的全部属性都已经解锁，加密物品也并没有失去价值，它可以出售给其他玩家！有些玩家会花一大笔钱寻求尚未解锁的物品，立刻学会其中的配方！考虑一下吧，这绝对物有所值！

Text.en:
Collect samples from slain monsters in this area. Combine five different samples to manifest a powerful enemy.

Each sample must be of a different body part. The resulting enemy will use skills from each creature used to create it. With a full meter and a Map Boss sample, the defeated Metamorph will also drop a special sample that can be traded or used in Tane's Laboratory.
Text.zh:
从该区域被击败的怪物身上收集样本。混合五种不同的样本可以创造一个强大的敌人。

每种样本必须是不同的。最后生成的怪物会使用每个原始怪物的技能。用所有样本和一个地图首领样本的灾变体，在击败后会掉落一个可以在丹恩的实验室使用的特殊样本，也可用于交易。

Text.en: You cannot begin a Metamorph encounter here.
Text.zh: 你不能在这里开始灾变遭遇战。

Text.en:
<red>{Your Atlas has been reset. Maps can only drop at the tier they are on your Atlas. Running old maps may result in you finding no maps.}

<white>{Completing old maps will unlock all maps below that tier, but will not automatically grant you quest progression in the new storyline. This means that you must upgrade your Atlas by exploring it and completing the questline before high-tier maps can drop again.}
Text.zh:
<red>{异界图鉴已重置。只会掉落跟异界图鉴相符位阶的地图。重推旧地图不会掉落新地图。}

<white>{完成旧地图会解锁该位阶以下的所有地图，但不会给你新剧情线的任务进度。因此在获得高阶地图前，赶紧完成任务线，给异界图鉴升级吧。}

Text.en:
Highlights items that match the keywords you specify. 

Tips:
<default>{- Type multiple keywords by separating them with a space
- Combine space-separated text into a single keyword by enclosing it in quotation marks. e.g "alert level reduction" or "requires deception" 
- Search for item level by typing ilvl:X
- Regular expressions are supported
- You can press <b>{CTRL + F} as a shortcut}

技巧:
<default>{- 多个条件可以用空格隔开

- 你可以用<b>{CTRL + F}作为快捷键}

Some rewards will only be revealed after completing several Rituals.
Ritual rewards change between areas unless they are deferred.

在驱灵仪式中消灭怪物可以获得贡品，用于在驱灵仪式完成时取得奖励。

<bigger>{<title>{Ritual Favours}}
Slay monsters during a Ritual to earn Tribute.
Tribute can be spent on rewards after the Ritual is complete.

Some rewards will only be revealed after completing several Rituals.
Ritual rewards change between areas unless they are deferred.

如非延时，驱灵仪式奖励会在不同地区之间改变。

Text.en:
Trinity:
Affinity is a buff granted by the Trinity skill. There are three types of Affinity: Fire, Cold and Lightning. You can have a maximum of 100 of each type of Affinity.

You lose 10 Affinity per second of specific types if you haven't gained Affinity of that type in the past 8 seconds.
Text.zh:
三位一体：
亲和是三位一体技能提供的增益状态，包含三种类型：火焰、冰霜和闪电。每种类型的亲和最多可累积 100 点。

如果你在过去 8 秒内没有获得某一类型的亲和，则会每秒失去该类型的 10 点亲和。

Text.en: Refers to the Delirium league. Can be randomly encountered in areas as a "mirror" you walk through or applied to Maps with special currency orbs. Delirium encounters coat the area in a fog, straying deeper into the fog increases the strength of monsters but offers valuable rewards.
Text.zh: 指惊悸迷雾赛季。该赛季可以让您在游戏途中遭遇惊悸迷雾之镜（或者在地图上使用特殊的同通货物品），将一片区域笼罩在迷雾之中，展开惊悸迷雾遭遇战。深入迷雾会遭遇越来越强的怪物，获取丰厚的奖励。

Text.en: Refers to the Legion league. Legion monoliths can be randomly encountered and, when interacted with, reveal two opposing armies frozen in time. Break them out of their stasis within the given time to fight them in their true forms or unlock rare chests.
Text.zh: 指战乱之殇赛季。该赛季可以让您在游戏途中随机遇到战乱之殇石碑。与之互动会出现两支彼此交战的大军。打破他们的时间禁锢，战胜他们，就可以获得稀有的宝藏。

Text.en: Introduced in the Heist league. Gathering a team of Rogues, plan and execute heists by infiltrating various facilities and looting what you can without triggering the alarm, then escaping before the guards can stop you.
Text.zh: 指夺宝奇兵赛季。该赛季可以让您募集赏金猎人，率领他们在各地展开夺宝冒险，并在触发警报前带着宝藏逃出生天。

Text.en: Refers to the Harvest league, can be encountered in map areas as a blue portal. Inside the portal are sets of two seed plots to choose from, each offering different monsters to fight and rewards. These rewards offer very powerful crafting methods in limited quantities, not found anywhere else in Wraeclast.
Text.zh: 指古灵庄园赛季。该赛季可以让您在地图上偶遇传送门，前往古灵庄园。您可以在那里开垦土地，击败怪物，赢取奖励。它可以为您提供数种强有力的工艺配方，它们在瓦尔克拉斯的其它地方绝对找不到。

Text.en: Refers to the interface used during the mapping endgame. Used to track map completion progress, level up or modify your maps and unlock boss encounters.
Text.zh: 指游戏后期推图需要的交互界面。您可以用它跟踪地图完成进度，升级地图，调整地图，以及解锁首领遭遇战。

Text.en: Refers to the Ritual altars found in some areas. When activated, a small inescapable arena is formed. Kill waves of monsters and survive the Ritual's unique hazards to purchase rewards with Tribute gathered from the encounter. Multiple Ritual's can be found in an area and get progressively harder but offer stronger rewards as you complete them.
Text.zh: 您可以在游戏途中找到驱灵祭坛，启动它会产生一系列战斗。只要您在接踵而来的战斗中存活，就可以用从中取得的贡品换取奖励。您可以在同一个地区找到多场驱灵仪式，但每一场都会比上一场更强。

Text.en: Usually refers to the monster created during a Metamorph encounter. Once you've collected all five types of organs in a map you can use Tane's vat to customize and spawn your very own monster to kill! Rewards and difficulty are decided by the quality of organs used so choose carefully.
Text.zh: 一般指灾变遭遇战中创造的怪物。只要您在地图中集齐五种脏器，就可以用丹恩的装置创造一名供您挑战的独特怪物。使用不同的脏器可以获得不同种类的奖励。

Text.en: Refers to the tower-defense encounters found in maps, Sister Cassia can be found next to yellow fungal growths which are used to start the encounter. Trails of roots will emerge with portals housing monsters at the ends. Building towers at specific points along the trail, and your own power, you must stop the monsters from reaching the growth in the center.
Text.zh: 指游戏途中遇到的塔防遭遇战。您可以在正在生长的黄色真菌附近找到卡西娅修女来启动这种遭遇战。您需要在蔓延的根茎上同不断涌现的怪物作战，通过建造防御塔，并利用您自己的力量阻止怪物们抵达中央正在生长的真菌。

Text.en: Refers to the missions associated with the Veiled Master, Jun Ortoi. Neutralize and interrogate members of the Immortal Syndicate for loot and to build intelligence towards tracking down the mastermind of the group.
Text.zh: 指加密大师琼发布的任务。您需要根据任务摆平不朽辛迪加成员，搜集奖励，网罗情报，追查幕后首脑。

Text.en: An endless dungeon associated with the Master of the Depths, Niko. Collect Voltaxic Sulphite from areas and missions in order to power the Crawler and plunder the dark depths of the Azurite Mines.
Text.zh: 指跟地心大师尼克有关的无尽地下城。您需要在区域和任务中收集魔爆亚硫酸，给引路矿车供能，在蓝晶矿坑深处取得丰厚回报。

Text.en: Refers to the portals found in some areas and missions associated with the Master Explorer, Alva. Go back in time to alter the present by killing mini-bosses and opening doors within the Incursion. After completing twelve of these, the location of the Temple of Atzoatl is revealed with all the alterations you made during the incursions.
Text.zh: 指跟探索大师阿尔瓦有关的传送门任务。您可以穿越时间，回到过去消灭首领，开启大门供今日通行。完成十二次穿越行动可以找到阿佐亚特神庙的所在。并且您在过去的所有行动都会影响现在。

Text.en: Immortal spirits which summon and empower waves of monsters. Each monster killed reduces the Harbinger's life.
Text.zh: 它们是可以不断召唤怪物并为之供能的不朽精魂。消灭它们召唤的怪物可以削弱先驱者自己的生命力。

Text.en: Special monsters found during Bestiary missions, associated with the Beastmaster, Einhar Frey. Once defeated, Einhar will capture the beasts and take them to his Menagerie where you can use them as materials for powerful crafting at the Blood Altar.
Text.zh: 指猎魔任务中出现的特殊怪物，这种任务由魔兽大师伊恩哈尔提供。击败魔物后，伊恩哈尔会把它们抓到魔物园。您可以在那里的鲜血祭坛上用它们炼化物品。

Text.en: Open the eye of the storm.
The sky falls. The land burns.
Text.zh: 天空坠落， 大地燃烧。
元素？你说那个温温凉凉刺刺的？

Text.en: The past shall serve the present.
Text.zh: 过去的一切是为了更好的明天。

Text.en: Shroud your path in the fog of war.
Text.zh: 用战争迷雾垄罩你的道路。

Text.en:
Choose an Archnemesis Modifier you have collected and Empower this petrified monster with its properties. If you can defeat this foe, you will receive the rewards bestowed by the Modifier.

Subsequent petrified monsters in this area will inherit all Modifiers that have been applied so far in this area, compounding their difficulty and rewards.

Certain Modifiers can be combined together in Recipes, yielding exclusive Modifiers that can't be found from monsters. Many of these exclusive recipe Modifiers can then be combined together to form further recipes.

Modifiers you have that can currently be used in a Recipe are indicated with borders. The more intense the border, the more complex the recipe is.

Each type of Modifier can only be applied once per area.
Text.zh:
选择一个收集的罪恶枷锁词缀，用它的属性强化冻结的怪物。击败它可以获得词缀赋予的奖励。

依次强化该区域的冻结怪物会继承之前添加的词缀，增加难度和回报。

可以用配方合成更强的词缀，它们无法从怪物处获得。许多合成的词缀还能进一步合成更强的配方。

在当前配方中可用的词缀有修饰边框。边框浓度代表了它的复杂度。

每种类型的词缀在一个区域内只能添加一次。

Text.en:
Place and remove Filaments on the Sentinel Controller to control the flow of power between Runic Nodes. You can change your Controller layout as much as you want without any cost.

As you kill enemies empowered by your Sentinels, you gain progress towards unlocking additional power units, which will automatically flow through the Filaments you have placed.

Power additional Sentinel Slots to gain access to multiple Sentinels per area. You must have at least one Sentinel Slot powered at all times.

Sentinel Slots and some powerful Runic Nodes require multiple Filaments and hence multiple power units to activate.
Text.zh:
在近卫控制器上放置并移除线路，以控制符文节点之间的能量流动。你可以免费随意改变控制器布局。

当杀死得到你的近卫强化的敌人时，你会进一步解锁额外能量单元，这些能量单元将自动通过你放置的线路流动。

为额外近卫槽充能，以在各区域得到多个近卫。在任何时候均需为至少一个近卫槽充能。

近卫槽和一些强大的符文节点需要多个线路，因此需要多个能量单元来激活。

Text.en:
Consume a Power Core to Assemble a new, fully-charged Sentinel from two depleted ones.

The base type and properties of the new Sentinel are randomly picked from those of the two input Sentinels.

There's a chance of special permutations occurring, such as the base type or modifiers being exclusive new ones, or even a Unique Sentinel being created. Certain Power Cores raise the chance of these permutations occurring.
Text.zh:
消耗一个力量核心，将两个耗尽能量的近卫组装成一个新的充满能量的近卫。

新近卫的基础类型和属性从两个输入近卫的基础类型和属性中随机选取。

有可能会出现特殊的排列，比如独特的基础类型或新词缀，甚至产生一个传奇近卫。某些力量核心增加了这些排列发生的几率。

Text.en: At least one Sentinel Slot must be allocated
Text.zh: 必需分配至少一个近卫槽

Text.en: Your Sentinel Controller now has {} total power units
Text.zh: 你的近卫控制器现在总共有{}个能量单位

Text.en: Sentinel Configuration locked in until next area
Text.zh: 近卫配置已锁定，直至下个区域

Text.en:
Consume a Recombinator to combine two items of the same class together, creating a new item whose properties are randomly picked from the two input items.

There's a chance of the resultant item gaining exclusive modifiers that don't normally occur on that item type.
Text.zh:
使用重组器将两个相同类别的物品组合在一起，产生一个新物品，其属性从两个输入物品中随机选取。

生成的物品有可能获得该物品类型中通常不会出现的独有词缀。

Text.en: Items with Skin Transfers applied cannot be combined.
Text.zh: 使用了皮肤转移的物品不能组合。

Text.en:
Apply Reflections to empty Tiles on your Mirrored Tablet. Some options allow you to move or swap the Entrance, Water Tiles or Reflections you have placed.
Once the Tablet is full, you can travel to the Lake of Kalandra, which will manifest the Reflections you have chosen.
The difficulty and rewards of a Reflection are based on how far away it is from the Entrance.
Once you're in Maps, you can itemise a completed Mirrored Tablet to be stored for later or traded to other players.
Text.zh:
将镜像放到镜像桌台的空白瓦片上。有些选项允许你移动或交换入口、水瓦片或者已经放置的镜像。
镜像桌台放满之后，你就可以前往卡兰德之湖，并会呈现你选择的镜像。每个镜像的难度和奖励取决于它离入口的距离。
在地图中，你可以将已经完成的镜像桌台变为一个物品存放起来，以便之后使用或者卖给其他玩家。

Text.en: On widescreen displays, this option moves various user interface elements such as the life/mana orbs closer to the centre of the screen so that they can more easily be seen in your peripheral vision while playing.

Text.en:
Your account has been detected trading in-game items or progress for real money. Trading items or accounts for external currency (including currencies used on external trading forums) or real world value is not allowed and can lead to your account being banned.

We take Real Money Trading very seriously because it damages Path of Exile's economy and undermines the fairness of the game. It's not fair for other players who earn their progress by playing the game properly.

In this case, we have reduced your ban to a warning. We will keep an eye on your account in the future. If you have any questions about this, please contact support@grindinggear.com.
Text.zh:
你的账号已被检测到用真实货币交易游戏内物品或提升。你不得使用外部货币（包括在外部交易论坛中使用的货币）或现实世界价值物品来交易物品或账号，否则账号可能会被封禁。

我们严肃对待现金交易，这会损害《流放之路》的经济体系，削弱游戏的公平性，并对其他通过正常游戏获得提升的玩家而言极不公平。

在此情况下，我们会将封禁处罚改为警告。我们未来会密切关注你的账号。如果你对此抱有任何疑问，请联系support@grindinggear.com。

Text.en: Ruthless is a significantly different game experience with extreme item scarcity. Are you sure you want to create a Ruthless character?
Text.zh: 无情模式将会带来与一般游戏极为不同的游戏体验，各类道具会变得极为稀少。你确定要创建一个无情模式角色吗?

Text.en:
<bigger>{<title>{Trial of the Sekhemas}}
The Trial of the Sekhemas will pit you against ancient tests. Those that endure these tests can reap great rewards. The Trials require a Barya to participate.

Completing these trials can earn [AscendancyPoints|Ascendancy Skill Points].

Damage you take in the Trial impacts your [Honour]. Lost Honour persists between trials.
Losing all your Honour fails the Trial. This is not considered dying for your character.

<bigger>{<title>{Relics}}
Relics influence various aspects of the Trial to make it easier. Your Relics persist between Trials.
<yellow>{Selected Relics cannot be changed while you have an active Trial.}

Relics have varying dimensions, so arrange them carefully to maximise your benefits.

You can unlock more Relic slots by killing bosses deeper into the Trials.

Spare Relics can be stored in the Relic Locker or any of your personal stash tabs.
Text.zh:
<bigger>{<title>{丝克玛试炼}}
在丝克玛试炼中，你将面对上古时期的挑战。能够通过试炼的勇士可以获得丰厚的奖赏。参与丝克玛试炼时需要一枚硬币。

完成试炼可以获得[AscendancyPoints|升华点数]。

在试炼中受到伤害时，你的[Honour|荣誉]会受到影响。失去的荣誉可以在多场试炼中保留。
失去所有荣誉会导致试炼失败，但不会视作角色遭到击败。

<bigger>{<title>{遗物}}
遗物影响了试炼的方方面面，来使你的旅途更加轻松。你的遗物可以在多场试炼中保留。
<yellow>{激活一场试炼之后，就无法改变选择的遗物。}

遗物具有不同的维度，你必须谨慎选择才能充分发挥它的作用。

你可以通过击败试炼深处的首领来解锁更多的遗物插槽。

多余的遗物可以存放在遗物陈列柜或你的任意个人仓库页中。

Text.en:
Please note that dead Hardcore characters cannot be restored for any reason (including game bugs or internet lag).

Also, Ruthless is a significantly different game experience with extreme item scarcity. Hardcore Ruthless characters that die are voided and are no longer playable.

Are you sure you want to create a Hardcore Ruthless character?
Text.zh:
注意！专家模式的角色死亡后将无法以任何理由复原（包括网络延迟、游戏错误或漏洞等等）。

此外，无情模式将会带来与一般游戏极为不同的游戏体验，各类道具会变得极为稀少。专家无情模式的角色死亡后将被清空并无法游玩。

你确定要创建专家无情模式的角色吗?

Text.en:
This map shows your current progress on this floor of the Trial of the Sekhemas. Your journey will take you on a path from the entrance of the floor to the boss room on the right; you can't double back to enter previous rooms.

You can see a few rooms ahead, which will help you make a choice about what path to take. Your run ends if you lose all your [Honour] or Life.

Some rooms are Afflicted, and will apply Afflictions to you when you enter them.
Text.zh:
这个地图展示了你在本层丝克玛试炼的当前进度。你的旅途将带你从层级入口通往右边的首领房间；你不能返回之前进入过的房间。

你可以看到前方若干个房间，这将帮助你选择走哪一条道路。如果你被击败或失去所有[Honour|荣誉]，你的旅途就将结束。

部分房间是磨难的房间，当你踏入它们时会向你施加痛苦。

<default>{-可以输入多个关键词，并用空格分开

-你可以用<b>{CTRL + F}作为快捷键}

Text.en:
<valuedefault>{Life}
Lost when you take damage of any [DamageTypes|Type]. 

If your Life falls to 0, you die.
Text.zh:
<valuedefault>{生命}
受到任意[DamageTypes|类型]的伤害时都会损失生命。

生命值降至 0 便会被击败。

Text.en:
<valuedefault>{Mana}
Most Skills cost Mana to use. Slowly regenerates over time.
Text.zh:
<valuedefault>{魔力}
使用大部分技能都会消耗魔力。魔力会缓慢再生。

Text.en:
<valuedefault>{Energy Shield}
Protects your Life by taking damage instead. Rapidly [ESRecharge|Recharges] if you don't lose Energy Shield for a short time.
[Chaos] damage removes twice as much Energy Shield.
Damage from [Bleeding] and [Poison] bypasses Energy Shield to remove Life directly.
Text.zh:
<valuedefault>{能量护盾}会代替生命承受伤害，短时间内未损失能量护盾时能够快速[ESRecharge|充能]。
[Chaos|混沌]伤害会扣除双倍的能量护盾。
[Bleeding|流血]和[Poison|中毒]的伤害会忽略能量护盾，直接扣除生命。

Text.en:
<valuedefault>{Spirit Reserves}
Many ongoing Skills, such as some [Buff|Buffs] or [Minion|Minions], reserve [Spirit]. 

You must have enough [Spirit] available to use these skills.
Text.zh:
<valuedefault>{精魂保留}
许多持续性技能，例如部分[Buff|增益效果]或[Minion|召唤生物]，会保留[Spirit|精魂]。

你必须拥有足够的可用[Spirit|精魂]，才能使用这些技能。

Text.en:
<valuedefault>{Estimated Armour Mitigation}
[Armour] reduces the [Physical|Physical Damage] you take from both [Attack|Attacks] and [Spell|Spells] (but provides no benefit against other [DamageTypes|Damage Types]).

Exact Damage Reduction depends on the damage dealt, but cannot be higher than 90%.
Text.zh:
<valuedefault>{预期护甲缓阻}
[Armour|护甲]会降低你从[Attack|攻击]和[Spell|法术]中受到的[Physical|物理伤害]（但在对抗其他[DamageTypes|伤害类型]时没有效果）。

实际的伤害减免由造成的伤害决定，但无法高于90%。

Text.en:
<valuedefault>{Estimated Evasion Chance}
Evasion grants a chance to avoid enemy [Strike|Strikes] or [Projectile|Projectiles]. 

Exact chance of success also depends on the attacker's [Accuracy].
Text.zh:
<valuedefault>{预期闪避几率}
闪避使你有几率躲避敌人的[Strike|打击]或[Projectile|投射物]。

成功闪避的实际几率取决于攻击者的[Accuracy|命中]。

Text.en:
<valuedefault>{Block Chance}
Chance to [Block] incoming [Strike|Strikes] and [Projectile|Projectiles], causing them to deal no damage. 

Some larger and more dangerous enemy [Strike|Strikes] cannot be [Block|Blocked].
Text.zh:
<valuedefault>{格挡几率}
[Block|格挡]受到的[Strike|打击]和[Projectile|投射物]的几率，使其不造成伤害。

一些大型和危险敌人的[Strike|打击]无法被[Block|格挡]。

Text.en:
<valuedefault>{Suppression Chance}
Chance to [Suppress] a Spell that hits you, causing it to deal 50% less Damage. 

Does not apply to Attacks.
Text.zh:
<valuedefault>{压制几率}
[Suppress|压制]击中你的法术的几率，使其造成的伤害总降50%。

对攻击没有效果。

Text.en:
<valuedefault>{Deflect Chance}
Chance to [Deflect] an Attack that hits you, causing it to deal 50% less Damage. 

Does not apply to Spells.
Text.zh:
<valuedefault>{偏转几率}
[Deflect|偏转]击中你的攻击的几率，使其造成的伤害总降50%。

对法术没有效果。

Text.en:
<valuedefault>{Fire Resistance}
You take this much less [Fire] damage. Negative values cause you to take more damage instead.

Maximum [Resistances|Resistance] is capped at 75% by default and cannot be higher than 90%. The number in brackets is the [UncappedResist|Uncapped] value.
Text.zh:
<valuedefault>{火焰抗性}
你受到的[Fire|火焰]伤害随该数值总降，负值会使你受到的伤害总增。

默认的[Resistances|抗性]上限为75%，并且无法高于90%。括号中的数值为[UncappedResist|绝对]抗性数值。

Text.en:
<valuedefault>{Cold Resistance}
You take this much less [Cold] damage. Negative values cause you to take more damage instead.

Maximum [Resistances|Resistance] is capped at 75% by default and cannot be higher than 90%. The number in brackets is the [UncappedResist|Uncapped] value.
Text.zh:
<valuedefault>{冰霜抗性}
你受到的[Cold|冰霜]伤害随该数值总降，负值会使你受到的伤害总增。

默认的[Resistances|抗性]上限为75%，并且无法高于90%。括号中的数值为[UncappedResist|绝对]抗性数值。

Text.en:
<valuedefault>{Lightning Resistance}
You take this much less [Lightning] damage. Negative values cause you to take more damage instead.

Maximum [Resistances|Resistance] is capped at 75% by default and cannot be higher than 90%. The number in brackets is the [UncappedResist|Uncapped] value.
Text.zh:
<valuedefault>{闪电抗性}
你受到的[Lightning|闪电]伤害随该数值总降，负值会使你受到的伤害总增。

默认的[Resistances|抗性]上限为75%，并且无法高于90%。括号中的数值为[UncappedResist|绝对]抗性数值。

Text.en:
<valuedefault>{Chaos Resistance}
You take this much less [Chaos] damage. Negative values cause you to take more damage instead.

Maximum [Resistances|Resistance] is capped at 75% by default and cannot be higher than 90%. The number in brackets is the [UncappedResist|Uncapped] value.
Text.zh:
<valuedefault>{混沌抗性}
你受到的[Chaos|混沌]伤害随该数值总降，负值会使你受到的伤害总增。

默认的[Resistances|抗性]上限为75%，并且无法高于90%。括号中的数值为 [UncappedResist|绝对]抗性数值

Text.en:
<valuedefault>{To place an order ensure you have chosen items that you want to trade, have a valid Real Ratio with values between 1 - 65000, and have enough gold and items.

Items cannot be claimed unless your order is completed or closed. Closing your order by pressing X will not refund your gold.

Market orders can only ever trade at or above your chosen ratio. If your order is unable to be completed through finding better deals, you will receive a gold refund for the uncompleted part of your order along with any unspent currency. You will never receive more than your "I Want" amount, but you may pay less than your "I Have" amount.

Hovering the Market Ratio shows more information about available trades on the market. Holding} Alt <valuedefault>{while hovering the Market Ratio also shows information about competing trades on the market.

If your chosen ratio is} dimmed <valuedefault>{it indicates that your order will not match with existing orders on the market. Your order will only complete if other traders choose to trade at your ratio.}

<valuedefault>{Ctrl + L-Click} on an item in your inventory to assign it as the "I Have" item.
<valuedefault>{Ctrl + Shift + L-Click} on an item in your inventory to assign it as the "I Want" item.
<valuedefault>{Ctrl + L-Click} on the "I Have" or "I Want" item to view the other side of that market.

<<take_item>><cxinfocolour>{ - Items with a glow around them are ready to retrieve.}
- <valuedefault>{Ctrl + L-Click} to move a stack to your inventory.
- <valuedefault>{Ctrl + R-Click} to move all stacks to your inventory.
<<complete_order>><cxinfocolour>{ - Completed order.}
<<open_order>><cxinfocolour>{ - Order in progress.}
<<league_order>><cxinfocolour>{ - Order in a different League.}
- <valuedefault>{L-Click} the centre of an order to view that market.
- <valuedefault>{Ctrl + L-Click} on the X to close your order without being prompted.
<<market_ratio>><cxinfocolour>{ - Cheapest competing order.}
<<exchange_ratio>><cxinfocolour>{ - Your chosen Ratio.}
<<actual_ratio>><cxinfocolour>{ - Final Ratio of completed or closed order.}
Text.zh:
<valuedefault>{要下达交易订单，你必须先选择想要交易的物品，选择有效的真实比例，数值在 1 到 65000 之间，并且拥有足够的金币和物品。

只有订单完成或结束之后，你才能够领取物品。按下X键结束订单时，金币概不退还。

只有等同或高于你所选比例的市场订单才能完成交易。如果因为市场上存在更优的交易而导致您的订单无法完成，则会退还订单中未能完成的部分的金币和尚未交易的通货。你所获得的物品数量不会超过“需求物品”的数额，但你付出的物品数量可能会少于“已有物品”的数额。

将鼠标悬浮在市场比例上可以显示更多信息，了解市场上可用的交易。按住}Alt键<valuedefault>{并将鼠标悬浮在市场比例上可以查看市场上存在的竞品订单。

如果你选择的比例为}暗色，<valuedefault>{则表示你的订单无法与市场上现存的订单配对。只有其他交易者选择以你的比例交易时，你的订单才可以完成。}

<valuedefault>{Ctrl + 左键点击}背包中的一件物品可将其标记为“已有物品”。
<valuedefault>{Ctrl + Shift + 左键点击}背包中的一件物品可将其标记为“需求物品”。
<valuedefault>{Ctrl + 左键点击}“已有物品”或“需求物品”可以查看市场上另一方的情况。

<<take_item>><cxinfocolour>{ - 有闪光边框的物品表示它们已经可以领取。}
- <valuedefault>{Ctrl + 左键点击}将一叠物品移动到背包中。
- <valuedefault>{Ctrl + 右键点击}将所有堆叠物品移动到背包中。
<<complete_order>><cxinfocolour>{ - 已完成的订单。}
<<open_order>><cxinfocolour>{ - 进行中的订单。}
<<league_order>><cxinfocolour>{ - 不同赛季的订单。}
- <valuedefault>{左键点击}订单中央以查看该市场。
- <valuedefault>{Ctrl + 左键点击}X以关闭订单并不显示提示。
<<market_ratio>><cxinfocolour>{ - 最低价的竞品订单。}
<<exchange_ratio>><cxinfocolour>{ - 你选择的比例。}
<<actual_ratio>><cxinfocolour>{ - 完成或结束的订单的最终比例。}

XBoxText.en:
<valuedefault>{To place an order ensure you have chosen items that you want to trade, have a valid Real Ratio with values between 1 - 65000, and have enough gold and items.

Items cannot be claimed unless your order is completed or closed. Closing your order will not refund your gold.

Market orders can only ever trade at or above your chosen ratio. If through finding better deals Ange is unable to finish your order, she will return the gold for the uncompleted part of your order along with any unspent currency. 

You will never receive more than your "I Want" amount, but you may pay less than your "I Have" amount.

If your chosen ratio is} dimmed <valuedefault>{it indicates that your order will not match with existing orders on the market. Your order will only complete if other traders choose to trade at your ratio.}

<bigger>{<<take_item>>}<cxinfocolour>{ - Items with a glow around them are ready to retrieve.}

<bigger>{<<complete_order>>}<cxinfocolour>{ - Completed order.}

<bigger>{<<open_order>>}<cxinfocolour>{ - Order in progress.}

<bigger>{<<league_order>>}<cxinfocolour>{ - Order in a different League.}

<bigger>{<<market_ratio>>}<cxinfocolour>{ - Cheapest competing order.}
<bigger>{<<exchange_ratio>>}<cxinfocolour>{ - Your chosen Ratio.}
<bigger>{<<actual_ratio>>}<cxinfocolour>{ - Final Ratio of completed or closed order.}
XBoxText.zh:
<valuedefault>{要下达交易订单，你必须先选择想要交易的物品，选择有效的真实比例，数值在1到65000之间，并且拥有足够的金币和物品。

只有订单完成或结束之后，你才能够领取物品。结束订单时，金币概不退还。

只有等同或高于你所选比例的市场订单才能完成交易。如果阿尔瓦无法为你完成订单，则会退还订单中未能完成的部分的金币和尚未交易的通货。你所获得的通货物品数量不会超过“需求物品”的数额，但你付出的通货物品数量可能会少于“已有物品”的数额。



如果你选择的比例为}暗色，<valuedefault>{则表示你的订单无法与市场上现存的订单配对。只有其他交易者选择以你的比例交易时，你的订单才可以完成。}

<bigger>{<<take_item>>}<cxinfocolour>{ - 有闪光边框的物品表示它们已经可以领取。}
<bigger>{<<complete_order>>}<cxinfocolour>{ -已完成的订单。}
<bigger>{<<open_order>>}<cxinfocolour>{ - 进行中的订单。}
<bigger>{<<league_order>>}<cxinfocolour>{ - 不同赛季的订单。}
<bigger>{<<market_ratio>>}<cxinfocolour>{ - 最低价的竞品订单。}
<bigger>{<<exchange_ratio>>}<cxinfocolour>{ - 你选择的比例。}
<bigger>{<<actual_ratio>>}<cxinfocolour>{ - 完成或结束的订单的最终比例。}

Text.en:
<white>{Skill Points
}
<default>{On levelling up, and upon completing certain quests, you'll get a skill point.
Each point can be allocated on the passive skill tree to gain the benefits of that passive skill.
You can only allocate skill points on passives that are connected to your other allocated passives.}

<white>{Weapon Set Points
}
<default>{A number of your skill points can be used as weapon set points.
Weapon set points allow a single skill point to instead be allocated to two different passive skills.
You gain the benefits of these passive skills depending on which weapon set you currently have active.
Weapon set points cannot allocate jewel sockets or keystone passive skills.}
Text.zh:
<white>{天赋点数
}
<default>{每次升级或完成特定任务都可获得天赋技能点。
在天赋技能树中花费点数，即可习得给予角色增益的天赋。
你只能将点数分配在与其他天赋相连结的天赋上。}

<white>{武器组天赋点数
}
<default>{一部分天赋点数可以作为武器组天赋点数使用。
武器组天赋点数能够使你将一个天赋点数配置在两个不同的天赋上。
你可以根据当前激活的武器组而获得这些天赋的效果。
武器组天赋点数不能用于配置珠宝插槽或基石天赋。
如果你具有变形技能，则可以为[Shapeshift|变形]武器组配置天赋。}

Text.en:
<size:+5>{<mavenfightpopuptitle>{<outlinecolour:mavenfightpopupglow>{Map Boss Skill Points Acquired}}}
<grey>{Points can be obtained by:
 - Slaying a [MapBoss|Map Boss] in an area level 79+ Map that has at least 6 Modifiers
 - Slaying a [MapBoss|Map Boss] in an area level 80+ Map that has at least 6 Modifiers
 - Slaying an Anomaly [MapBoss|Map Boss] in an area level 79+ Map that has at least 6 Modifiers
 - Slaying a Citadel [MapBoss|Map Boss] in an area level 79+ Map that has at least 6 Modifiers
 - Completing the Pinnacle of Flame quest
You must be the [MapOwner|Map Owner] to earn points.}
Text.zh:
<size:+5>{<mavenfightpopuptitle>{<outlinecolour:mavenfightpopupglow>{已获得地图首领天赋点数}}}
<grey>{可以通过以下方式获取点数：
- 在至少具有 6 个词缀的区域等级 79 及以上的地图中击败[MapBoss|地图首领]
- 在至少具有 6 个词缀的区域等级 80 及以上的地图中击败[MapBoss|地图首领]
- 在至少具有 6 个词缀的区域等级 79 及以上的地图中击败异动[MapBoss|地图首领]
- 在至少具有 6 个词缀的区域等级 79 及以上的地图中击败城塞[MapBoss|地图首领]
- 完成烈焰的巅峰任务也可获得两个天赋点数。
只有[MapOwner|地图拥有者]能够获得点数。}

Text.en:
<size:+5>{<mavenfightpopuptitle>{<outlinecolour:mavenfightpopupglow>{Abyss Skill Points Acquired}}}
<grey>{Complete maps near the Well of Souls to obtain points in this tree.
Additionally, gain 6 points each time you defeat the Abyss Pinnacle Boss and you are the area owner.}
Text.zh:
<size:+5>{<mavenfightpopuptitle>{<outlinecolour:mavenfightpopupglow>{已获得深渊天赋点数}}}
<grey>{完成灵魂之井附近的地图，以获取此天赋树中的点数。
此外，每次击败深渊巅峰首领且你是区域所有者时，额外获得 6 点。}

Text.en:
<size:+5>{<mavenfightpopuptitle>{<outlinecolour:mavenfightpopupglow>{Temple Skill Points Acquired}}}
<grey>{Complete maps near the Vaal Ruins to obtain points in this tree.
Additionally, gain 6 points each time you defeat the Temple Pinnacle Boss and you are the area owner.}
Text.zh:
<size:+5>{<mavenfightpopuptitle>{<outlinecolour:mavenfightpopupglow>{已获得神庙技能点数}}}
<grey>{完成瓦尔遗迹附近的地图，以获取此天赋树中的点数。
此外，每次击败神庙巅峰首领且你是区域所有者时，额外获得 6 点。}

Text.en:
<bigger>{<title>{Ultimatum}}
Offer an Inscribed Ultimatum to partake in the Trialmaster's Trials.

Completing these trials can earn [AscendancyPoints|Ascendancy Skill Points].

At each trial you will earn a reward, but also have to select a modifier to make the trials more difficult.
Rewards can be taken only when the final trial has been completed.
If you die within the trials you cannot return and forfeit all earned rewards.
Text.zh:
<bigger>{<title>{致命贪婪}}
奉献一个贪婪战书，参与试炼使者的挑战。

完成试炼可以获得[AscendancyPoints|升华点数]。

完成每一轮试炼后，你将获得一份奖励，还需要选择一个词缀来提高试炼的难度。
只有完成最终的试炼后才可以领取奖励。
如果你在试炼中被击败了，则将无法返回试炼，并会放弃所有已经获得的奖励。

Text.en: Only the Trial owner can interact with this
Text.zh: 只有试炼的主人能与之互动

Text.en: The Grelwood witch succumbed to Corruption

无名者的形象寄宿于雕像之中

Text.en: The air sings as the axe swings
Of wax and wick, he was cursed
Text.zh: 蜡油与灯芯成为了他的诅咒

Text.en: A clash of beast and man
Text.zh: 人类与野兽交锋的痕迹

Text.en: Trade is the lifeblood of the sands
The sands rage at Corruption's behest
Once adorned in shining gold and exotic plants
Text.zh: 曾经装饰着闪亮的黄金和异域的植物

Text.en: Laid to rest with honour, in the ways of her people
Text.zh: 以族人的传统，在光荣中安息

Text.en: Meeting place of the Seven Rivers
Let him see the light of the world once more
Text.zh: 愿他能再次目睹这世间的光明

Text.en: Let him see so he is able to forgive
Let him see beyond his endless rage
Text.zh: 愿他的眼睛不再被狂怒遮蔽

Text.en: We remember what all others forget
Text.zh: 万物皆已忘却，我等永志不忘

Text.en: Site of the Rite of Flame

Text.zh: 上层的腐败渗入了地下

Text.en: The six sisters bless the worthy
Text.zh: 六姐妹会祝福适格的勇士

Text.en: Death is commonplace among the tribes
Text.zh: 在部族之中，死亡实乃司空见惯

Text.en: Beware the bite of she who lurks
Where crawling bodies tunnel, burrow, and feast
Text.zh: 蠕动的身躯在钻取、挖掘、饱餐

Text.en: Where greed is met with peril
Resting place of those who did not listen to Servi
Text.zh: 不听塞尔维劝告者的旅途终点
孢子永远不会随风落定

Text.en: Those who dare and succeed will be rewarded
Text.zh: 凯旋的勇者将获得嘉奖
佳华尼第一次取得的成功

Text.en: The Grand Soul Core glows bright with energy
Text.zh: 能量令宏伟的灵核散发出夺目的光芒

Text.en: A nest of pain and suffering
Main control for the Utzaal spillways
Text.zh: 乌扎尔泄洪道的主要控制系统

Text.en: A fire still tended by the dead
Text.zh: 先古之民依然照护着烈焰

Text.en: The sum total of Utzaal's wealth
Text.zh: 乌扎尔的财富尽归于此

Text.en: A legacy of incest and vulgarity
The burning glory of the Vaal
Text.zh: 瓦尔的荣光如烈日一般辉煌

Text.en: Home of the Architect of Expansion
Home of the Fang of the Vaal
Home of the Architect of the Guild
A name that radiates warmth from the hearts of her subjects
Text.zh: 一个名字便可令臣民心中充满温暖

Text.en: Those with warmth in their hearts give willingly to their Queen
Text.zh: 心中温暖之人自愿为女王而献身

Text.en: Their obsession with power was paid for with blood
Text.zh: 他们痴迷于力量，并以命脉来换取

"{0}"
，然后点击“{1}”按钮。

<colour:red>{{该操作无法撤销。}}

Text.en:
The Recombinator combines two [ItemRarity|Magic or Rare] items of the same class together, creating a new item with the modifiers you have selected from each, and the base properties from one of the inputs chosen at random.
The success chance of the combination is determined based on the modifiers you select.
Both of the input items are always consumed, even if the recombination fails.
Text.zh:
重组器将两个相同类别的[ItemRarity|魔法或稀有]物品组合在一起，产生一个新物品，新物品的词缀由你从两件物品中分别选择，其基础属性从两个输入物品中随机选取。
重组成功率由所选的词缀决定。
无论重组是否成功，两件输入物品都会被消耗。

Text.en: 6 [IncursionCrystal|Energised Crystals] are required to activate the Temple Console
Text.zh: 激活神庙控制台需要 6 个[IncursionCrystal|充能水晶]

Text.en:
<default>{Energise Beacons throughout Wraeclast to collect [IncursionCrystal|Energised Crystals] to access Atziri's Temple.
Once 6 Energised Crystals have been collected interacting with the Temple Console will consume them and offer a random selection of 6 rooms to place, and allow entry into the Temple.
Rooms can be placed by selecting them and placing next to paths or other rooms they upgrade.

Completing the temple will cause minor [IncursionDestabilization|Destabilisation] when you leave, destroying a small portion of your rooms or paths.
Killing the Architect or Atziri will cause greater destabilization of the temple, destroying a larger portion of your rooms or paths.}

<white>{Restricted Rooms
}<default>{After defeating the Architect you'll gain access to Xipocado's Console in his chamber allowing you to place Restricted Rooms. 
Completing a Restricted Room will cause it to destabilise. 
One of these rooms is the Royal Access Chamber which is required to access Atziri, Queen of the Vaal.}

<white>{Medallions
}<default>{After defeating the Architect for the first time, medallions may be found in the temple from the Vaal with royal blood.
These provide powerful bonuses. 
Board-related medallions are used on appropriate rooms. 
Each room can only be affected by 1 medallion of each type.}
Text.zh:
<default>{在瓦尔克拉斯各处激活灯塔以收集[IncursionCrystal|充能水晶]，从而进入阿兹里神庙。
收集到 6 个充能水晶后，与神庙控制台互动将消耗这些水晶，并提供随机的 6 个房间供你选择和放置，同时允许进入神庙。
选中房间并放置在与路径相邻或其他可升级的相邻房间旁来布局。
完成神庙后，当你离开时会导致轻微的[IncursionDestabilization|瓦解]，摧毁一小部分房间或路径。
击败建筑师或阿兹里将导致更剧烈的瓦解，摧毁更多的房间或路径。}

<white>{秘藏房间
}<default>{击败建筑师后，你将可以在其房间内使用夏波卡多的控制台来放置秘藏房间。
完成一个秘藏房间将导致其开始瓦解。
这些房间中包含皇家谒见厅，这是进入瓦尔女王阿兹里所在区域的必要房间。}

<white>{纹章
}<default>{首次击败建筑师后，可在神庙中找到拥有王室血统的瓦尔人留下的纹章。
纹章提供强大的加成。
与布局相关的纹章需用于对应的房间。
每个房间只能受 1 个纹章的影响。}

Text.en:
Atlas Masters lend you their power in any area throughout the endgame. 

Masters can be unlocked and leveled up by finding them in the world and completing their quests. 

Each level unlocks an additional row of options and one point to allocate. Each option requires one point to allocate and any combination of options may be selected.

Master selection and points allocation can be changed freely prior to opening an area to apply a different master or bonus to future areas.
Text.zh:
异界大师会在终局游戏中的任何区域授予你力量。

通过在游戏中找到大师并完成他们的任务，可以解锁并提升大师等级。

每提升一级，会额外解锁一行选项，并获得一个可分配的天赋点。每个选项需要 1 个天赋点来分配，且可以选择任意组合。

在开启一个区域之前，可以自由更改所选择的大师和天赋点分配，以便为后续区域应用不同的大师或加成。

Text.en:
<valuedefault>{The Verisium Anvil allows you to spend Verisium to Runeforge your equipment. 

Any non-[Rarity|Unique] Armour can be Runeforged, causing it to grant [Ward|Runic Ward]. After level 54, Runeforging converts a portion of its [Armour], [Evasion] or [EnergyShield|Energy Shield] into [Ward|Runic Ward]. The exact proportions differ between different Base Types. 

Placing an applicable item into the left window displays a preview of the result in the right window, and the cost of Runeforging beneath.}
Text.zh:
<valuedefault>{维金锻砧允许你消耗维金来对装备进行符文锻造。

任意非[Rarity|传奇]护甲均可进行符文锻造，使其获得[Ward|符文结界]。在 54 级之后，符文锻造会将部分[Armour|护甲]、[Evasion|闪避]或[EnergyShield|能量护盾]转化为[Ward|符文结界]。具体比例因不同基底类型而异。

将适用的物品放入左侧窗口，可在右侧窗口预览结果，下方显示符文锻造的消耗。}

Text.en:
<valuedefault>{The Verisium Anvil allows you to spend Verisium to Runeforge your equipment. 

Any non-[Rarity|Unique] Armour can be Runeforged, causing it to grant [Ward|Runic Ward]. After level 54, Armours convert a portion of its [Armour], [Evasion] or [EnergyShield|Energy Shield] into [Ward|Runic Ward]. The exact proportions differ between different Base Types. 

[Rarity|Unique] Weapons and Armours can also be Runeforged, upgrading their Base Type. Runeforging a Unique Item costs a Kalguuran Crest as well as Verisium.

Placing an applicable item into the left window displays a preview of the result in the right window, and the cost of Runeforging beneath.}
Text.zh:
<valuedefault>{维金锻砧允许你消耗维金对装备进行符文锻造。

任意非[Rarity|传奇]护甲均可进行符文锻造，使其获得[Ward|符文结界]。在 54 级之后，符文锻造会将部分[Armour|护甲]、[Evasion|闪避]或[EnergyShield|能量护盾]转化为[Ward|符文结界]。具体比例因不同基底类型而异。

[Rarity|传奇]武器与护甲也可进行符文锻造，以提升其基底类型。锻造传奇物品除了维金外，还需消耗一个卡古兰徽记。

将适用的物品放入左侧窗口，可在右侧窗口预览结果，下方显示符文锻造的消耗。}

Text.en:
Offer all of your remaining Tribute to be awarded with
[AudienceWithTheKing|An Audience With The King]
Text.zh: 献上所有剩余贡品，以获得[AudienceWithTheKing|谒王之约]。
